name: Dr Neil Shah
subject: See What Walz Just Did?
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Dr
body:
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=1) Peter, Tim Walz just officially announced that he is running again to be your dictator, I mean governor. Sure feels like the former, doesn’t it? **At this moment, he is gathering with a bunch of career politicians, lobbyists, political insiders and far left radicals to launch his re-election campaign.** In the same week of his announcement, Walz also revealed a program that gives children $200 for getting the jab. And it incentivizes parents to inform his Dept of Health of their children’s compliance by conducting a $100,000 college scholarship sweepstakes courtesy of YOUR tax money. _This program is wrong on so many levels!_ Healthy children should not get these vaccines at the present time. What is the benefit? They have nearly zero risk of dying of COVID. In fact, it is unclear whether *any* [healthy children have died from COVID](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=OwehQGnYjrzpIc0rxaR28WKyc2E8AmVg_hvevTNrH1lDE5_ayrOYaCCWT4aVSlW764l2aIsoGwhscCC7wt__zAq1A5DsITqKw_TS5rOoDHMNMXwOwogx7Q6lCrCN97-j50V3DsEbb-JeKgi4ymqTAg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=2) in the United States. On the risk side, we have zero long term safety data for any of the current vaccines. We do have strong data that the risk of myocarditis is high, perhaps 1/5000, for healthy males. This data was strong enough for countries like Sweden, Finland and Denmark to ban the use of Moderna’s vaccine in pediatric patients. We must stop this madness. The vaccines appear to still reduce the risk of death in high risk individuals - all of whom are vaccinated by this point. But the vaccines do not stop the ability to transmit the virus to, or receive it from, others - I’m living proof of this fact. **On top of that, paying people in general to take an experimental treatment (yes, it’s still an experiment at this point because we have no long term data) is ethically very fraught. The more vulnerable the person is socioeconomically, the less you can pay them lest you risk crossing the line to unethical bribery.** Here’s our problem. I’ve heard from many activists like you who have little faith in the current crop of elected politicians. They never fight strong enough against Walz, Biden and the Radical Left. That’s why I’m running for Governor - to save Minnesota from career politicians who are destroying this state. We will not win by using the same _old playbook of failed state senators_ gunning for the next position on their political resume. Victory will come from an outsider who is leaving a successful private practice and willing to fight for your liberties.
## **Help me beat the career politicians and Fire Walz with a donation today!**
| [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=3 "Donate Today") [Donate Today](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=3)
---

Other candidates will pretend to be a “fighter”. But where have they been the last four years? Walz seems to get most of what he wants with very little resistance from his opposition.
**And the stakes are extremely high. Walz is running for re-election on the same “One Minnesota” tagline that is an insult to anyone paying attention to the growing divide in this state and country.**
Tim Walz divided Minnesotans on rural vs metro issues. He divided us on how to combat COVID. His inactions in the Twin Cities divided us on how to keep our neighborhoods safe. And now he is dividing us on who gets the experimental vaccine or not.
## WE MUST FIRE WALZ!
You deserve a Governor who will roll up his sleeves to fight for liberty. I signed the **_Never Again pledge_** because there is no issue more important than protecting your rights from abusive emergency powers. Mask mandates and lockdowns will be eradicated if I am fortunate enough to serve as your Governor.
More importantly, I will fight and end vaccine mandates. Your health freedom is more important to me as a physician in the private sector, than it is to career politicians who care more about their political resumes than your rights. That’s for sure.
So please join me and help us FIRE Tim Walz!
[**Let’s Save Minnesota by beating the career politicians with a contribution today. Elect a fighter as your next Governor. I’m not funded by lobbyists and special interests like my opponents, so a donation of $25, $50 or even $100 goes along way to helping us #SaveSota.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=4)
**Thank you!**
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[http://www.electneil.com/](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_ywjlEt09belhBif-0dyVFfP5O8av4SyIIDSsyGPw1W831qwkFPoKxxxukEhtAtwdS903Vaw1n4BHuzGwQ_Kblg&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=5)
Prepared and paid for by the Dr. Neil Shah for Governor Committee, 855 Village Center Dr #245, North Oaks, MN 55127
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=6). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=see_what_walz_just_did&n=7), software for leaders.

name: Aadland For Senate
subject: Protecting our country by reinstating border policies
body:
Border Policy is an existential issue
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UICLwEgVUIcSfTakF0f8zyG_p3XiAMp3_XPDLvTRRJLrm5rtyc53so149gLB8rKwtTBFiJ_HLJMamH3Y7-or9crxY0HM4RqL9YfDTlMuI7bx_F5mCy3_R9EnhxR_P54Yu1pnlM3oN9kag-LInYJkVyLSV6I16Feg&c=b8pvar1e-UOrS0ldzf_NBOBx4Pm9rlaDofyWzfjE7jJ00At0BU5LHg==&ch=fjGq09I8VliNr7wjPzCJjmGFFcVHSpqiRitr5ccjVDsQWZ_edjV_ZA==)

| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UICLwEgVUIcSfTakF0f8zyG_p3XiAMp3_XPDLvTRRJLrm5rtyc53stWeOmVD3e2wk53bdnOFvxWfZHG84D18x9-xR0RsI-2K_JddfBbnw7eB8pkucopNq5a7CJ48iqsgnI27aPnIFkH4ek-EzpGSLE5YQn1UlS3Cp9OpRtBIZiil2KKlAiXWMQWkYkmWH_DafGuqKAF9rm_WPBcfelkADY5cxvspZbUHVNqJcD0Z0tJRdxYS95GZ2Zx4jhlL4pwz&c=b8pvar1e-UOrS0ldzf_NBOBx4Pm9rlaDofyWzfjE7jJ00At0BU5LHg==&ch=fjGq09I8VliNr7wjPzCJjmGFFcVHSpqiRitr5ccjVDsQWZ_edjV_ZA==)
---
|
# They're calling it an "invasion"
---
Ranchers in southern Texas on the border call it an invasion. They say they cannot take out the trash at night without being armed. They no longer enjoy the freedom of the American life because they must be on guard against this foreign invasion every day. Federal agencies, they say have abandoned them, and local law enforcement is left to protect the people.
As well, in Roma, Texas, Mexican cartel members are firing at border patrol agents, and in the month of August, almost 43,000 people escaped apprehension and "got away" into our country.
This is not just a Texas problem as many illegal aliens are making their way to our state of Colorado. One of the governments true purposes is to protect our citizens against foreign evasion. But the Biden Administration has done just the opposite: he's thrown open our borders, and Michael Bennet has stood by and watched.
---
|
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UICLwEgVUIcSfTakF0f8zyG_p3XiAMp3_XPDLvTRRJLrm5rtyc53srxRt8hU7IJyLSDg20ZYfZfE2egxqyNx2qt1tv0dTGcH6rskvoq7IksxJoVH1ZEHqsgcD0JaL3219qXV5TfUE2dH2FFIJ37aNQ==&c=b8pvar1e-UOrS0ldzf_NBOBx4Pm9rlaDofyWzfjE7jJ00At0BU5LHg==&ch=fjGq09I8VliNr7wjPzCJjmGFFcVHSpqiRitr5ccjVDsQWZ_edjV_ZA==)
---
| Help me go to Washington to fight for you and your security. We must stop this tragic situation by reinstating a border policy that works and puts the safety of our country first.
---
|
---
| |
---
| You can help in two ways:
* first, write your current lawmaker opposing the open borders.
* Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country.

body:
| Did you hear about Staff Academy?
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM0Njg4MzExLCJuYmYiOjE2MzQ2ODgzMTEsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiI2aTJibXYwMHFyY3djMzhkZXZidiIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL3N0YWZmLWFjYWRlbXkvc3RhZmYtYWNhZGVteS1pbnRlcmVzdC8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTkyMV9zYTImX19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0.HSMKzYJu4602SAcRqZJlD0zhm_Elz949yDX-W5nQJnU)
Peter — I wanted to make sure you heard: _We just launched applications for our 2022 Staff Academy Cohort!_ | [ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM0Njg4MzExLCJuYmYiOjE2MzQ2ODgzMTEsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiI2aTJibXYwMHFyY3djMzhkZXZidiIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL3N0YWZmLWFjYWRlbXkvc3RhZmYtYWNhZGVteS1pbnRlcmVzdC8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTgyMV9zYWxhdW5jaCZfX3M9bzRibXVhcWpvbGMzcWhkcXZpc3kifQ.aUPje1s9_8B6aVM0JBsGLzkDW3zue_eGEdd7GTu1O_k)
---
Staff Academy is one of NDTC’s biggest programs. **And we want YOU to be a part of it!**
In 10 weeks of virtual training led by the best-of-the-best, you’ll learn the hard skills needed to land your dream job in politics!
And yes, it’s true — the program is **_free_** to anyone accepted!
[**Ready to get started? You can use the button below to begin your application:**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM0Njg4MzExLCJuYmYiOjE2MzQ2ODgzMTEsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiI2aTJibXYwMHFyY3djMzhkZXZidiIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL3N0YWZmLWFjYWRlbXkvc3RhZmYtYWNhZGVteS1pbnRlcmVzdC8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTkyMV9zYTImX19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0.HSMKzYJu4602SAcRqZJlD0zhm_Elz949yDX-W5nQJnU)
[APPLY NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJhdWQiOiJkZXRvdXIiLCJpc3MiOiJtb25vbGl0aCIsInN1YiI6ImRldG91cl9saW5rIiwiaWF0IjoxNjM0Njg4MzExLCJuYmYiOjE2MzQ2ODgzMTEsImFjY291bnRfaWQiOiI4ODk0MjI3IiwiZGVsaXZlcnlfaWQiOiI2aTJibXYwMHFyY3djMzhkZXZidiIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vdHJhaW5kZW1vY3JhdHMub3JnL3N0YWZmLWFjYWRlbXkvc3RhZmYtYWNhZGVteS1pbnRlcmVzdC8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTEwMTkyMV9zYTImX19zPW80Ym11YXFqb2xjM3FoZHF2aXN5In0.HSMKzYJu4602SAcRqZJlD0zhm_Elz949yDX-W5nQJnU)
---
Here’s a quick rundown:
You get to choose from one of three training tracks: _digital, fundraising, or communications._
No matter if your ultimate goal is to be results-driven email strategist, a press secretary, or a finance director, this program will jump-start your political career.
Plus, once you graduate, we help prepare you for your next campaign role through individualized job training and interview practice.

body:
There’s no other way to say this but we are desperate for your help.
__My heart just sank when my team handed me the latest FEC reports.
[**I knew I had to reach out to you straight away, so I 'm writing this email as fast as I can! You won't believe what I'm about to show you:**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7f30f51e645d4a6fbe34ece71064327b&_e=2LVem_iip6S-R3r5Fjx7eLYywR6UUyVDavgc2qDjW_MzVJ1FBtV59mVQ_u8telQLuZdVPevRbjNB9NEQH4F8R7xC5YPNnTDSoHpo-6O4IJpHFZOMqZV1HWb3p-edJ3oYztW1OqmtPcfAHA4pqdN65Cx4rCkC7MCFzM1PLTlfqigg7p_HvgDGJtTwdus6ei5fO4OvC0PeECEVigAbxCTRPhGm8N5P4hMHh1b5Ge4EfcLWX5AaMv3ni6rjxwcKR5_YGcDLcft0cqcphmea3DCVNx8J80P7nx7awBx7WyfVy3uKKzOhLcX_zB83UUAqrQ0yvtHRSlfzFrAj45rwwfhA8YHirH9UAPQsWgSjqUZ307UDfPkRby3wxaa_H-ZKcInqFTnlz6vrI_xRHbjea0jnKgbbpB60iAwjroUPvHj7PAjuwd-T7CVjgpRQvCO4uJ34zpUrfcLZnsGN8WbHjVFSneeqNfSX2-KC4ARQtt5MoW_9Y591iQk5odJQDl2kK4El4Paw8lBT-utN9uTQj-SUwQlL9tsH8EBqCcb5YtVwOXDrRSmXoBFUoEoM8QDKoza7)
\-- The most vulnerable Democrats in America just raked in nearly $720,000 EACH
\-- They have an average of $2,600,000 cash on hand
\-- House Democrats have $63,000,000 stashed away in the bank
\-- They just outraised us by $10,000,000
\-- Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff raked in $2,500,000 A PIECE
**There 's no other way to say this but we are desperate for your help. **
I just launched a rapid response fund to send emergency reinforcements to key battleground states across the country. If we're going to take back the House for President Trump, these races are in the "MUST-WIN" category.
[**This is also where every dollar goes the furthest.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7f30f51e645d4a6fbe34ece71064327b&_e=2LVem_iip6S-R3r5Fjx7eLYywR6UUyVDavgc2qDjW_MzVJ1FBtV59mVQ_u8telQLuZdVPevRbjNB9NEQH4F8R7xC5YPNnTDSoHpo-6O4IJpHFZOMqZV1HWb3p-edJ3oYztW1OqmtPcfAHA4pqdN65Cx4rCkC7MCFzM1PLTlfqigg7p_HvgDGJtTwdus6ei5fO4OvC0PeECEVigAbxCTRPhGm8N5P4hMHh1b5Ge4EfcLWX5AaMv3ni6rjxwcKR5_YGcDLcft0cqcphmea3DCVNx8J80P7nx7awBx7WyfVy3uKKzOhLcX_zB83UUAqrQ0yvtHRSlfzFrAj45rwwfhA8XzUlOAerWj7o54pNAm0oLUb7rNPjNcHTZWD_IX7zw3J-nMTTy8TESq4konBdpC4nfWREr1iCaotIA8R7P7YbfCT3UQ23O3MaykrKv_xqopLbQMnxtT4lQF7m6h8vr205vLzU7BpRa3gICh2Wt86W-8s5BdRy-Q_dvV0Gh8aCdaIdEYGhQqRvszp6MV9NCrHyiBOveBjQEpPIAoLkIljYef6I7ockCjohukoc0nyD5if)
The newest polls show the battle for the House Majority is shaping up to be a DEAD HEAT. Each donation can mean the difference between victory and defeat -- and Liberal cash is pouring in right now!
**It 's officially an emergency situation.**
President Trump asked each of us to do our part to save America. It's a mission I take very seriously... And I think you do too. That's why I'm personally asking for your help before the end of the day.
For America,

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Sitting down to write you some tough news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.
|
---
| | | Peter,

This is difficult for me to write.

I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader.

We are on the doorstep of my Mid-Month deadline and we are not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target.

My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough.

Peter, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida.

_I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. _

I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is.

---
Here is a special link my team put together for you. I hope to see your name on the donor list:

**[https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Peter-October2021](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86c601d889834b70b993fe3c4f80f705&_e=_t6ZA4FlwjWsU4HUmV9vkCMtzmdYN8jrUvn2K1rnil4Sn1atfcXFgEJtW8L55joVIM_ds9X61rgRe6T_JxYUjGnv3ubMLveq27i0_g84ZJIyqO7ePWFNp-fmp-WEIP2z9sbPsxnc0v95dA01kZmf9yN5lUJV3LJqzo-v9fR3uXY7VRSTh8byM_8X5GyKtqC5HP7zzXMrIJ-j1Xcu_9jSpecV81CDEOp0Bk8M-mCNpjPg7OxnU6sd6Sxfrcle0W2mJlPXItpO_w8Val5gV1R7xrZeZumHCdpk0j488bam7DEUpVCp7btwhBjAS6GhlAtGPTijvUe7T1TFvpaz_wZIh7QcoEE1nEIjD2ziBU_iIJyOAjWAdkCbEzkZ1Y0OoST2hfa_kjZi9DC4kZaJQWOa0eKfWmzFVwLopTDcU8RVK8yKXXDvdi1fnRyCXc_v0lQJeZPGDFG64KL7VTkYhcJYQo2na3gSYRmH_c6_gjeD1MxNZB0vuLhRxPZ_FfPQG05qvNQ4Bb6_vJglDlOABURqYQchwCTl7YOQT0C5mO9bo-Q%3D "https://secure.winred.com/link-for-Peter-October2021")**

Marco

| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

clean_body: I can’t believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader. | | | | Peter, This is difficult for me to write. I just can't believe that there is more support for a Trump Impeachment Manager than for a strong Conservative leader. We are on the doorstep of my Mid-Month deadline and we are not on track to reach our goal. To be honest, we are about 3,000 donations behind our target. My entire team is calling, texting, emailing and writing as many patriots as possible in an effort to activate 3,000 donors in the next 48 hours, but I'm afraid it won't be enough. Peter, these goals aren't arbitrary. These are REAL goals and REAL numbers that we REALLY need to hit in order to have a shot at competing with the Democratic movement in Florida. I 'm pleading with you, even if it is $8...will you donate today? Maybe people think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need people who can donate $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 TODAY in order to reach my goal. I know you hear from my team and me a lot, but this is critical. We are on the brink of losing Trump's home state to someone who votes with the Socialist Squad 94% of the time. I hope you understand how deeply concerning that is. Here is a special link my team put together for you. body:
My kids call me Mom
| | | | [](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciiijtd-ykykmujid-y/)
---
[Visit our website](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciiijtd-ykykmujid-j/)
| | | They’re at it again... Calling women “birthing” and “lactating” individuals. **WHHHHAAAAAT?** Those words are even written in the massive spending bill Democrats are trying to push through.
**The left is diminishing my identity to a “lactating individual” because they’re afraid to say the words “women or mom.” **
This is nothing short of insanity. I want to live in a country where people are not afraid to call women, “MOM!”
---
[Donate and Stand Against the Insanity](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciiijtd-ykykmujid-t/)
My being a stay at home mom was a blessing and a gift, and the hardest job I’ve ever done. Women and moms who balance work and life are absolutely inspirational to me.
**It’s extremely offensive to diminish us to “lactating individuals” or “birthing people.”**
**This nonsense has to end, and is one of the big reasons I support Eli Bremer for Senate.** Eli has fought for REAL women’s rights for years - not this sham.
[**If you’re sick of this PC war on our speech like me, I ask that you donate to Eli’s campaign.**](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciiijtd-ykykmujid-i/)
[Donate Now](https://eliforcolorado.cmail19.com/t/t-l-ciiijtd-ykykmujid-d/)

body:
You earned this.
_Congratulations!_
Hello Peter,
Because of recent survey responses, petition signatures, and contributions, you have been officially marked in the top 5% of ALL Conservatives in America. Your proud support of President Trump and our America first movement has been an inspiration.
As a small token of our appreciation, we're offering something we've NEVER offered before...
[**We're giving you the chance to have a face-to-face dinner with the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58569976:61UlxD2yN:m:1:3253819041:BE5F43722338B1BB1B7061891730A2C8:r)
_Oh, and did we mention we'll pay for the dinner AND the flight AND the hotel?_
**You have 1 HOUR from the time you opened this email to respond.**
**YOUR OFFICIAL INVITATION:
DINNER WITH PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP** **Your Contact Info:** [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58569976:61UlxD2yN:m:1:3253819041:BE5F43722338B1BB1B7061891730A2C8:r)

This really is the opportunity of a lifetime.
If you pass this up and someone else gets to have dinner with President Trump instead, will you regret not responding?
Now is your chance -- you have 1 hour to respond!
Best,

_From the Republican Whip_

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z62kp36asckss9jvud152je3bjcsg9qlr1if4es8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth62p36c9h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9qtfdft25ss5uc7kigivv87ntlqnbib70qdhuq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth62p36c9h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjr716i87lcencqboa7v6o93h0fac9clkf862t50_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth62p36c9h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9a8l9u1bl64f8ftnkoq7q7jlrtrmu18nhnook58_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth62p36c9h2bs)**
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zf0uu9aojfgql2o8o9t7jgppp5qnflf3b9ptdgio).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z1ggtda4g6hm2gui6q9to5umts9gng5tt9ps67qo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5jm4ob4cph649fg)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ziobhfr5aq550gimqtuck54iddotcln1acg8l0c8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth6eor4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2gos9gl70joevta9nbnl6edno12og0d2ssial40_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth6eor4c9h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcub9nj06bkf46iqpcee0ho2kkkdvhbar2kotarg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cth6eor4c9h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Can you join us on Thursday, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

Tomorrow evening, I am proud to host an event _**[honoring women veterans and their allies in Congress](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/-sH4eWOHGfHARCuxV1LayjQeuawXEh1clgh9rW82NNE=).**_ Together with Senator Catherine Cortez Masto, former Senator Joe Donnelly, and Reps. Chrissy Houlahan, Elaine Luria, Mikie Sherrill, and Julia Brownely, we are coming together to hold the House and win the Senate by electing - and re-electing - women veterans to Congress.

Please join me in this important cause! [_**RSVP for your ticket at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/-sH4eWOHGfHARCuxV1LayjQeuawXEh1clgh9rW82NNE=) If you'd like to join our Host, Champions, or Heroes committees - and get one-on-one time with our honored guests - [_**you can make that commitment at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/-sH4eWOHGfHARCuxV1LayjQeuawXEh1clgh9rW82NNE=) If you can't join us, you can still make a difference by [_**chipping in to our Women Veterans Leadership Fund at this link.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/A8_DX3KZbppmJEMTLJnuGUfD5rnIP3hG4dDaltgK394=)

_**Women Vets + Allies in Congress**_
_**When: Thursday, October 21st / 6:30 - 8:00 pm ET**_
_**Where: Capitol Hill / location upon RSVP**_
_**To RSVP: **__**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tth_womenvets21](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/-sH4eWOHGfHARCuxV1LayjQeuawXEh1clgh9rW82NNE=)**_

In more than 240 years only 8 women vets have ever been elected to Congress. If we are to better those numbers, we must do it together. [_**Join us.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/-sH4eWOHGfHARCuxV1LayjQeuawXEh1clgh9rW82NNE=)

In solidarity,
Patrick

Hon. Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former Congressman, PA-01
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/3S4TjflmwmWPX8bJVg9DEnwDHDBMrgF-UNT6UE3T0b0=)

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/NiFal22nhC48bE6eMRyh_6wMmdwzqg02_4QDai_IcFM= "https://act.myngp.com/el/1Y2bg8v-hz-ww4hYC_8bGgyNIdzOo3VvGaMPABunf2E=/NiFal22nhC48bE6eMRyh_6wMmdwzqg02_4QDai_IcFM=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking the Hill

Bristol PA 19007 United States

name: Patty Murray
subject: Voting rights on the line in the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
With the Democratic majority at risk, we need to make sure Senator Warnock has the resources he needs to overcome these voter suppression efforts and win this important reelection battle.
#
Peter,
This week, the Senate will vote on the Freedom to Vote Act. All 50 Democratic Senators are prepared to advance this legislation and take steps to protect the right to vote across the country. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP are threatening to stand in the way _again_.**
My friend Raphael Warnock has been a fierce advocate for voting rights in the Senate -- but the Republicans are eager to unseat him in any way they can, including restricting who can vote. With the Democratic majority at risk, we need to make sure Senator Warnock has the resources he needs to overcome these voter suppression efforts and win this important reelection battle.
**[Make a $5 contribution now to support Senator Warnock and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37714364/312354866/-569501059?refcode=pm_em_211020_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM3ZmI5Zi1hNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpQA_-W_em47Yt4t5AS3BWTwrplnIXDWyM4ZxhC4XVw=)**
**The right to vote is sacred.** Politicians should not be able to pick and choose who can make their voices heard at the ballot box -- not in Georgia or anywhere across the country. Every eligible voter must be able to participate in the electoral process without undue restrictions.
I’ll keep up the fight along with Senator Warnock and the Democratic majority -- but we need you to stand with us today and ensure we can beat back the Republican threat in 2022:
**[Can you rush in $5 right now to stand with Raphael Warnock and Senate Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37714365/312354868/-569501059?refcode=pm_em_211020_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM3ZmI5Zi1hNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpQA_-W_em47Yt4t5AS3BWTwrplnIXDWyM4ZxhC4XVw=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **
** **
** **
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37714366/312354870/-569501059?refcode=pm_em_211020_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjM3ZmI5Zi1hNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cpQA_-W_em47Yt4t5AS3BWTwrplnIXDWyM4ZxhC4XVw=)****

name: Team Greitens
subject: New Poll Shows MAGA Navy SEAL Eric Greitens Leading BIG in US Senate General Election After Dominating GOP Primary Field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| New Poll Shows MAGA Navy SEAL Eric Greitens Leading BIG in US Senate General Election After Dominating GOP Primary Field
---
| According to a newly released memo from President Trump's pollster [Fabrizio, Lee & Associates](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001XkmnwncaUI5kTEg_tdBvURFMorAjVpL_M2qqybHM33peJ072jXP_DhKYhYPOM7mrN5S4j0N7OVxAP9rXQJakkGNCBI4r-rO0xwh9dP-aWMV-t9nuPtZZPlYeHDkTkBvwcuiqyMMButPn6ugaSfWK6w==&c=-jsBBLLx6yuE8nrwhBY3rD2P65O60RE2cff2uB1SCH1BJoXmLmZYhw==&ch=KnMZskNabDpyOfhf3E3UuotbdYn-5xkSUnrqdnU5jOOJnWSgFZ4Swg==), Missourians clearly prefer Governor Eric Greitens over both a generic Democrat, as well as specific Democrats running for U.S. Senate in Missouri.
"Against a generic Democrat, 47% of likely voters in Missouri choose Eric Greitens, while only 41% choose the Democrat. Missourians are primed to support Governor Greitens over whoever the Democrats decide to run against him in the general election," reads the memo.
This follows poll numbers from last week that found that Governor Greitens holds a massive lead in the 2022 GOP primary for the US Senate-- a lead which increases when voters are told of his vow to vote against reelecting Mitch McConnell as Republican leader.
In that memo, Fabrizio, Lee & Associates writes, "Greitens holds a very healthy lead over his competitors, receiving more than double the vote of his closest challenger. Greitens' 36%, in a crowded field, will be extremely difficult to surpass with only 25% undecided."
According to FEC filings, Governor Greitens outraised the entire GOP primary field for the third quarter, raising a total of $679,719.03.

Friend, I'll cut straight to the chase: our House candidates' final fundraising deadline of this campaign is tomorrow at midnight, and I need your help. We **__must__** protect our slim Democratic majority in the House of Delegates and secure another statewide sweep if we're going to cement the progress we've made over the past four years. If our voters turn out on November 2, we will win. It's that simple. But this campaign is going to come down to the wire. **[Please contribute as generously as you can before our final deadline Thursday at midnight so we can keep Virginia blue!](https://act.myngp.com/el/q99U5ZCvhLR9hRAKIKM5_TgH8TrmLWwhQWy7gepyMP4=/R2Zlx6eLU0k9lVqLT1uIDPK36t7Ih9kjSV2B1_QJGaA=)** I can't do this without you. \- Ralph Northam

subject: Our final filing deadline is tomorrow, and we’re blowing it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
How are we letting this guy win?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37719007/312374709/-2023814932?refcode=20211020.3_TM_10FE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjc1OGRlZS1hYjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ez2qul6souao9Ugb-PR0uQe-E8vTkhkXr3mY45OT0uw=)

| | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 — **recent polling shows that it's a statistical TIE, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year.** My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. [**The final filing deadline of this campaign is coming up TOMORROW at midnight, and we can’t afford to slow down. clean_body: How are we letting this guy win? | | | = | | Right now, I’m in the most competitive race of 2021 — recent polling shows that it's a statistical TIE, and it’s Donald Trump and the Republican party’s best shot at picking up a big win this year. My Trump-endorsed opponent, Glenn Youngkin, has promised to spend $75 million of his own fortune on buying the Governor’s office. Youngkin’s a GOP extremist — he was caught on video pledging to defund Planned Parenthood. He opposes Medicaid expansion, is anti-LGBTQ+, anti-woman, and pro-guns. His political mentor is Ted Cruz, and he’s been endorsed by Donald Trump SIX times. So you can imagine how confused I am about why people aren’t stepping up and donating. We’re blowing this one, Derek. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** I just don’t get how we’re letting Youngkin roll over us and outspend us. People are acting like this is a sure thing — that Virginia is a blue state. Let me tell you: it isn’t. People need to start stepping it up. This is a must-win race, and we’ve got to stand up to this guy. – Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37721410/312386549/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWYwNDVjYy1iMTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=99yXdqDj42DvsshiaEDGFLhkhCTMpvBKZnwz8FDKYQQ=)
Friends — Recent polling is showing Democrats in close races in multiple battleground states! This is troubling because our Senate majority hinges on just one seat, so we can't afford to lose any ground. We need to keep up our fundraising efforts if we want to be able to defend our Senate majority. James Carville reached out on Monday because he knows how important this is too. **And if we want to hit our October fundraising goal we need to raise $3,382 every day for the rest of this month.** It’s a tall task, but we know if we all come together and pitch in what we can, when we can, we’ll be able to hit this goal and support our candidates running all over the country. [_**So what do you say********? Will you pitch in $10 right now to keep the Senate out of Mitch McConnell’s hands? clean_body: | = Friends — Recent polling is showing Democrats in close races in multiple battleground states! This is troubling because our Senate majority hinges on just one seat, so we can't afford to lose any ground. We need to keep up our fundraising efforts if we want to be able to defend our Senate majority. James Carville reached out on Monday because he knows how important this is too. And if we want to hit our October fundraising goal we need to raise $3,382 every day for the rest of this month. It’s a tall task, but we know if we all come together and pitch in what we can, when we can, we’ll be able to hit this goal and support our candidates running all over the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for all you do to support Senate Democrats, Defend the Senate Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Virginia might flip. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGMCHPBgongOJ-VE1IjZ1pludMpaEhAyZ3HItPqhoccw1I_UqkISeTaI_tuXSRbCHbeVwsM1CM_-7oxmYbaaMvA2lvRd8HqT97TXI4Y0U6tnz7z9LLldCO8Y4thGpzGsUMUyvys9dJ4Q815aOc0h7uQsHlEYWYREzLrUF23yZdyHXpJBqhBFLJ9Ca9uW4Oke3SRBNOuPkiK5r50XgOoE8ZcBVdeFAEKnt3nSVr5_khpPyOE-zkNoswchcR6UaXcxWTMhgPslfzNvvO-ZUB0kJ2MnxNtg7spUnsqDq4kFGCgl4AjDXhvwS6vfx_z3zTIiLiQ/3gb/9w-eppV-Q3qnlvi-2F4o-g/h0/7SE_5PosNne2AZddgg44W236wOUGt5_YKp4q9oKr1sI)
Derek, we can’t believe this is happening. Trumpism is headed for a comeback in Virginia. Right now, Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for Governor of Virginia, Glenn Youngkin, is **_LEADING_** in some polls. Not only that, but national Republicans are pouring money into Virginia to **_out-organize_** Democrats, and **_Republican enthusiasm is at an all time HIGH._**

What’s happening?!

Democrats in Virginia aren’t waking up to how close this election is going to be. If things continue to go the way they’re going right now, Trumpism is going to sweep across Virginia, and we can kiss blue Virginia goodbye.

**[We’ve got our final filing deadline of the campaign coming up _tomorrow_ , and with Democratic enthusiasm as low as it is, we don’t know if we’ll hit our goal. name: Nikki Fried
subject: This isn’t who we are
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Many school board members have been downright heroic during the COVID-19 pandemic. Even as Governor DeSantis has defunded school districts for implementing mask requirements, they’ve held strong in the fight to keep our children safe.

We owe them all a debt of gratitude—especially given the threats and attacks they’ve faced.

This is happening in communities across Florida and across the country, and it’s grown so worrisome that the FBI is now investigating these threats.

What’s Ron DeSantis done? Nothing. He even criticized the Department of Justice for trying to keep public officials safe from threats and violence.

I’ve lived in Florida my entire life. friends, this isn’t who we are. We’ve always been a state that comes together in times of crisis. We’ve always been grateful for public servants who try to keep us safe in challenging times.

Now, politicians like Ron DeSantis are stoking division for political gain. It’s unconscionable, but DeSantis cares a lot more about delivering headlines for Fox News than delivering results for Floridians.

We’re better than this, and Floridians deserve better than this.

I’m running for governor to break the system that enables failed leaders like DeSantis. It won’t be easy, but I know we can do this. I know we can bring Florida together, put an end to hate and violence, and try something new.

I hope I can count on your support. If you’re behind our vision, click here to chip in whatever you can spare to help us stop DeSantis and build a better Florida. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=1020nf]

With Gratitude,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Joan Greene
subject: It’s not a stepping stone for me.
body:
So yesterday, I shared why I am running for Phoenix City Council and I talked about what I’ve been hearing from people in the community so far

| | | | |
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29tJTJG&sig=Dscx9LWWpwPpvaM8vVqrqoKjXA7df2Far3WgPxmiiwwh&iat=1634747733&a=%7C%7C66715302%7C%7C&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=223A234A1A2437)
---
| |
Hi,
So yesterday, I shared why I am running for Phoenix City Council and I talked about what I’ve been hearing from people in the community so far.

My thoughts about today’s final question is from the heart. I believe when we lead with compassion, the rest will fall into place. Talking with District 6, you agree.

So, to continue where we left off yesterday...

**Is there anything not covered in the first four questions that you would like the readers to know about you and your candidacy to the City Council?**
_"City Council is not a stepping stone to a future political position or job. I am focused and passionate about representing the District I grew up and live in.___
__
_My father was one of the original developers of Munds Park and I spent my high school summers working there. I experienced first-hand how a community is built and comes together.___
__
_We need more people in elected office who are compassionate. I spent my adult life working to help non-profits and volunteering. I know how important it is to extend a hand to those in need. The hand we extend today may be what the person needs to walk a path to a bright future.___
__
_I am an animal rescue advocate and will make sure our public lands and animals are protected. I am also working with Jagger, my golden retriever, to be certified as a therapy dog to bring comfort to those in hospice.___
__
_Phoenix will be stronger when we work together with our sister cities. For example, Mesa is the ‘World’s First Autism Certified City’. I have already started discussing with Mesa their blueprint to success and I would like Phoenix to work towards becoming an Autism Certified City.___
__
_I will work with the Parks Department and have the proper playground equipment installed so_ _children, adults and families of all abilities can play together. Inviting partnerships with private companies to sponsor the equipment or a destination park is a way to include our business community.___
__
_I am running for Phoenix City Council for community interest and not self-interest. There are so many opportunities to make a difference for our families and businesses and we can do it together.___
__
_I look forward to rolling up my sleeves and getting to work as your Councilwoman. It is our community and our future."
_
_P.S. If you’re reading this now, you may have already contributed to my campaign.___
__
_It’s ok if you have and also ok if you haven’t - but either way, I’m going to ask you to consider the following:

Having heard my story over the past 3 days, could you see me representing you as your Councilwoman?__
If so, I’d love to hear from you, and here are 3 ways you can help RIGHT NOW:

[ 1\. Pledge To Contribute Time: Volunteer for My Campaign](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZkb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20lMkZmb3JtcyUyRmQlMkZlJTJGMUZBSXBRTFNkTkI1bEwzQzNzSklBRUdUYy1oTUtzazhvMEZxWU1hbzFwR29qUmZqRHpXLURTQkElMkZ2aWV3Zm9ybQ==&sig=4VHYR6F2b3sCtLvPyYWrepSCRiC5nBURX4sxS9UhAgGK&iat=1634747733&a=%7C%7C66715302%7C%7C&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=223A234A1A2445)_ __
[ 2\. Pledge Or Contribute Money:](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZzZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20lMkZkb25hdGUlMkZqb2FuLWdyZWVuZS1mb3ItcGhvZW5peC1jaXR5LWNvdW5jaWwtMQ==&sig=3SXwQhkbmfFvFu1gJVND5o9JX9G82BPbvDAwx9nVGeT5&iat=1634747733&a=%7C%7C66715302%7C%7C&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=223A234A1A2446) If you don’t have the time, but you can support financially, then I invite you to help in this way.

3\. And/or reply back on this email and let me know with a simple "I’m In" & I’ll know to continue sending you more messages like this one.

The campaign for Phoenix City Council is going to be hotly contested and I need all of the early support I can get. __
Sincerely,

Joan Greene

Joan Greene For Phoenix City Council, 4802 East Ray Road , Suite 23-134, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States
clean_body: So yesterday, I shared why I am running for Phoenix City Council and I talked about what I’ve been hearing from people in the community so far | | | | | | | | | Hi, So yesterday, I shared why I am running for Phoenix City Council and I talked about what I’ve been hearing from people in the community so far. My thoughts about today’s final question is from the heart. I believe when we lead with compassion, the rest will fall into place. Talking with District 6, you agree. So, to continue where we left off yesterday... Is there anything not covered in the first four questions that you would like the readers to know about you and your candidacy to the City Council? "City Council is not a stepping stone to a future political position or job. I am focused and passionate about representing the District I grew up and live in. My father was one of the original developers of Munds Park and I spent my high school summers working there. I experienced first-hand how a community is built and comes together. We need more people in elected office who are compassionate. I spent my adult life working to help non-profits and volunteering. I know how important it is to extend a hand to those in need. The hand we extend today may be what the person needs to walk a path to a bright future. I am an animal rescue advocate and will make sure our public lands and animals are protected. I am also working with Jagger, my golden retriever, to be certified as a therapy dog to bring comfort to those in hospice. Phoenix will be stronger when we work together with our sister cities. For example, Mesa is the ‘World’s First Autism Certified City’. I have already started discussing with Mesa their blueprint to success and I would like Phoenix to work towards becoming an Autism Certified City. I will work with the Parks Department and have the proper playground equipment installed so children, adults and families of all abilities can play together. Inviting partnerships with private companies to sponsor the equipment or a destination park is a way to include our business community. I am running for Phoenix City Council for community interest and not self-interest. There are so many opportunities to make a difference for our families and businesses and we can do it together. I look forward to rolling up my sleeves and getting to work as your Councilwoman. It is our community and our future." P.S. If you’re reading this now, you may have already contributed to my campaign. It’s ok if you have and also ok if you haven’t - but either way, I’m going to ask you to consider the following: Having heard my story over the past 3 days, could you see me representing you as your Councilwoman? If so, I’d love to hear from you, and here are 3 ways you can help RIGHT NOW: If you don’t have the time, but you can support financially, then I invite you to help in this way. 3\. And/or reply back on this email and let me know with a simple "I’m In" & I’ll know to continue sending you more messages like this one. The campaign for Phoenix City Council is going to be hotly contested and I need all of the early support I can get. __ Sincerely, Joan Greene | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Joan Greene For Phoenix City Council, 4802 East Ray Road , Suite 23-134, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States

body:
The pandemic exposed serious flaws in Tennessee's public education system, but the truth is that those flaws have been present for a long, long time. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722094/312389442/-103157484?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211020education_TM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmJiMzkxMC1iNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U57IFN-rVwXxo_BVABUtcvqZ0s2i772PArxoro3owgA=)
---
One issue just keeps coming up in Dr. Martin’s conversations with voters, Peter:**Education.** According to a poll last month, 79% of Tennesseans are worried that schoolchildren fell far behind on math and reading during the COVID-19 pandemic. And the data backs that up, too: _less than 30% of Tennessee students_ tested on grade-level in English and math last spring. The pandemic exposed serious flaws in Tennessee's public education system, but the truth is that those flaws have been present for a long, long time. Dr. Martin is running to fix those flaws, but we need your help. We want to hear from you as we work towards solutions — _**[take our education survey and tell us what a strong public education would mean for you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722095/312389443/-117610974?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmJiMzkxMC1iNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U57IFN-rVwXxo_BVABUtcvqZ0s2i772PArxoro3owgA=&emci=f04b1b0a-b531-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6bbb3910-b531-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149)**_ | [Take the survey ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722096/312389444/-117610974?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmJiMzkxMC1iNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U57IFN-rVwXxo_BVABUtcvqZ0s2i772PArxoro3owgA=&emci=f04b1b0a-b531-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6bbb3910-b531-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149)

Instead of stepping up and providing students and teachers with the support they need during this pandemic, Gov. Bill Lee has trafficked in conspiracy theories, lies, and division.
**It’s time to put an end to that, and elect a leader who understands that, from cradle to career, we can thrive with improved education for all.**
That’s why education is at the center of Dr. Martin’s campaign, and why it will be a priority of this administration when we win.
[But before we can do that, we need to gather as many stories and solutions as we can from the people these policies will impact most. Take our survey now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722097/312389445/-117610974?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmJiMzkxMC1iNTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U57IFN-rVwXxo_BVABUtcvqZ0s2i772PArxoro3owgA=&emci=f04b1b0a-b531-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=6bbb3910-b531-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=9304149)

name: Team Franchot Digital
subject: Have you followed Peter Franchot on Facebook yet?
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
If you haven’t had a chance to follow Peter Franchot on Facebook yet, now is a great time to do so as our campaign continues to pick up speed ahead of 2022. Every week, Peter uses social media to reflect on the news, provide updates from the campaign trail, and share his bold vision for the future of Maryland with his followers.
2022 is right around the corner, and we want to make sure that you never miss an update! Click here to follow Peter Franchot’s Facebook page. [https://www.facebook.com/peterfranchot]
We’d love for you to join the discussions about the future we are building together. Our Facebook page has tens of thousands of followers from all over the state -- so make sure you aren’t missing out!
After you’ve followed Peter on Facebook, make sure your friends, family and neighbors don’t get left behind by asking them to follow it too. Peter Franchot is building an inclusive people-powered movement to change the way that government does business, and everyone's invited.
Click here to follow Peter Franchot on Facebook. Together, we’re going to build the critical mass of support needed to secure a better and stronger future for Maryland in 2022. [https://www.facebook.com/peterfranchot]
Stay Connected,
Team Franchot Digital
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em102021]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

| | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: **this is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats.** For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. And right now,**Youngkin winning is a real possibility.** Polls show a razor thin margin, we’re being outraised, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats. **That’s why we’ve launched a one-day goal** , Derek: we’ve got to make sure we’re doing everything we can because we won’t have much time to make up ground if we miss. [So right now, will you chip in $25 to the Democratic Party of Virginia? I need all hands on deck to reach tonight’s $15,000 goal and your donation, coupled with thousands of other donations from members of our grassroots army will get us there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722492/312392402/272180825?refcode=dpva-em-211020-tfvgoal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDhhYjM2NS1iNjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-im0uKauqgOr8DA7OTWk1XYOQtjAh3L4I06q8T3Hvk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Peter – I just finished reviewing the data from the first fundraising quarter of our campaign, and **I have huge news about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA).**
As one of my top grassroots supporters, I'm especially excited to share this with you, Peter: **After just over two months of campaigning, we've already raised more than $1 MILLION! **
But that's not all: **This quarter we officially out-raised seven-term incumbent Sen. Grassley!** Polling data already showed that 64% of voters don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley – now we're seeing that overwhelming energy in our fundraising numbers and building the kind of powerful campaign he's never faced before.
This is a true grassroots movement: that $1 million we raised came from nearly 16,000 grassroots donors who are 100% committed to defeating Sen. Grassley and protecting our Senate majority, **_and_ we received donations from all 99 counties in Iowa** – a truly impressive feat!
**It's clear as day: Iowans are ready for change, and they're ready to fight for it too.**
All of this is worth celebrating, and I'm so grateful to you and this entire grassroots team. But we've got to be realistic about what we're facing, which brings me to some bad news: The GOP Senate campaign arm has raised tens of millions of dollars and are now sitting on a war chest of more than $25 million with which to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley – because if we defeat him, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold Senate control.
**I fully intend on winning this race, but in order to compete with massive fundraising numbers from national Republicans, we've got to seize our momentum and build on the $1 million we just raised – $10, $20, $50 at a time. clean_body: | | | = Peter – I just finished reviewing the data from the first fundraising quarter of our campaign, and I have huge news about our race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA). As one of my top grassroots supporters, I'm especially excited to share this with you, Peter: After just over two months of campaigning, we've already raised more than $1 MILLION! But that's not all: This quarter we officially out-raised seven-term incumbent Sen. Grassley! Polling data already showed that 64% of voters don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley – now we're seeing that overwhelming energy in our fundraising numbers and building the kind of powerful campaign he's never faced before. This is a true grassroots movement: that $1 million we raised came from nearly 16,000 grassroots donors who are 100% committed to defeating Sen. Grassley and protecting our Senate majority, and we received donations from all 99 counties in Iowa – a truly impressive feat! It's clear as day: Iowans are ready for change, and they're ready to fight for it too. All of this is worth celebrating, and I'm so grateful to you and this entire grassroots team. But we've got to be realistic about what we're facing, which brings me to some bad news: The GOP Senate campaign arm has raised tens of millions of dollars and are now sitting on a war chest of more than $25 million with which to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley – because if we defeat him, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold Senate control. I fully intend on winning this race, but in order to compete with massive fundraising numbers from national Republicans, we've got to seize our momentum and build on the $1 million we just raised – $10, $20, $50 at a time. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for everything that you do for this campaign. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Derek, please sign my petition calling for robust investment in clean energy in the reconciliation bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
It’s time for bold investments in sustainable energy |
#
Derek, This month, we’ve seen the devastation caused by the fossil fuel industry with major oil spills in Texas and right here in southern California. That’s not to mention the increasing devastation caused by floods, wildfires, and drought. It’s clear, the time to act is now. Right now. Twelve years ago, Democrats controlled the White House and both chambers of Congress. But we failed to make major changes to address the climate crisis, which has only intensified in the decade since — a decade that saw us lose the House, the Senate, and the White House. It was a major failure. For a decade, we had to fight and claw our way back to finally gain the barest of Democratic majorities. We must not come up short again on climate this time around. We just can’t. We must save our planet before the worst effects of the climate crisis become too much to bear. This is an existential crisis that affects every community, every state, and every country on earth. With a Democratic president and majorities in both chambers of Congress for the first time in a decade, we have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to invest in clean, renewable energy and reassert American leadership on the global stage. [**Add your name to my petition demanding the Senate include major investments in clean energy in the Build Back Better Act. We may not have another opportunity to act on climate before the midterms. The time to act is now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722750/312394285/-594208038?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg1ZWJlMi1iNjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLb2-Dvtr4XL5J4ZXapZDGUILtrjnTQlWE7Ag_DKAJs=&emci=dd85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=df85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722751/312394286/-594208038?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg1ZWJlMi1iNjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLb2-Dvtr4XL5J4ZXapZDGUILtrjnTQlWE7Ag_DKAJs=&emci=dd85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=df85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)
---
Every day we fail to take action on climate change brings us another day closer to an irreversible climate catastrophe. Indeed, we may already be there. We need to make bold investments in sustainable energy to save our environment for our children and grandchildren.
The reconciliation process is a rare opportunity to do just that. Right now, Democrats in Congress are in a unique position to take action on climate without obstruction from Mitch McConnell. We just need to have the political will to do the right thing.
[**If you agree it’s time for swift and aggressive action on climate change, please add your name to my petition calling for its inclusion in the _Build Back Better Act_ now. It will only take a minute. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722752/312394287/-594208038?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg1ZWJlMi1iNjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLb2-Dvtr4XL5J4ZXapZDGUILtrjnTQlWE7Ag_DKAJs=&emci=dd85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=df85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37722753/312394291/-594208038?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20211020_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjg1ZWJlMi1iNjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MLb2-Dvtr4XL5J4ZXapZDGUILtrjnTQlWE7Ag_DKAJs=&emci=dd85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=df85ebe2-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=33917617)

Thanks for taking action on this important issue. I appreciate your voice.
— Adam

subject: Thank You for Your Support & Upcoming Volunteer and Small Business Opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards
body:

| October 2021 Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---

Friends,
This Fall 2021 season has been a time of transition and change for me. I appreciate all of your well wishes and support through it all. Your kindness and support have meant so much more than you may know. I am so grateful to all of you! Please check out some of the work we have done and continue to do!
---
|
---
---
| | | THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT OF THE EMPOWERED YOU: TEXAS SENIOR CITIZENS CONFERENCE!
On October 14th, Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization hosted (via tele-townhall and zoom) The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference. This free virtual event was sponsored by AARP, and served as a one-stop shop where seniors could access information and engagement that equipped them with the tools to thrive in this season of their lives. We would like to thank our fantastic speakers: Dr. Ugo Ihekweazu and Shayla Bryant, and inspirational speakers including: Rawle Andrews (President-Elect, Bar Association of D.C.), DeEtte Sauer (Champion Swimmer). We also thank Bourbon Street for the live music, the Houston Parks & Rec. Dept for the line dancing classes, The Alzheimer's Association, and Lucille's 1913 for the delicious meals. We would like to express our gratitude to all of our volunteers (included the UPS volunteer team), supporters, participants, and vendors that partnered with us to make this year's event such a great success! After the conference, our seniors felt empowered and ready to "be the solution" no matter what challenges they face!
In light of my mother's recent passing and her love for the conference, we dedicated this year's conference to my mother, Isabella Dorian Edwards.
Check out some of the fun photos and videos from The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference:
---
| |

---
| |
---
| | |
---
Check out this Fox26 interview about our senior conference and the impact on seniors of the Social Security increase.
---

UPCOMING EVENTS
---
CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS TO REBUILD MR. BROWN'S HOME
---
Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85 year old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home.
We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uQxvLQ3afDklVYaqkYU8ATWQjLnCXfhQEMNOZaU96YGLLtGKN1shgh3Zd-isl7syFyN7PeZaC6zrmKM0tQClZO5bTxrsPHZ4zfS2HJpJm6zS8smoJ5Hbofe5-WbNddcmxyTAPrud1vFCyu8--mRzDutospb4FuGXidWWWT_ru0pFJRL1cYP-Mw5WRxKDJlctdMdsB8NYcoE=&c=m6k5qJiS4eaFeKqUdaVKbh0pTw6o_aeOXB7VM1RjfStuxRhyBJFSYg==&ch=tgH0rU496-TsYzSsIREskJqDjt0HvYMSE0TreAF8G5qTSE822pJsFg==) to volunteer! Starting Monday, November 1st, we need volunteers for a few weeks to assist with rebuilding Mr. Brown's home on Mondays through Saturdays. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today using this [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uQxvLQ3afDklVYaqkYU8ATWQjLnCXfhQEMNOZaU96YGLLtGKN1shgh3Zd-isl7syFyN7PeZaC6zrmKM0tQClZO5bTxrsPHZ4zfS2HJpJm6zS8smoJ5Hbofe5-WbNddcmxyTAPrud1vFCyu8--mRzDutospb4FuGXidWWWT_ru0pFJRL1cYP-Mw5WRxKDJlctdMdsB8NYcoE=&c=m6k5qJiS4eaFeKqUdaVKbh0pTw6o_aeOXB7VM1RjfStuxRhyBJFSYg==&ch=tgH0rU496-TsYzSsIREskJqDjt0HvYMSE0TreAF8G5qTSE822pJsFg==).

---
On August 26th, we launched the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to help reduce barriers faced by women and minority owned businesses seeking to access capital and to scale their businesses. With our launch event, we discussed our [report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uQxvLQ3afDklVYaqkYU8ATWQjLnCXfhQEMNOZaU96YGLLtGKN1shgh3Zd-isl7sytRdI-2O0b1eZrCvVxTkiCAMP0GrBSW1r_Z4h2dzfLx2wtVfr7J6SYl6RPmik0Vx86dnkw30ag8w5C1TM-XKplhk6uc-hfoXUqGgMU_uoyNMvL7DVO46-kpqX_qKiSUXmncAACxnaf1p4oC3Ct6j7FaeW1OMzJMp_ndBT1tVq805XIDMy3Ghx8w==&c=m6k5qJiS4eaFeKqUdaVKbh0pTw6o_aeOXB7VM1RjfStuxRhyBJFSYg==&ch=tgH0rU496-TsYzSsIREskJqDjt0HvYMSE0TreAF8G5qTSE822pJsFg==), featured our partnership with Texas Capital Bank, and discussed ways to get involved in BEAMW.
In an effort to reduce barriers many women and minority businesses face in accessing networks that may assist with facilitating more access to capital, BEAMW will be launching a series of networking forums with banking institutions, small business owners, collaborators, chambers of commerce and business support organizations. Please join us on Tuesday, November 9th for the BEAMW Launch Networking Event co-hosted by: Texas Capital Bank, Impact HUB Houston, The Greater Houston Black Chamber, East End Chamber of Commerce, TruFund, Houston Minority Supplier Development Council, Houston Community College, Black Business Lab, The National Association of Minority Contractors - Greater Houston Chapter, and Supporting Our Success - S.O.S. To register for the event, please [click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uQxvLQ3afDklVYaqkYU8ATWQjLnCXfhQEMNOZaU96YGLLtGKN1shgh3Zd-isl7sy_lcFVodpa1bCGhsIHgegybTcU4ggnOrpCI_iq2Uyog2-yRq-WU1WVCdGXP5C9d6k2U-eXLwgkw9TCEQZlvqmH_QXTdA7aj5rrYewC4iIIQxON_hWxBHQfcbs4LZgGJuz&c=m6k5qJiS4eaFeKqUdaVKbh0pTw6o_aeOXB7VM1RjfStuxRhyBJFSYg==&ch=tgH0rU496-TsYzSsIREskJqDjt0HvYMSE0TreAF8G5qTSE822pJsFg==). With this event, we intend to help small business owners make key connections in an ecosystem focused on breaking down silos and removing obstacles that impact women and minority owned businesses.

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | October 2021 Update | | | | | Friends, This Fall 2021 season has been a time of transition and change for me. I appreciate all of your well wishes and support through it all. Your kindness and support have meant so much more than you may know. I am so grateful to all of you! Please check out some of the work we have done and continue to do! | | | | THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT OF THE EMPOWERED YOU: TEXAS SENIOR CITIZENS CONFERENCE! On October 14th, Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization hosted (via tele-townhall and zoom) The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference. This free virtual event was sponsored by AARP, and served as a one-stop shop where seniors could access information and engagement that equipped them with the tools to thrive in this season of their lives. We would like to thank our fantastic speakers: Dr. Ugo Ihekweazu and Shayla Bryant, and inspirational speakers including: Rawle Andrews (President-Elect, Bar Association of D.C.), DeEtte Sauer (Champion Swimmer). We also thank Bourbon Street for the live music, the Houston Parks & Rec. Dept for the line dancing classes, The Alzheimer's Association, and Lucille's 1913 for the delicious meals. We would like to express our gratitude to all of our volunteers (included the UPS volunteer team), supporters, participants, and vendors that partnered with us to make this year's event such a great success! After the conference, our seniors felt empowered and ready to "be the solution" no matter what challenges they face! In light of my mother's recent passing and her love for the conference, we dedicated this year's conference to my mother, Isabella Dorian Edwards. Check out some of the fun photos and videos from The Empowered You: Texas Senior Citizens Conference: | | | | | | | Check out this Fox26 interview about our senior conference and the impact on seniors of the Social Security increase. == | UPCOMING EVENTS CALL FOR VOLUNTEERS TO REBUILD MR. BROWN'S HOME Four years after sustaining damage caused by Harvey, the devastation remaining in 85 year old Mr. Brown is heartbreaking. I came to know of Mr. Brown because of his plumbing needs stemming from the Texas Winter Storm (Uri) & power outages. His neighbors reached out to me about Mr. Brown because of the work Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization was doing for seniors. In partnership with another non-profit partner (West Street Recovery), we sent plumbers out to help him, but the plumbers alerted me to outrageous circumstances Mr. Brown faced in his home. We have since removed Mr. Brown from the home, but are excited to announce that Be The Solution: Community Empowerment Organization is teaming up with SBP USA to assist with repairing/rebuilding Mr. Brown's home so that he may return to a safe, decent home! We need volunteers to sign up to assist with the repairs. Please sign up using this == to volunteer! Starting Monday, November 1st, we need volunteers for a few weeks to assist with rebuilding Mr. Brown's home on Mondays through Saturdays. We are grateful to Melissa Correa & KHOU for highlighting Mr. Brown's journey. To learn more about Mr. Brown's story, click the image below. Please sign up to help today using this ==. == Mr. Brown has been waiting for four years to repair his home from Hurricane Harvey's damage. Watch Mr. Brown's story. Volunteer to help! | == On August 26th, we launched the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to help reduce barriers faced by women and minority owned businesses seeking to access capital and to scale their businesses. With our launch event, we discussed our ==, featured our partnership with Texas Capital Bank, and discussed ways to get involved in BEAMW. In an effort to reduce barriers many women and minority businesses face in accessing networks that may assist with facilitating more access to capital, BEAMW will be launching a series of networking forums with banking institutions, small business owners, collaborators, chambers of commerce and business support organizations. Please join us on Tuesday, November 9th for the BEAMW Launch Networking Event co-hosted by: Texas Capital Bank, Impact HUB Houston, The Greater Houston Black Chamber, East End Chamber of Commerce, TruFund, Houston Minority Supplier Development Council, Houston Community College, Black Business Lab, The National Association of Minority Contractors - Greater Houston Chapter, and Supporting Our Success - S.O.S. To register for the event, please ==. With this event, we intend to help small business owners make key connections in an ecosystem focused on breaking down silos and removing obstacles that impact women and minority owned businesses. == | | | Sincerely, Amanda K Edwards | | | | | | | For More Updates, Follow my Social Media by Clicking on the Links Here | == == == == == | == Paid for by Amanda Edwards | | Amanda Edwards | PO Box 88228, Houston, TX 77288 | | Sent by mailto:akedwards00@yahoo.com
