name: Pro Life Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf0cf8e555qskj8qoi8i03qn14rn05nu3c3rl1o0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctgm4p72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z95vjkgh00lpmep4p127poo0a448vcc3gjk7fvb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctgm4p72clh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg674em5qkck9g6m6r5t45ej8g92m9nqmnt593sg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctgm4p72clh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

|

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zl1a81phggb50rnu9181thpfadbi2f6sg4u9jh08).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z72o4dea3mdvqhi568t448dlgn38prqjb23cgr2g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5jm2oj4s9im49fg)

friend – in a minute, we're going to ask you to chip in $5 towards Maggie Hassan's campaign. But first, let us explain how your donation will help us win in 2022.
Maggie won her last race, beating a far-right GOP incumbent and flipping this seat by 1,017 votes – one of the closest Senate races in history. **With the Senate majority riding on this seat and Mitch McConnell already spending BIG to flip the majority, we’re in for another close race.**
That's why we're starting earlier than ever to protect this seat by investing in on-the-ground organizing, ensuring that every Granite Stater has a voice in the election. If we're going to hold this seat in 2022, we need to organize everywhere and win every vote we can.
**[Small donations from supporters like you make the greatest impact in a race this competitive. So we're asking for your help: will you chip in $5 to help us raise what we need to win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37723932/312399420/-214106137?refcode=e20211020_oct-donorstatus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGY2ZjZlOS1iODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwrEhsXHQYhOJwcpUpvXGJ_lWXFFALycEWiQMbHkc8c=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37723933/312399421/-214106137?refcode=e20211020_oct-donorstatus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGY2ZjZlOS1iODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwrEhsXHQYhOJwcpUpvXGJ_lWXFFALycEWiQMbHkc8c=)
---
[Contribute $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37723934/312399422/-214106137?refcode=e20211020_oct-donorstatus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGY2ZjZlOS1iODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwrEhsXHQYhOJwcpUpvXGJ_lWXFFALycEWiQMbHkc8c=)
[Contribute $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37723935/312399423/-214106137?refcode=e20211020_oct-donorstatus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGY2ZjZlOS1iODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwrEhsXHQYhOJwcpUpvXGJ_lWXFFALycEWiQMbHkc8c=)
[Another amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37723936/312399424/-214106137?refcode=e20211020_oct-donorstatus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGY2ZjZlOS1iODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwrEhsXHQYhOJwcpUpvXGJ_lWXFFALycEWiQMbHkc8c=)
Close races like ours depend on getting on the ground early and talking to every voter we can. With your help, we can invest in TV and digital ads, targeted mail, and on-the-ground organizers to share Maggie's accomplishments and combat misinformation.
**[So please, chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help us build a strong campaign and keep New Hampshire and our Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37723937/312399425/-214106137?refcode=e20211020_oct-donorstatus&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGY2ZjZlOS1iODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwrEhsXHQYhOJwcpUpvXGJ_lWXFFALycEWiQMbHkc8c=)**
Thank you in advance!
– Team Maggie
P.S. If you’ve already contributed to our campaign, thank you! Our records can take a few days to update -- we appreciate your support.

subject: My faith doesn't condone this

My opponent Madison Cawthorn recently released an ad mobilizing his far-right base around promoting “Christian values.”

_I'm actually a pastor and my faith informs me that we care for the poor and heal the sick._

But instead, Cawthorn promotes a gross agenda to slash funding for our vital social safety nets and healthcare.

name: Ras Smith
subject: Keeping you in the loop, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Kim Reynolds is pandering to Trump's far-right base while misleading voters about Iowa's budget surplus. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37724925/312403840/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWE1ZWE0YS1iZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g4qrA-_-PQmnYIMyIcOjSmPYChWRrM3YtoWUucNuE-I=)
Friend,

I want to share a few critical updates in our race. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop: **• I'm running against far-right Governor Kim Reynolds.** Earlier this month, she joined Trump onstage at his MAGA rally in Iowa. She was perfectly fine standing by Trump's side, but she's been mostly silent on the John Deere strike.

**• Trump and his far-right donors are rewarding her for her loyalty, handsomely.** She announced she's raising millions of dollars and they're clearly giving her a boost.

**• That's because she's pandering to the far-right while misleading voters about Iowa's budget surplus.** She's denying it was President Biden and Democrats in Congress who are making sure Iowa has the funds we need to get out of the COVID-19 pandemic.

**• In response, we're ramping up our grassroots field efforts.** We're visiting every part of the state to correct Reynolds' record. We're reminding Iowans that she rejected hundreds of millions of funds for our public schools, pandemic precautions, and much more.

**• In order to fund our campaign, we need to hit our $7,000 online fundraising goal for the month of October. We're still $4,061 short.** If ten people chip in just $30, we'd hit our daily goal in an instant. [**Friend, can you chip in $30 or whatever you can before midnight tonight to close the gap? clean_body: Kim Reynolds is pandering to Trump's far-right base while misleading voters about Iowa's budget surplus. | = Friend, I want to share a few critical updates in our race. It's important to me that you're kept in the loop: • I'm running against far-right Governor Kim Reynolds. Earlier this month, she joined Trump onstage at his MAGA rally in Iowa. She was perfectly fine standing by Trump's side, but she's been mostly silent on the John Deere strike. • Trump and his far-right donors are rewarding her for her loyalty, handsomely. She announced she's raising millions of dollars and they're clearly giving her a boost. • That's because she's pandering to the far-right while misleading voters about Iowa's budget surplus. She's denying it was President Biden and Democrats in Congress who are making sure Iowa has the funds we need to get out of the COVID-19 pandemic. • In response, we're ramping up our grassroots field efforts. We're visiting every part of the state to correct Reynolds' record. We're reminding Iowans that she rejected hundreds of millions of funds for our public schools, pandemic precautions, and much more. • In order to fund our campaign, we need to hit our $7,000 online fundraising goal for the month of October. We're still $4,061 short. If ten people chip in just $30, we'd hit our daily goal in an instant. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = As we witnessed this past week -- too much is at stake for Iowa's working families, small businesses, and farmers to let up now. We can do this, but I need you to let me know you're with me. = Thanks in advance, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Friend, **Today, the U.S. Senate is taking up a vote to advance the Freedom to Vote Act** , legislation that is crucial to strengthening our democracy and better protecting our right to vote. **[Add your name to support it here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37724992/312404318/502160034?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211020voting_bfm_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjAxYjZkZS1iZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnCDSfhC5w7w886SjtPY4zUYufdWBn_311e1XtpU784=&emci=4806add8-bd31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0b01b6de-bd31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)** This bill would make Election Day a federal holiday, establish same-day voter registration in every state, create standards for mail-in voting, and ban partisan gerrymandering. And it couldn’t come a moment too soon. Right now, Republicans across the country — including right here in Montana — are continuing to push the Big Lie around the 2020 election results, which we know fueled the violent insurrection against the U.S. Capitol last January. Earlier this spring, Montana’s Republican-controlled legislature passed a voting restrictions bill that bans ballot collection measures and makes it harder for students, the elderly, folks with disabilities, and Native Americans to vote — a bill that Laurie strongly opposed. **Montana’s GOP are now claiming that “voter fraud” and “election insecurity” are to blame for Donald Trump losing the 2020 presidential election. Just last week, they requested a special panel to investigate it.** We need action at the federal level to stop these baseless conspiracy theories and attacks on voting rights, and to defend our democracy. **[Join Laurie in calling on Senator Steve Daines to put partisan politics aside and vote for the Freedom to Vote Act today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37724993/312404319/502160034?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211020voting_bfm_active_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjAxYjZkZS1iZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnCDSfhC5w7w886SjtPY4zUYufdWBn_311e1XtpU784=&emci=4806add8-bd31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0b01b6de-bd31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37724994/312404320/502160034?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211020voting_bfm_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjAxYjZkZS1iZDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KnCDSfhC5w7w886SjtPY4zUYufdWBn_311e1XtpU784=&emci=4806add8-bd31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0b01b6de-bd31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=13640636)

Together, we can rise up against the lies and voter suppression, and defend our right to free and fair elections.
— Team Bishop

body:
Will you join us today?
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x8mtezSmVd3WggWUvQ_xU8OJW8n1a9Pi9VGnsRsRrwQpW1X9xZwYEiVqNj3FUB4-zntsK_2uEY4yiBE-IvHPOal0yzSFNz9HhUQaJlaTdUY53dVm5a_Z6jEPzDoGNqWg8Mg_7e0dKSWDQgLx7ilW76cOBpeG1L-I_RV-NdxPp3urpbmWe7Qh4aT5OPDvB82r0qIfeaEg15MjUYlLlTjZmA==&c=-Y4xTrqnBj275P9xzDl3pnA7owA9MaY0P4hLYvS8-x1UvlO_Lxhbdg==&ch=AUCQohnPYxL9h2a0IF2NKGnfQ83tIhgsVC_wd42X6_Zv4s18K_hH6Q==)
---

| Dear Friend,
---
| The momentum in this campaign is on our side. As we wrapped up the third quarter of 2020 we wanted to share some important updates with our strongest supporters - YOU!
In just 5 months we have:
* Earned the endorsement of the Washington State Republican Party, the Party's first primary endorsement of any statewide candidate in over two decades;
* Earned the endorsement of Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers (R-WA);
* Earned the endorsement of more than a dozen individual members of the Washington state legislature;
* Held a campaign event in each of Washington State's 39 counties; and
* Raised over $1.6 million from more than 10,000 individual donors!

And last month, half a dozen members of the U.S. Senate, including NRSC Chairman, Rick Scott, hosted an overflow reception for Tiffany because they know this is a race we can win! We also wanted to share our latest Smiley Report with you. Please take a minute to watch:
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x8mtezSmVd3WggWUvQ_xU8OJW8n1a9Pi9VGnsRsRrwQpW1X9xZwYEiVqNj3FUB4-zntsK_2uEY4yiBE-IvHPOal0yzSFNz9HhUQaJlaTdUY53dVm5a_Z6jEPzDoGNqWg8Mg_7e0dKSWDQgLx7ilW76cOBpeG1L-I_RV-NdxPp3urpbmWe7Qh4aT5OPDvB82r0qIfeaEg15MjUYlLlTjZmA==&c=-Y4xTrqnBj275P9xzDl3pnA7owA9MaY0P4hLYvS8-x1UvlO_Lxhbdg==&ch=AUCQohnPYxL9h2a0IF2NKGnfQ83tIhgsVC_wd42X6_Zv4s18K_hH6Q==)
---
| Washingtonians are fed up with the failed leadership of Patty Murray. Thirty years of broken promises is far too long.
The thousands of hard working people we've met all across Washington State are eager for fresh faces and new ideas.
[Will you join Team Smiley today by donating $20, $50, $100, $250 or any amount today? ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x8mtezSmVd3WggWUvQ_xU8OJW8n1a9Pi9VGnsRsRrwQpW1X9xZwYEiVqNj3FUB4-zntsK_2uEY4yiBE-IvHPOal0yzSFNz9HhUQaJlaTdUY53dVm5a_Z6jEPzDoGNqWg8Mg_7e0dKSWDQgLx7ilW76cOBpeG1L-I_RV-NdxPp3urpbmWe7Qh4aT5OPDvB82r0qIfeaEg15MjUYlLlTjZmA==&c=-Y4xTrqnBj275P9xzDl3pnA7owA9MaY0P4hLYvS8-x1UvlO_Lxhbdg==&ch=AUCQohnPYxL9h2a0IF2NKGnfQ83tIhgsVC_wd42X6_Zv4s18K_hH6Q==)
Let's keep the momentum going and show Patty Murray that her time in DC is coming to an end. Together, we are going to win this race and turn our country around. Our best days still lie ahead.
---
| | | [STAND WITH TEAM SMILEY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x8mtezSmVd3WggWUvQ_xU8OJW8n1a9Pi9VGnsRsRrwQpW1X9xZwYEiVqNj3FUB4-zntsK_2uEY4yiBE-IvHPOal0yzSFNz9HhUQaJlaTdUY53dVm5a_Z6jEPzDoGNqWg8Mg_7e0dKSWDQgLx7ilW76cOBpeG1L-I_RV-NdxPp3urpbmWe7Qh4aT5OPDvB82r0qIfeaEg15MjUYlLlTjZmA==&c=-Y4xTrqnBj275P9xzDl3pnA7owA9MaY0P4hLYvS8-x1UvlO_Lxhbdg==&ch=AUCQohnPYxL9h2a0IF2NKGnfQ83tIhgsVC_wd42X6_Zv4s18K_hH6Q==)

body:
A quick poll on redistricting. | **_[We need 5 supporters in 18326 to take John Cranley’s poll on Ohio’s redistricting process before midnight. Click here to take the poll>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37726213/312410857/1746246521?refcode=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU5ZDBlNC1iZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOlTeksWcMOPLNVwgUGVTiBc1VDZ_8YlbIwYv7nRBEA=&emci=16d7991f-1b31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)_** Friend — In last year’s presidential election in Ohio, **just over 53%** of the vote — a slim majority — went to the Republican ticket. By just looking at that number, you might assume that only a little over half of our legislative districts would vote for the Republican candidate. _You’d be wrong._ Right now, the GOP has supermajorities in both Houses of Ohio’s General Assembly. Republicans control more than **75% of state Senate seats and 64% of state House seats.** Republicans drew these new maps so that they _can’t lose._ **And thanks to their partisan gerrymander of our new legislative maps, the GOP is set to hold onto those supermajorities until maps are redrawn in four years.** Ohio’s voters twice called for a fairer redistricting process — and GOP leaders failed them. Even Governor Mike DeWine admitted the new maps weren’t “clearly constitutional” _(shocker: He voted to approve them anyway)._ With all this in mind, we’re conducting a quick poll: **_[Do you believe we need to overhaul our redistricting process to make sure Ohioans are heard in elections to come?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37726214/312410858/1746246521?refcode=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU5ZDBlNC1iZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOlTeksWcMOPLNVwgUGVTiBc1VDZ_8YlbIwYv7nRBEA=&emci=16d7991f-1b31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)_** | [YES!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37726215/312410859/1746246521?refcode=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU5ZDBlNC1iZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOlTeksWcMOPLNVwgUGVTiBc1VDZ_8YlbIwYv7nRBEA=&emci=16d7991f-1b31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37726216/312410860/1746246521?refcode=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&mc=ea.1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmU5ZDBlNC1iZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOlTeksWcMOPLNVwgUGVTiBc1VDZ_8YlbIwYv7nRBEA=&emci=16d7991f-1b31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=1fe9d0e4-bf31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=22604289)

clean_body: A quick poll on redistricting. | Friend — In last year’s presidential election in Ohio, just over 53% of the vote — a slim majority — went to the Republican ticket. By just looking at that number, you might assume that only a little over half of our legislative districts would vote for the Republican candidate. You’d be wrong. Right now, the GOP has supermajorities in both Houses of Ohio’s General Assembly. Republicans control more than 75% of state Senate seats and 64% of state House seats. Republicans drew these new maps so that they can’t lose. And thanks to their partisan gerrymander of our new legislative maps, the GOP is set to hold onto those supermajorities until maps are redrawn in four years. Ohio’s voters twice called for a fairer redistricting process — and GOP leaders failed them. Even Governor Mike DeWine admitted the new maps weren’t “clearly constitutional” (shocker: He voted to approve them anyway). With all this in mind, we’re conducting a quick poll: | | ---|--- Thanks for sharing your input, John Cranley for Governor = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the John Cranley Committee JOHN CRANLEY COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

body:
#

Friends —
Just last week, ANOTHER Republican insider announced that he is running against Mark.
That makes five opponents in the race running to flip this seat and make Mitch McConnell Senate Majority leader again.
This new challenger helped lead a far-right organization that promoted some of the worst conspiracy theories about the 2020 election and vaccines.
Not only is he anti-choice, but he blocked clean energy rules in Arizona, wants to take away health care from millions of Americans by repealing the Affordable Care Act, and opposes the bipartisan infrastructure bill Mark helped lead in Congress.
Some see this race as 5 against 1. We see it a bit differently.
Our five opponents are backed by big National Republicans and dark money groups, including a $10 million super PAC. But they aren’t going to have to just beat Mark — they’re going to have to beat ALL OF US.
So today, Mark needs you.

Last Thursday, 10,000 UAW union members began their strike against John Deere demanding higher wages, improved benefits, and an end to their two-tier pension system.

**_And I stand in complete solidarity with these hard-working Americans._**

Our nation’s labor laws are weak, outdated, and ineffective. They protect Wall Street at the expense of Main Street. For far too long, major corporations like John Deere have made billions in profits off of working people. It is time they treat their employees fairly.

**We must** fight to pass legislation like the PRO Act, which will significantly strengthen the ability of workers to form unions and engage in collective negotiations for things like better working conditions and fair wages.

**We must** recognize that empowering our workers goes beyond employee rights in the workplace and that labor unions have historically been the avenue to help move the poor and working poor into the middle class.

**We must** stand with labor and elevate the voices of our brothers and sisters if we are going to see the sweeping changes that are necessary to win workers’ rights. ****[**This is why I am asking you to join me today in support of the UAW by making a direct contribution to their strike fund. Your gift will help cover the costs of food and supplies for the workers on the John Deere picket line. Can I count on you to take action?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37726825/312413412/2145063827?ms=2101020_CLTV_uawsstrikfundFR_L1txt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEwZmJkZS1jMTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ULNsEEup7oUBPyMRNxjz1qHIEsO_hgxg5gwDJ-VLBw=&emci=3eaeb529-f530-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d10fbde-c131-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12102799)**** ****______[DONATE TO UAW STRIKE FUND](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37726826/312413413/2145063827?ms=2101020_CLTV_uawsstrikfundFR_Btn1txt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEwZmJkZS1jMTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ULNsEEup7oUBPyMRNxjz1qHIEsO_hgxg5gwDJ-VLBw=&emci=3eaeb529-f530-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=2d10fbde-c131-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=12102799)**** In solidarity, ********_Nina Turner_********

clean_body: Our country’s workers deserve better. Here’s how you can help: | | | ** Friends and Neighbors, Last Thursday, 10,000 UAW union members began their strike against John Deere demanding higher wages, improved benefits, and an end to their two-tier pension system. And I stand in complete solidarity with these hard-working Americans. Our nation’s labor laws are weak, outdated, and ineffective. They protect Wall Street at the expense of Main Street. For far too long, major corporations like John Deere have made billions in profits off of working people. It is time they treat their employees fairly. We must fight to pass legislation like the PRO Act, which will significantly strengthen the ability of workers to form unions and engage in collective negotiations for things like better working conditions and fair wages. We must recognize that empowering our workers goes beyond employee rights in the workplace and that labor unions have historically been the avenue to help move the poor and working poor into the middle class. We must stand with labor and elevate the voices of our brothers and sisters if we are going to see the sweeping changes that are necessary to win workers’ rights. __ In solidarity, ****Nina Turner**** ************** ************ | || || ** Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | | Paid for by Nina Turner for Us

Peter,

**[13 DAYS UNTIL THE BIGGEST GOVERNOR ELECTION IN VIRGINIA'S MODERN HISTORY.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58574994:6oivyi2cN:m:1:3253819041:D5F43E94261115AFFFE4BE13FC12D12A:r)**

In 13 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path towards government overregulation, if our school curriculum will be controlled by liberal special interests, and if our great Commonwealth will be governed by a businessman like Glenn or a lying career politician like Terry.

In 13 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

_**If you 've never been political before, THIS is the time to care about politics. This is the time to call your friends and get your friends to care about politics.**_

Because in 13 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn't just a nickname -- **it 's a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

**[This is why we are unlocking 5X MATCHING FOR 13 DAYS:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58574994:6oivyi2cN:m:1:3253819041:D5F43E94261115AFFFE4BE13FC12D12A:r)**

body:
Parents aren't domestic terrorists! [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=41e34ef300d84ed39dcb4954dca42ad8&_e=9VVwSLZO1bqosnCZqQh_xW6YgERYvh7Bk2sjcF1RXvir6N5DkLmFKf-NTeg9IL9NkT907QdnMoNFVuT0ikZkD6pguS0juJ4HKS3NOSFH3PZu2lJJU8pE_WxHPF0rYwgFgSkyD8UhRKTDr05xAwxi-3LWQqrOw-9saRxDkmPEOSuHgxhFYKgBnZj2uy1fhpLo7CSpJqnC75GseoJxSvPRJ45t0BCTnf1vaQppIs-K0ujww8Q88B0gE2xTgWvUh63-m4nvnMnzhpE8lx-E1ejkSN40SVr-_oiNNXv5Wr6QV63j0EDJlDZHrv5LeAq0J6Dv) Hi Friend, **Have you spoken up about the liberal propaganda in our schools?** **If you did, the DOJ may want to investigate you.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Someone to Answer Your Calls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=cce2cc6e38&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | In addition to serving constituents by representing them in state-wide legislation decisions, I believe **it is crucial to have strong service support for constituents who need assistance. **

While state representatives spend much of their time in Harrisburg fighting for the district's interests, service must also include responding to constituents' requests for information and help. When I am elected state representative, I don’t want my constituents to go more than two business days without a response to their inquiry.

I intend to make information readily available through all channels including responsive text messaging and email services.

It’s important that even if we cannot answer the question directly, we can direct constituents to the correct resources and be able to explain the difference between state issues, city issues, and personal or business issues.

Often the answers are unclear or confusing. Take Philadelphia’s 2,335 miles of roadway, for instance. Responsibility for maintaining and overseeing the roads is split among the Philadelphia Streets Department, PennDOT, the Philadelphia Parks and Recreation Department, and several other public and private entities. **_So who’s responsible for fixing that pothole?_** Even if we can’t, you deserve to know who can.

Other common issues where a state representative’s office may be helpful include state unemployment benefits, property taxes, birth and death records, driver and vehicle information, state education grants, state healthcare resources, and voter information.

[If you can help me get to Harrisburg, I promise a responsive state representative's office who will always be there to help YOU.](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=799bab55a1&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

_Deja_
---
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=79d9c8c61c&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=30f78b2218&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

"Photo"I guess I shouldn't be surprised - Virginia has a "Progressive" Governor now, and the media barely cared that this in his college yearbook photo, he wore blackface. And Terry McCauliffe, a man who spent four years calling President Trump a "racist," was more than happy to accept an endorsement from Virginia's "Blackface" Governor. "Rush"This is Bo Snerdley, the one-time producer and call screener for Rush Limbaugh. Rush and I uncovered a lot about Terry McAuliffe and Bill Clinton - things they both wish we would all forget - not a chance. Working with Rush for nearly two decades has confirmed the truth about liberals:they HATE it when a Black person in America dares to think for themselves. People like Terry McAuliffe believe they can secure the Black vote by bragging about giving felons the right to vote - does he think we're all criminals? How is the media not calling him out for his racism? It is precisely why I started the New Journey PAC - to show Black America the true face of the Democrat Party - and we need your help to prevent Black Voters from being duped by another progressive politician. In just a matter of days, your support can determine the outcome of the Virginia race and help set back the radical agenda of the Democrat Party nationwide. "Will you join us?" name: Elect Republicans HQ
subject: CONFIRMED: Big Tech is Blocking Our Emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Republicans ([electrepublicans
body:
Are you receiving this, Peter?

| [**CONFIRMED:
BIG TECH IS BLOCKING REPUBLICAN EMAILS**](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X17IjzopIM4q3IC2ufQ4JZlUx4ML7C7IkbnsATdoibNx_oVZzgO7woh1JH9EmkfA4TY55VSi0-usghg-SdOK-WuU-zl6ClMsyWPbWKXloJi_S58KEc6m2XXbq16exv8JJESADqP9MYeEIMcZBTPfG_OdeyQ6RXa86eW5j55-p69hQ52YycJ_XYt1TyW3LO_qViGs_42DUPkK4xvOutRInhv6mHHlPrZCR9wbtAZM6_w27MmJoOS-S9WfYjPACJ5CYSV9rRFeN5Sa4O0rZXGBxvyM_jVL33TuT-IjBx54rf7ZGJf4Cpzdo5I-oObQzjzhgGOvbqQ_Biasi4d7xFp6z5QV5ca9QKONNJ29Ab5er6Dyw&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=434968478969990225&n=1) Is this email reaching you, Peter? **We now have proof that Big Tech is _intentionally blocking emails_ from Elect Republicans and other Republican Patriots.** Have you seen evidence of that? The Big Tech companies like Google and Microsoft route conservative emails to “spam” without cause (and far more often than they do Democrat emails) -- essentially “shadow banning” conservative senders and suppressing our ability to reach Grassroots Republicans like you. **[Please REPLY DIRECTLY TO THIS EMAIL and let us know right away whether our emails are reaching your INBOX or whether Big Tech is stuffing them in your JUNK/SPAM FOLDER.](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X17IjzopIM4q3IC2ufQ4JZlUx4ML7C7IkbnsATdoibNx3tYGAcJL0-5z0eynhC-Ti0M0wDyk5vYDgkC6K7iozi_JqqKX916riep0lfo94LJjsPLx5ntwCfCaZ1iGFs5TF_3cFDaNHJGz8xIMTcROgnpgQO6J-kBrlMrZk3uiTjlyX5rhhYI3SwCwvnvdijf1yHrDgjD4Y-35_z-w2lOCm71ODLarttjSvtV47cDxxuAbdFVX5vBgrhsH8XiNhwjBrB0FH6PE9S5UsjJfN2e7rcN4_fNwUx719dfv0C5yW3MJ4SkPHm77T6yxaJq4V5_Mgu_OuAFHEzkfX8gME9_a3zxIdIhrwdRCGjZivwEKfKGNg&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=434968478969990225&n=2)** The Big Tech firms know that if they can keep Grassroots Republicans like you from seeing critically important emails like this one, it will help Democrats win. Peter,

This headline says it all.

Our opponent recently released his latest fundraising numbers, and we can't ignore the results. After three months of fundraising - and with help from National Democrats, he has more than $17.2 MILLION in his war chest.

We just had a meeting with our finance team, and it's clear: **if we have more donors from your area give $5 or $10 right now,[we'll be able to increase our momentum and WIN THIS RACE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575856:6hkoui2nN:m:1:3253819041:4AFC03AA4D1FEE627945B164127CB92E:r)**

Our campaign is off to a terrific start - raising $3.75 million in only five short weeks.

**But the Democrat incumbent is the NUMBER ONE FUNDRAISER IN THE COUNTRY. He raised more than any other Democrat or Republican.** _We simply cannot ignore his numbers._

Peter, we need to raise as much as possible so we can communicate our message to the voters of Georgia and fend off the coming attacks. **[Can we count on you to make an immediate contribution and help give us the boost we need to win?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575856:6hkoui2nN:m:1:3253819041:4AFC03AA4D1FEE627945B164127CB92E:r)**

Herschel Walker

---
| With the support of my family and friends, and through prayerful consideration, I launched my first campaign for Congress because **we needed a conservative leader to deliver results for Iowa.** In just our first 10 months in Congress we have: ✅ Restored Iowa's Seat on the House Agriculture Committee ✅ Passed Disaster Relief for Farmers ✅ Promoted our Biofuels ✅ Passed Legislation to Stop the Chinese Communist Party from stealing American Research ✅ Defended Our Conservative Values from Socialism
**I’m immensely proud of the work we’ve been able to accomplish for the people of Iowa, but there is still more to be done.** Nancy Pelosi stands in the way of our conservative values and vision for America.
---
| | [Join Team Feenstra and Help Us Defeat Pelosi](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=o%2F0m%2Fev%2F6ITrlgR28I6hZPwmXBqp00S7iuu3en%2BRQinJ0cjHs%2BzdkwOCYveYqIrz97so0fOSBzZOYhe5m%2FVycTm2G%2FjSy%2BNh3Yr%2BMN1mIbXNlGkHiWwcu6f%2BzLM4unyR&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FYFOPG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DVdCioA_TG6BLzL9_8nXfMZc63epO2LAD7QiB7CE6PJB4otLDPRf-8aOlOBQIbT-z0&I=20211020141907.00000003ae2d%40mail6-56-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjIyNzgzOTYwMDA7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE4MjExNjE1MDs%3D&V=3&S=XcCqr-hXrtPBayrcT0njKLg3LfgdfEi6swCEXO5m-tU)

body:
This is a valuable piece of a winning campaign.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733561/312436944/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYyNzdiZS1kMzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zx5sPSLdiCh4OwxP__i0VMZxIis_htZI0NuEbCSUxpI=)

Hi Peter, my name is Allie and I'm the Deputy Campaign Manager on Team Hala.

And I'm coming to you today because we are _less than two weeks away_ from Election Day in Virginia!

**One of the most valuable pieces of a winning campaign is getting out the vote.** That’s why it’s crucial Hala’s campaign stays well‐funded so we can knock on more doors, put out more yard signs, and spread our message! clean_body: | | | | Can I count on YOU? Friend, Liz Cheney has betrayed Wyoming** and the America First Movement over and over again. Wyoming deserves a Congresswoman that will put our interests above her own petty politics and vendettas. That’s why we are launching the DEFEAT LIZ CHENEY FUND** to take back Wyoming’s only congressional seat. Liz Cheney is the embodiment of the DC Establishment that has worked for decades against hard-working every-day citizens. America First Conservatives must come together and defeat Liz Cheney to send a message that we are no longer going to allow the DC Establishment to take our money, ruin our businesses, and rule our lives. That’s why I am emailing you, Friend, and asking you to The establishment in DC is building a war chest for Liz Cheney so she can continue to do their bidding in Congress and continue to let Wyoming down. We need all America First Conservatives to join our campaign. Never forget that Liz Cheney voted to impeach President Donald J. Trump, and is leading Nancy Pelosi’s WITCH HUNT in Congress. She doesn’t represent America First or Wyoming: she doesn’t have time. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: Team Duckworth
subject: How Tammy got to where she is today →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Tammy has overcome so many obstacles and continues to be a fierce advocate for our troops, Veterans and military families in Washington. But Tammy is facing a tough re-election battle and needs your help to stay in the Senate.
#
Growing up, this little girl learned that through hard work, she could break barriers and achieve anything she set her mind to.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733870/312437266/2060549066?refcode=dd_em_211020_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBiZTYyOS1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC2-hoiFNgc0z-KMz4m1phDEeQe6hDFksl_d0H1skaA=)
So after becoming a commissioned officer in the U.S. Military, she learned to fly a helicopter and became one of the first handful of women to fly combat missions in Operation Iraqi Freedom.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733872/312437267/2060549066?refcode=dd_em_211020_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBiZTYyOS1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC2-hoiFNgc0z-KMz4m1phDEeQe6hDFksl_d0H1skaA=)
Then her Blackhawk was shot down over Iraq, costing her both legs and partial use of her right arm. She spent a long, painful year in Walter Reed Hospital undergoing surgeries and intensive physical therapy to relearn how to walk on her new prosthetic legs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733874/312437295/2060549066?refcode=dd_em_211020_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBiZTYyOS1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC2-hoiFNgc0z-KMz4m1phDEeQe6hDFksl_d0H1skaA=)
But Tammy is a fighter, so she turned these experiences into an opportunity to become a champion for Veterans. She ran for Congress and eventually won a seat in the U.S. Senate, where she is still breaking barriers. In 2018, she became the first sitting Senator to give birth and bring a baby onto the Senate floor so she could care for her child and do her job at the same time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733875/312437296/2060549066?refcode=dd_em_211020_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBiZTYyOS1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC2-hoiFNgc0z-KMz4m1phDEeQe6hDFksl_d0H1skaA=)
Tammy has overcome so many obstacles and continues to be a fierce advocate for our troops, Veterans and military families in Washington. But Tammy is facing a tough re-election battle and needs your help to stay in the Senate. So please:
**[Will you split a contribution between our campaign and Senator Durbin so they can continue this important work and defend the Senate majority? We are asking for $5 but any amount you can give will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733876/312437297/2060549066?refcode=dd_em_211020_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBiZTYyOS1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC2-hoiFNgc0z-KMz4m1phDEeQe6hDFksl_d0H1skaA=)**
Thank you for being on our team.
All our best,
Team Duckworth

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37733879/312437298/2060549066?refcode=dd_em_211020_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTBiZTYyOS1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JC2-hoiFNgc0z-KMz4m1phDEeQe6hDFksl_d0H1skaA=)**

subject: Cal Matters: Newsom declares drought emergency across California
body:
I made my career as a teacher, but my husband John and I raised our kids on an apple orchard where he worked. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37734146/312437495/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzliN2E2Ny1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0OgOY7V2S9ShO6byEOfxXttms2k2Uq_9jmUDIFG5GM=)
_Cal Matters:_
**Newsom declares drought emergency across California**
Did you see this news, friend?

Governor Newsom just expanded California's drought emergency to cover the entire state of California. As you probably know, thousands of wells across the state are projected to go dry this year. If our consumption trends hold, up to a thousand more will dry next year.

Many of us here in the Central Valley have long dealt with the struggles that droughts create. I made my career as a teacher, but my husband John and I raised our kids on an apple orchard where he worked. We know firsthand how important water is to our economy and the way of life for our farmers, farmworkers, and rural communities who lack access to clean drinking water.

**This emergency declaration is an important reminder that we need to be honest about the threat of climate change. It's only getting worse, and it’s OUR community that bears the brunt while politicians like Kevin McCarthy get to play politics in Washington and ignore it.**

We need a leader in Congress who will treat this issue with the seriousness it deserves. That's why I'm running, and it's why I'm asking you for your support:

**[I'm ready to bring my firsthand knowledge of agriculture and water issues to Congress, but I need to know you're with me. Add your name to my petition to help send Congress a strong message that California's drought needs attention.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37734149/312437503/-1343707748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzliN2E2Ny1kNDMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h0OgOY7V2S9ShO6byEOfxXttms2k2Uq_9jmUDIFG5GM=&emci=109b7a67-d431-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=139b7a67-d431-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=21170704)**

Marisa

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Watch my latest ad!
body:
The law of the jungle is “eat or be eaten”.

The law of politics is “define or be defined.”
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/BUMeZn8W4VjrZMPVxvobwQ/k7637aQ5rhEDEVYlpwVDmpBw)
Patriot,

The law of the jungle is “eat or be eaten”.

The law of politics is “define or be defined.”

[**Watch and help me air my latest ad to tell voters who I am.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/BUMeZn8W4VjrZMPVxvobwQ/k7637aQ5rhEDEVYlpwVDmpBw)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/BUMeZn8W4VjrZMPVxvobwQ/k7637aQ5rhEDEVYlpwVDmpBw)
The Left is working hard to define me as a “racist”, a “conspiracy theorist” and the standard, “right wing nutjob.”

Several weeks ago, a founder of the traitorous Lincoln Project called me “wildly immoral and crazier than a latrine rat.”

That’s the modus operandi of the Left: **smear, smear, smear**.

And they work hard to make the smears so offensive that an average voter who would have never heard of me before would be left with an incredibly negative first impression.

I hope you can understand how important it is that I reach as many voters FIRST and tell them who I am, and what I stand for before the Left infects them with lies.

If you haven’t already, [**please watch my ad and help me get it in front of voters as soon as possible**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/BUMeZn8W4VjrZMPVxvobwQ/k7637aQ5rhEDEVYlpwVDmpBw).

For every [**$25 you donate**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/BUMeZn8W4VjrZMPVxvobwQ/k7637aQ5rhEDEVYlpwVDmpBw), I can reach 1,000 voters in my district.

So please, [**donate as much as you can and help me get to Congress**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/BUMeZn8W4VjrZMPVxvobwQ/k7637aQ5rhEDEVYlpwVDmpBw).

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: This is about protecting our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
And stopping extremism
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37734573/312437987/-2023814932?refcode=20211020.5_TM_10FG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2YyNzdiZS1kMzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tuRUZADsdycUrketJEZUv1q1OkUgyOspldYI7_A_WlM=)

| | Derek, I know you hear me talk a lot about how important this race is for the country. But trust me, it’s worth sounding the alarm bells. Here’s what would happen if Youngkin wins:
* All the progress we’ve made in Virginia gets rolled back — from gun safety to abortion rights
* Extremists in Virginia and across the country will be emboldened
* Donald Trump will gain a huge surge in momentum for his 2024 comeback bid

subject: We must defend our elections

body:
96https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/where-do-yo
u-stand-election-integrity-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_ca
mpaign=2021oct20hf Friend — Today, Democrats are forcing another
vote in the U.S. Senate on their plan to nationalize our elections.
Raphael Warnock is leading the effort.

Warnock and the Democrats are
obsessed with passing this bill, because it would cripple voter ID,
make our elections less secure, and fund their campaigns with our tax
dollars.

There couldn’t be a bigger difference between us on this
issue. Here’s what I think:

It should be easy to vote and hard to
cheat. Voter ID laws are common sense. Georgia’s elections should NOT
be run by the Swamp. Our tax dollars shouldn’t fund Raphael Warnock and
AOC’s campaigns. What do you think? Do you support secure elections? Or
do you think voter ID should be outlawed and your tax dollars should
fund Democrat campaigns?
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/where-do-you
-stand-election-integrity-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_cam
paign=2021oct20hf TAKE THE POLL » Raphael Warnock hasn’t said a word
about the challenges facing our country — from the border to inflation
to the supply chains. But he’s got plenty to say about making our
elections less secure, because he knows it would give Democrats
permanent control.

I’m standing in the gap to stop him. With one
more conservative vote in the U.S. Senate, we can end this regressive
power grab for good. And I want to know if you’re with me on this one.

https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/where-do-you
-stand-election-integrity-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_cam

-stand-election-integrity-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_cam

https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/where-do-you
-stand-election-integrity-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_cam
paign=2021oct20hf TAKE THE POLL »Keep Reading For A Quick Message From
Gary:

I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your
support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.

Raphael
Warnock has already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with
it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that
this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only
Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now.
And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.

With one
conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S.
Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I
hope you’ll donate below.

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8128036?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| **Critical Race Theory Lunch**
**Tuesday, November 9, 11:30 a.m. at River Hills Country Club**
**Come and listen to special guest speaker Mike Gonzalez, a senior fellow at The Heritage Foundation**, explain what lies behind this destructive ideology – and how we can defeat it.
---
|
---
| The author of _The Plot to Change America: How Identity Politics is Dividing the Land of the Free_ and, most recently, _BLM: The Making of a New Marxist Revolution,_ Mike has crisscrossed the country, advising lawmakers and citizens alike on what we need to do to safeguard America from this Left-Wing agenda.

If you are able to come, **[please get your ticket HERE.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7fc02ff6cd&e=5703353baa)** Places are limited, so buy now to avoid disappointment.
Thank you, and we hope to see you there!

---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
| |
---
|
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=576ef66a01) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=576ef66a01).

But we’re running out of time to collect signatures before her BIG day is over! Thank You, Unite the Country = = * = Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. name: John Fetterman
subject: Want to go on a Sheetz run with me + Gisele?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Okay FINE. Or Wawa. 🙄
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211020-3069-header&t=1&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)
Hey, Peter, it’s John. Want to go on a Sheetz run with me?
Okay FINE. Or Wawa. 🙄
Look, you know I’ve always believed Sheetz is the superior, far more delicious gas station establishment in PA.
**But here’s the deal. Today, I’m launching our first-ever, one-of-a-kind contest:**
[**_Make a donation of any amount to our campaign right now, and you’ll be *automatically* entered to win a trip to Sheetz (or Wawa) with me + Gisele!_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211020-3069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211020-3069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211020-3069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)**
I’m completely serious. **If you enter the contest and win, Gisele and I will come meet you near Cresco for a Sheetz (or Wawa) run on us.**
You’re an important part of our campaign, Peter. It would be my *deep honor* to treat you to a Walker Breakfast Ranger and some Totz (or a Sizzli, if that’s what you prefer).
And it would be an even greater honor to meet you in person, talk with you one-on-one, and get your feedback on how we can keep growing our campaign in all 67 PA counties, including in Monroe.
So — what are you waiting for?!?
[**_Will you kick in a donation of any amount to be automatically entered to win a trip to Sheetz* with me + Gisele? This is a one-of-a-kind contest that won’t be open forever, and I don’t want you to miss out._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211020-3069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)
**[Donate + Enter](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33387?refcode=em20211020-3069&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)**
Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU! 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

_*Or Wawa_

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by October 31, 2021. Enter by [**contributing here**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20211019-contest?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=3069_434096_0_efFL&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL), or visit this page to **[enter without contributing](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-sheetz-wawa-nodonate-contest-signup?source=em-3069&t=8&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)**. One winner will receive the following prize package: An opportunity to meet John and Gisele Fetterman at your local Sheetz or Wawa (approx. retail value $30). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of Pennsylvania. View full official rules at **[this link](https://johnfetterman.com/contest-rules/)**. Sponsor: Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh, PA 15211.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3069%2E434096%2E0_efFL)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Sen. Cortez Masto
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
GOP outside groups have already spent over $1 million to flip this seat -- and The Cook Political Report just downgraded my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.
#
Team, I wish I was reaching out with good news, but a new poll shows me losing by 2 points to my Trump-endorsed opponent and CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the nation.
GOP outside groups have _already_ spent over $2 million to flip this seat -- and The Cook Political Report just _downgraded_ my chances of winning Nevada's critical Senate race.
Let me be very clear: Senate control hinges on what happens in Nevada -- and I'm about to fall short of my urgent rapid-response goal as of 12 p.m.
That's why I'm turning to you, friend: I won by just 2 points in 2016, and I cannot afford to miss this goal or lose any ground. Races in Nevada are always tough, so I'm counting on you.
I wouldn't ask you personally like this if it weren't important. I need to raise another $7,012 by midnight -- and I can't miss this goal. **With Senate control on the line, every single dollar today could mean the difference between winning and losing.**
**[Please, will you rush a $5 donation now to defend our Democratic Senate majority? For maximum impact, your donation will be split between my campaign and Senator Jacky Rosen.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37749870/312443521/-1079805058?refcode=jr_em_nd_211020_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjVhNzhjMi1kODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5LYV_wFlVG_fISxkE5bIXu00e3YaXzihUOd6hCpOrOs=)**
I can't thank you enough for chipping in at critical moments like this. Together, I know we can defend this seat -- and our Democratic Senate majority.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37749871/312443522/-1079805058?refcode=jr_em_nd_211020_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjVhNzhjMi1kODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5LYV_wFlVG_fISxkE5bIXu00e3YaXzihUOd6hCpOrOs=)**

And I know that direction isn't going to come by just sitting around and waiting... so I decided to do my part to make this country a little better by running to bring the change myself to the U.S. Senate. | | | == | I won't do what cookie-cutter politicians do, and sell out you and your values to the special interest groups, the Big Tech elites, or other shady D.C. Swamp groups. I'll fight for the little people and all of those who don't have a voice! If you're with me, == | == | The Left likes to play identity politics and say they want to hear more minority voices \- well then listen up, cause I've got one right here! And I'm going to use this voice to speak out against all that they have unleashed on our country with an Open Border, sky-high inflation, and so much more. Our grassroots campaign has already grown at a strong pace thanks to everyday donors like you pitching in through emails like this one. == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for the support, | == | Kathy Barnette | | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | == | == == == | | | Kathy Barnette for Senate | P.O. Box 659 , Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006-0659 | | Sent by mailto:info@barnetteforsenate.com powered by

Peter, [****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)

Socialism is coming to America.

It's been coming for a while.

Every year the government spends your money to give out "free things." Government grows. That "free stuff" gets more expensive. And America sinks deeper and deeper into the socialist abyss. I spoke about this recently with Laura Ingraham on Fox News.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND FIGHT SOCIALISM: $35 >> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)
I've been warning about this for years!**But now that we 've seen nine months straight of Big Government Socialism coming from Biden, people are starting to understand that there are consequences. **

One of the biggest ones being the inflation that comes with Biden's spend-o-rama budget. **_Prices are rising for everything. _**

For gas. For groceries. For rent and education.

And Americans are now wishing we had a smaller government that could slow down this unraveling.

_We 're seeing the truth: big government socialism doesn't work._

Every time it's been tried in the history of the world, it always ends badly.

**_We do NOT need to try it in America! _**

That's why we MUST resist Biden's high-speed race towards socialism. We must reject his trillion dollar budgets and "free stuff."

As a Senator, I'm standing up to the nonsense every day but I need your help to spread the word and stop socialism in America.

Will you chip in now to help out?
[**STAND WITH RAND: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58575875:6XqhEi2Ny:m:1:3253819041:C5DD0B5C597320D679BFDB6DE11F18AF:r)
Thank you, Peter.

We cannot let socialism destroy our nation.

In liberty,
Rand Paul

body:
Roy needs to know that you’re with him. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37754075/312447846/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWM3NjNlOS1kYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rWryhayoNQcglUGzHp4hFB6RKyppjMqnDUbXYPaJoc=&emci=42c763e9-dc31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=55c763e9-dc31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, In just weeks, the Supreme Court will hear a critical case that could lead to them gutting _Roe v. Wade_. **Everything is on the line.** 17 states will _immediately_ enact stringent abortion bans if _Roe_ is overturned, through so-called “trigger laws” or pre-_Roe_ laws still on the books. **[Here in North Carolina, we can count on Roy to _always_ defend access to abortion care — but he needs to know you’re with him. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Protecting our democracy is more important than preserving the filibuster.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Today, the Freedom to Vote Act is up for a vote in the Senate.
#

Today, the Freedom to Vote Act is up for a vote in the Senate. I’m proud to be a cosponsor of this bill, and I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why it’s so important that this bill becomes law, even if we have to amend or end the filibuster to pass it.
_The truth is, our democracy is under attack from Republicans in state legislatures across the country who are hellbent on suppressing the right to vote._
This bill is our chance to pass sweeping protections to our democracy, to safeguard the right to vote, end gerrymandering, and push back against the growing onslaught of voter suppression bills in states across the country.
**The Freedom to Vote Act will:**
* Make Election Day a public holiday 🎉

* Ensure every state allows same-day voter registration ✅

* Set a minimum of 15 consecutive days of early voting for federal elections, including two weekends 🗓️

* Ban partisan gerrymandering 🚫

* Help get Big Money out of politics 💸

This bill includes some of the same proven reforms that I helped implement as California’s Secretary of State to make our elections more accessible and more secure – reforms that all of our Senate colleagues should support to ensure a healthy democracy.
But the sad fact is that Republicans are uninterested in protecting the right to vote. They’d rather maximize their own power at the expense of the majority. So it’s up to Democrats to act, _even if that means getting rid of the filibuster._
[**Please add your name if you agree: We must pass the Freedom to Vote Act, even if we have to amend or end the filibuster to do it.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Freedom-To-Vote-Act-Oct21?source=em211020-1-15&akid=403%2E159979%2EnZRCLB)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Freedom-To-Vote-Act-Oct21?source=em211020-1-15&akid=403%2E159979%2EnZRCLB)**
Make no mistake, we must pass comprehensive voting rights legislation like the Freedom to Vote Act to protect our democracy. And protecting our democracy is more important than preserving the filibuster.
Thank you for standing with me and supporting this important legislation.
\- Alex Padilla
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Freedom-To-Vote-Act-Oct21?source=em211020-1-15&akid=403%2E159979%2EnZRCLB)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=403%2E159979%2EnZRCLB)

I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.

name: Ann Godlewski
subject: I'm Sarah's mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Hi there,

I haven't had the chance to introduce myself to most of you, so for those who don't know me: I'm Sarah's mom! I'm reaching out today because Sarah has an important fundraising deadline coming up in a few days, and I wanted to ask for your help.

I know Sarah's the best candidate in this race to defeat Ron Johnson. Being her mom, I may be a little biased, but hear me out because I've got the facts on my side. (As a former public school teacher, I always do my research!)

Sarah's the only Democratic candidate in this race who's won two statewide campaigns in Wisconsin, and with your help, I know she can do it again. Wisconsinites deserve better than Ron Johnson, and Sarah is ready to be a voice for all of us in the U.S. Senate.

**[Can Sarah and I count on you to chip in to support her campaign for U.S. Senate today? Anything you can contribute will go a long way -- her team will even send you a free sticker as a thank you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37755329/312450116/1263472773?ms=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&refcode=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&source=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGZiMGRmZC1kZTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n3iEvLLVox9vZOD5EEiRxHexKXD5LI3WMPoiRLwlsfI=)**

Here's what I know to be true: as senator, Sarah will fight for working people like you and me. I was a public school teacher for more than 34 years. Presently, teachers are underpaid and underappreciated despite how hard they work. This doesn't just happen to teachers either.

We need someone in the U.S. Senate who will look out for those of us who are too often left behind. That's what Sarah's done as State Treasurer, and it's what she'll do as our senator, too.

**[First, we need to make sure she has the resources to win. So, please, can you add a small donation to her campaign today? It would mean a great deal to all of us if you did.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37755330/312450117/1263472773?ms=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&refcode=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&source=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211020_MomMM_fndd_gq_act___AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGZiMGRmZC1kZTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n3iEvLLVox9vZOD5EEiRxHexKXD5LI3WMPoiRLwlsfI=)**

I've been proud of Sarah her whole life, I know she'll make you proud as Wisconsin's next senator.

— Ann Godlewski

clean_body: Hi there, I haven't had the chance to introduce myself to most of you, so for those who don't know me: I'm Sarah's mom! I'm reaching out today because Sarah has an important fundraising deadline coming up in a few days, and I wanted to ask for your help. I know Sarah's the best candidate in this race to defeat Ron Johnson. Being her mom, I may be a little biased, but hear me out because I've got the facts on my side. (As a former public school teacher, I always do my research!) Sarah's the only Democratic candidate in this race who's won two statewide campaigns in Wisconsin, and with your help, I know she can do it again. Wisconsinites deserve better than Ron Johnson, and Sarah is ready to be a voice for all of us in the U.S. Senate. = Here's what I know to be true: as senator, Sarah will fight for working people like you and me. I was a public school teacher for more than 34 years. Presently, teachers are underpaid and underappreciated despite how hard they work. This doesn't just happen to teachers either. We need someone in the U.S. Senate who will look out for those of us who are too often left behind. That's what Sarah's done as State Treasurer, and it's what she'll do as our senator, too. = I've been proud of Sarah her whole life, I know she'll make you proud as Wisconsin's next senator. — Ann Godlewski | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

From record-high gas prices and out-of-control inflation to stagnant unemployment and wage growth numbers. Now, there is a cargo crisis and shelves are empty across the country. This is a socialist nightmare. It is not too late to turn this nightmare around, but I need your help. When I am elected,**I will support the Trump Era economic policies that gave us the greatest economy in American History.** **[But I need your help today!>>>](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=738e2dfd51&e=598f6aa24c)** [****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=26d79c94e7&e=598f6aa24c)[****](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=56bda613bb&e=598f6aa24c)**[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=5d436ebfa5&e=598f6aa24c)

name: Team Booker
subject: It’s Charles’ birthday today, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Today is a very special day — it’s Charles’ 37th birthday! 🎉

Charles wants nothing for his birthday other than a brighter future for
Kentucky. So to celebrate, we’re hoping to raise $37,000 before the day
ends and share this birthday surprise with Charles tonight.

We’re building this movement together, which is why we have to ask: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11655?refcode=em20211020-1077&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1077%2E346206%2EC9UDmC ]In
honor of Charles’ birthday, will you gift $3.70 or anything you can before
midnight tonight?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11655?refcode=em20211020-1077&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1077%2E346206%2EC9UDmC ]Happy birthday, Charles!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11655?refcode=em20211020-1077&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1077%2E346206%2EC9UDmC ]Contribute $3.70

Peter, we
think you’ll agree with us when we say that we’re proud to stand by
Charles’ side as our people-powered movement works to transform Kentucky’s

body:
SIGN THE CARD: Wish Vice President Harris a Happy Birthday before midnight! >>
| | | **It 's Vice President Kamala Harris' birthday!!**

**We 're celebrating her special day with a card signed by her best supporters -- _but your name 's not on it!_

After all she's done for our country, we want to make sure this is her BEST birthday yet.

So quickly: Will you sign her card before midnight tonight?**

[**https://action.dccc.org/card/harris-birthday**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/yr-jf4w_)
[SIGN THE CARD: Wish Vice President Harris a Happy Birthday before midnight! >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
Today is Vice President Harris' birthday!

Here at Democratic HQ, we're emotional thinking about all that she's done for our country.

Together with President Biden, she DEFEATED Donald Trump and led the charge to secure our Democratic Majorities in Congress.

And now, she's working harder than ever to Build Back Better on behalf of the American people.

**So to celebrate our amazing Vice President, we 're calling on 10,200 of her very best supporters to sign her card and make her special day UNFORGETTABLE!**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

We want to show how PROUD we are to have Kamala as our vice president.

**That 's why we're calling on 10,200 all-star Democrats to sign her birthday card before midnight tonight.**

Will you add your name straight away??
[QUICKLY: Sign Vice President Harris' birthday card before midnight >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/D_8wc6-)

DCCC

Team, Today is seven years to the day since Laquan McDonald was murdered by police in Chicago. And today, the Senate Foreign Relations Committee chose to advance the nomination of Rahm Emanuel to be ambassador of Japan - the same Rahm Emanuel that covered up Laquan McDonald’s murder seven years ago.
******Team, we’ve tried everything.** We’ve called our Senators to ask them to oppose his nomination. We held a press conference outside of the Chicago Police Board with local activists and organizations on Tuesday demanding Emanuel’s nomination be withdrawn. We led twenty Chicago activists and leaders in [an open letter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDL0195r-gNaKL0NXw0E6jsbacBycdDOmsNj1Rn_m2MZDY-xhamqgS0-1ZGTvQORuyxHmaNxtUwv474D72rXwpw70n7FIRuH3IRXLdDyK2mhyQk6Wg2CA_6am40yGCoi4kw2ZML4obyzDnEpaieARUNbBosXJIfBRx4BiiIR1htEb3YPAT6K6LhnoVcenK9UzDrwzkhT2qqR5ZPDopQoqfRj15Si2_577drPrUBeACjLz_gWrU8OX8gSWOfvzIJ7AwCoh5lcIEbUcl1ZBV47-j1PtmIHjdK56aIqBuCmW3GCJiSL1mnsJwAy2ADUt10bNiOaJ6fY7nPpMO6T6tCINlmTrguRxu_d21WGlZGitINfr/3gb/S6LeZmckQqm4gzldmReFxQ/h1/qbbGSccpPpJZQe43BA9PY5qw9wdKm5jOFhngwfLPXW8) to the Senate Foreign Relations Committee urging them to hold our former Mayor accountable. Today, when we were supposed to be remembering and celebrating Laquan’s life on Laquan Day, we are marching in a rally to [demand justice](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDFPZEzZ6wEhLpaimocMRJcS_00WYU9YizO7oauFUErLeH5MEStQ9p9jMHt3w16TN1xTb-m7k9-jYQfdVqTXy54_59gAxWoRJhResk8IzukghDH1ZXs9gNmTUhpvM4FOOFTjoHMQUH6Gk2dzDFgDzg4ME4Q7A-fL0c5Fmj9TCY4ikAzyShrjkKb_z2t96ddlSpCl99rAGauv8yMO9tTS5xifhaUokyTOTwW5wNPTCWKuC-cWZ2oOCA87ussdhZxrAhYCVwcHsUiQUg-M7_QrBUWDPOoljOUe15HGRduHmMhmnQocEUsflBCe_OCxWcrkFqfB5OKrubS7vgLMpZKgWoZHXhFoB3vDdczTZtvs9GzbJ1dfV3yLd-7_CEnyQ2EzsMZdLS2jnAoX2ctwCFVaAZyojlMJIabtrdT8UlTnMM3t7/3gb/S6LeZmckQqm4gzldmReFxQ/h2/Akj089lIiHR4HW07tqUFRy25QpokBAxwLk7MHs4lmYA) for his family. They refuse to listen to us alone, so we need your help. **[Will you sign our petition demanding the Senate vote NO on Rahm Emanuel’s confirmation? There is no place for Rahm Emanuel in Democratic politics - not as mayor or ambassador.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnIXQWPsiYhuxpjd3W6Chu63yb2H3jniuLFmID1YwY9I8ZIQ35b6-ZywxMMcI_3hQwdYmfrGg8eqw8yZomY229jLs-pWbU8OL1ulPzJFt4lGbGIyvjb477L70ZdVxSnzQt1jqwt-8rN4TEOGw5ElJVnLpcGtNoqYRoiPwvlSdGFkVgo9W4x6AD_WZnZCAJC4vUbUhkXd-Syq1x7AWiosgHRMP94PFMTKOCoR4amAfeC5mX4FPidqgLFv0wOPMu8kcyDsnV93dgi0d_kT3eJAMPZpHMYxlMlJoMWLZ9ANLyJvA3z4Cr3mxRnkQX5QZUAzBE_RoEKffCMDxjI-t-Jcj5h/3gb/S6LeZmckQqm4gzldmReFxQ/h3/EGn1CtOnBPOIVI8P3sW9J9O6CN1Wc4hBZR7J3fILXzw) ** [Sign your name »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnIXQWPsiYhuxpjd3W6Chu63yb2H3jniuLFmID1YwY9I8ZIQ35b6-ZywxMMcI_3hQzWIjQJXKAfbvG9S76ZvRGy19ijtI-ZY4tHlKS2_OXlkdUGhi4SNEbg66rlgDAI3S2pLqk01r-EDToiOLG9SBQpOD8rE-1xPD3cX-Z858ptqQgvf8_Lw8cFicLabN-QwThVqg7f0NWABye32y7FfElT0VV64UgimlVVsac7LmrKlWSX3rmiUpflXgoZA_ZhEq8AzajG3lFM8Q191TBrSDDFQ7symGBNqUS5Bs3xT0Aq6eKH8vJaeW5hJa1LpVHcTLwaX8OXLFQ-d5R63YxS6Em6/3gb/S6LeZmckQqm4gzldmReFxQ/h4/UcHW5s4RkxwiiV3TJ_S_oEVL5pR3I1-PzPxG-vok5pg) They can’t ignore us all.
