name: National Republican Polling
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ziulvp5nqrsjke05ca02dlnc1o7l52o7r9j95csg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt8h6ehv7tat52ls7lh16tgm6r6n4dff1miakprg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj2clh2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zl887p2p2dob4cdkggnbagim9jkdgd5fugukccrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj2clh2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze1t37dk9ik7l3h6hbv6iour5r66bkqunm33eoo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj2clh2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: Team AOC
subject: You can volunteer from your city to help India Walton win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Will you join AOC in supporting India Walton and join a phone bank to get out the vote?
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211020-2598-header&t=1&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)
India Walton is on pace to make history as the first woman elected as Mayor of Buffalo, New York.
India is a nurse, community activist, and mother who had the courage to challenge a 16-year incumbent. Many counted her out, but she won her primary in a historic upset (not unlike Alexandria’s historic primary win in 2018) with a bold, progressive vision. **Now she’s headed to the general election on November 2 – just thirteen days away.**
**No matter where you live, you have the chance to help secure India’s victory** and help elect a leader who will put working families first, create new green jobs, fight for affordable housing, and so much more.
Early voting begins this Saturday and Alexandria is headed to Buffalo to help kick off early voting and get out the vote. **Will you join Alexandria in supporting India by joining a phone bank this week to help get out the vote and kick off early voting?**
Upcoming events:
---
[DSA Hosts Wednesday Phonebank for India](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10083?source=em20211020-2598&utm_source=em20211020-2598&t=2&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)
Today, October 20 from 6 - 8 PM ET**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10083?source=em20211020-2598&utm_source=em20211020-2598&t=3&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)** [Sunday Phonebank for India](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10084?source=em20211020-2598&utm_source=em20211020-2598&t=4&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)
Sunday, October 24 from 6 - 8 PM ET**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10084?source=em20211020-2598&utm_source=em20211020-2598&t=5&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)** [Monday Phonebank for India](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10085?source=em20211020-2598&utm_source=em20211020-2598&t=6&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)
Monday, October 25 from 6 - 8 PM ET**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10085?source=em20211020-2598&utm_source=em20211020-2598&t=7&akid=2598%2E2526796%2EOOxbw0)**
India’s team is confident in her path to victory, but it’s going to take a massive mobilization effort. **That’s why we need as many volunteers making calls to voters as possible.**
The work of building a stronger, more progressive world will happen city by city, block by block. A victory in Buffalo will send a powerful message that working people are tired of having their needs come second to the wealthy and well-connected. **Please RSVP above to join a phone bank and get out the vote for India Walton.**
Thank you for volunteering,
Team AOC

clean_body: Will you join AOC in supporting India Walton and join a phone bank to get out the vote? India Walton is on pace to make history as the first woman elected as Mayor of Buffalo, New York. India is a nurse, community activist, and mother who had the courage to challenge a 16-year incumbent. Many counted her out, but she won her primary in a historic upset (not unlike Alexandria’s historic primary win in 2018) with a bold, progressive vision. Now she’s headed to the general election on November 2 – just thirteen days away. No matter where you live, you have the chance to help secure India’s victory and help elect a leader who will put working families first, create new green jobs, fight for affordable housing, and so much more. Early voting begins this Saturday and Alexandria is headed to Buffalo to help kick off early voting and get out the vote. Will you join Alexandria in supporting India by joining a phone bank this week to help get out the vote and kick off early voting? Upcoming events: Today, October 20 from 6 - 8 PM ET Sunday, October 24 from 6 - 8 PM ET Monday, October 25 from 6 - 8 PM ET India’s team is confident in her path to victory, but it’s going to take a massive mobilization effort. That’s why we need as many volunteers making calls to voters as possible. The work of building a stronger, more progressive world will happen city by city, block by block. A victory in Buffalo will send a powerful message that working people are tired of having their needs come second to the wealthy and well-connected. Please RSVP above to join a phone bank and get out the vote for India Walton. Thank you for volunteering, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Blake Masters
subject: I climbed up to the top of the mountain where the Wall ends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
We have the manpower, the supplies, and the machinery. It's time to finish the Wall. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdl6MXzxtPIqoQQjENkWnPc0_oqjt3c4vidfq86YbKehQRR_Oqx3AH0aNQwgv7zzKDaR5To3rXyWskIT4AxCRLBoPTi3GetaWydlp1LfTdcKHroOe6lxWWEPtqtTDZqI_CNQUWfTWbVslBrAWFTSru2TZH4COnZ28vCw5SMIBGC34nxtkhyxPfNWPuQcFc7ONWxUfNs0IU7vgYN2b8cE6kL6A%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I went on a hike in Sierra Vista. **Not for my health, but to see the state of the Border Wall here in Arizona.**

What I found were gaping holes where the cartels traffic drugs and human beings with impunity. The people who live in Sierra Vista know that their backyards are the biggest crime scene in America today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdlLCuzyQ8NC1pEoGV09djLj6bwqr9QQzM1LPONEiB9UqoNdWcNC0nb7MIDPrqHuArXT5ZpXps-aI4GYOv-es0DI_xolY6WY3gVax_O8JSR6dry2sYEVIz83uhPWvcLSo7q9xBJCSyv4z7UgBqdvAopqKgxqXs1q2y9dfU0xrW3mxeU1y9ILBQj4SEESPtdcp-RDn3qyxdrWmhwtOhcxEjFAA%3D%3D)
[** ****FINISH THE WALL ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdlLMu0t_o8ZWMnDwa2lAYsiKw7MgIvq9Xze1epyz6KpVCUczALAuLaNTm9fHsfYCysEiguj4NmpYVnkqY0Z6SQXcSHvpO8ZdQGlwmVSCpoeudPuCu68Z1TSGo3-Nv3GPTCXrR9Kpx69nEdG-3R1HKLJpIPFR0SXZjupfatkyMP94yd-aRSqjz7tfo3idrGGp9rxkBZ4Cd1UI4RILH1Srx_5g%3D%3D)
The Wall works. There was no way I could make it over the Border Wall in the completed sections, but after only a brief climb, I found one of those gaps in the fence, and I was inches away from Mexico.

Smugglers also know about these holes; lookouts guard these spots and tell them when it's safe to cross. They come over the mountain, and all the people they've trafficked disappear into our country

[**Four U.S. states border Mexico, and while most are talking about the flood of illegal immigration happening in Texas, they ignore the fact that illegal border crossings have increased over 2,000% in Arizona. That only represents the people that they catch crossing the Border.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdleJQ944r7khnwNbACp1yu99t71xFHsOX0hCA7fxmv4pXaz-kfxGMpLqB4OoNv919_JpyP7OATT407HUDDh8j0c5VosYvlb_8gvwruYI4K0rmnOEGNaSKqUH-Rzw5hfm_txatLLk_TpAnaMr7XV6ibPjKUxZTxzojMsRhoYKpmbf4Z8NplbOhj2HOIHO1u6wkk7tDKTs94Lq6GzW6Z_wekLA%3D%3D)

**Fixing this problem is simple - finish the Border Wall.**

Ending illegal immigration should be a top priority for anyone who represents Arizona. [**But Mark Kelly and Joe Biden don't want to finish the Wall or enforce the Border.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdlUIvQcFqU_jubM_Zdr4boxfqCdzWRbih_UwqfJ3AoO4HBXnaV-XScMBNKVVAQNregE4VE-vBLkSYfPJx3digzjz-KHF55T89OSVwEbQC84pU8tQlWmh43e_PbD2Md3BIX9AMpoNEOlAtOLHatFjED4xcPP3HL-K0HqCVFum1MNo7NNirMGZbpDVWdXozHQXR9Qze_jel9H-xIXs1ALI3_jg%3D%3D)

The path to protecting our nation from the cartels and taking back the Senate for Republicans runs through Arizona. [**Can you help me show Mark Kelly that the Border is a top priority for Americans? Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or more today to help me take back Arizona from the hands of the left?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdlseg2PmKZis-cSJOKjEtsDdxCwzM5CRGANHI98N_eKlV6SJh_4tsqTYxoWk-STsbTdxTahrsXIE1sI5SHJeyxVF20sMuLHPfqnp0hHZKdWdfoEjI0MNg5HtvhY4gWzIC6LYqSN3Nptkl7ZbQQJ7pXcjrlYoA1dSTdWQi7lBDWWgsQpn__iuXGdcA020z1Ee-urFgYTsua6SnF4EPMDnaFZg%3D%3D)

[**Anything you can give today can help us show Mark Kelly that we have the power to beat him and take back the Senate Majority.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdl-GupbB12qdUU_x1NRHsGrqkg9vfmax8AcsGkmz6vdg83ePR26pr3vm4Y58uSltShN8h0YNwVzw_EtNf9n2_cgNJuAMfXDg-0sQ5dl8-MsRoMlkPv0Y9yn8eB3pzLqTwEd6yKK-sc6j20rKMa3ah9LXAD4hJU7u-92Hqa6Wu5jXa398GFHIXh1-zN2PozqvYdGkH4j0rVOJxk_VZN8FgLlA%3D%3D)

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdlSMyzcnWX7Hwn0zxW0mIFf3h0rGXm7CN9uwmSD_3L1mM5zt8W8f6-HSdTu-Sr5Hb3Tf9MLGLfuxYOa7KAlMxo4tEDfmCk24fjq6iCK-CGmJqher0HP3Qe1-eaR4wMa7y9CIGH7BakxshmySQaso8Vy1PwbZf_hMaNw1U093MRo5lTCdnOBawnMR3VgtS1g7U-s2SuxqitPnGJWZqE8BfZcQ%3D%3D)
Thank you,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

[** ****DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd49f3495f3412584e4bc9dbea27dcd&_e=x8gralrqJzqsfOpw9om0CAt8mZuaK0qRs_tCM6Pnh-CRcngl93p7C3ya8O8drVvt4GEIBOk_gsV4M1eScPCFzFIU1bzPMYpT5U_a1dWLiwHCg2Wd6wdh85Fcnde1ViS2JpWMrZkQ9CdTAps_w-iskZA-EGtZNzsMtUewMTqdxJUroW8gR-U585QDs8TjYozyb2BD0q84yEDJBjxLNiakjFny6sx8nYWuAk3tHXbF8Fy7JijDyAB8IepRG27iEFdlMgzkKjinWQUzXUN1knF1r2-Fdy2lf9CnLCuGNbE5c3gN4v-7BHpkZWhsSfaEwQjssk4I-e0DlWIQniQyn7q0WehGRgyPFIf9JUBhR5Ajw8FsU7u547JbRdjvaKHc_cMJ-oDKHVIUBXyJDrqFtlyXV5cqjqA5FgryjSt_norilnKxQQtZ_E4oeq5wJudxtNPI_sTLM_cYIMo-4Wx2GFy2Cg%3D%3D)

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8959%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=CJ%2fn3gDZtcrnW46OF6935w&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SFKWZzWebFPOwFpM7nw9ag&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SFKWZzWebFPOwFpM7nw9ag&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c16613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hZBIDMGqegKsB3PkM6jNwQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8959%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=CJ%2fn3gDZtcrnW46OF6935w&sysid=1)_

|

name: Defeat Ron Johnson
subject: Meet the legislative grim reapers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
What’s giving us the creeps this spooky season? | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37760172/312475176/-1337061357?refcode=EM_FR_211020graveyard_N_drj_90DA_3_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODM2M2FlNS1mMjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQX2GC_rvaBb2ZjSJVtcFB_63bAXjtMBSnjMEoT_tS8=)
---
Peter,

What’s giving us the creeps this spooky season?

_**Mitch McConnell and Ron Johnson regaining the majority in 2022.**_

name: Adm. Mike
subject: My gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC
body:
I will be a Senator for all of Iowa, the rural and urban parts and small towns because there’s more that unites us than divides us. | | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjGjYwCRkuOYwc9_Q4VB2Q6AvsNuxolqV3Vjj1s-sjoE3zhVYzlJGjj30c3nfSS44vveFK8EUOHlHoTp_8Hj7T0NgnOnCPhc4B1Jdmj51Y0lHx2yjRhhz03staDdkfMPDfwbHVowsBwWgv9UeP18nNrsVvM0qrJQNLuVGMwTu6P5pJ2zGGxqyuIOX-xcpQ63C2dV8nc_EuMGgoWbvp6L5OLeIDcf8Dlq_kgWX5dLqdQqljILIoWKi2AmjAChq-gSa2hZ7Qr2YTQ3qvXzJPmwcz1RlcPag3h4cW36p5GtCP7n/3gb/D_eUxB2lSwuvXM1_a00HWw/h0/mHuaMQTIs2_OZiig8GXF8XMIZcfGZh3cDOQGx7K8LQQ)
---
**It’s been just a week since we launched our campaign for Senate. Since launching, two things stand out to me:**
1. The groundswell of support from fellow Iowans has been terrific and deeply appreciated. Thank you. You are the reason why I am running, friends.
2. Our country and our state are facing some of the biggest challenges of my lifetime. Our current Senators representing Iowa are too busy with partisan bickering to deliver for the people of the Hawkeye state.

I was born and raised in rural Sioux County as the youngest of 9. My dad, “Big Joe,” came back from WWII wounded and his ship sunk. He showed me the value of hard work when he built his machine shop from his own hands in Lebanon. We would spend hours together working on farm equipment and trucks. There were very few pieces of John Deere farm equipment that we didn’t work on. Their products are exceptional because of the superlative workers who make them, many of whom I consider dear friends.
Where my dad’s tireless work ethic made ample opportunity for me and my siblings, it’s harder now than ever before. Over the weekend, I visited John Deere workers with Local UAW 450 in Ankeny demanding fair wages and benefits for their work to listen to their concerns and support their fight.
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjGjYwCRkuOYwc9_Q4VB2Q6AvsNuxolqV3Vjj1s-sjoETXyLgVIyQhO3G90ObVtuhqFmoAYsW-Kg_StZ4WFj1hxDhNE6i-fMlq1crwc1lVduJ8G8fehbTYHDqEOxcdR0F5Pn0UU-gjiyA7PHP-cQtHyvdTpHjQRKejdHZgc8xOxpe57Rf0GdatQKNQ7I2ii7tIrVEVuBP5QYov1yWCP_7xDT6V3cOlgqC6xQoo-1PCVYbHAXlQu9Nvi47jhiNgE-RPOpG9E1npR0iN_Qp3vEVd9W_SU9q_yxq0pgNvAeRRIJ/3gb/D_eUxB2lSwuvXM1_a00HWw/h1/FhfTmrdKZXzC6F9AuJD78aWMYuuCcDBdtDaRk4gSvRo)
---
Hardworking families are struggling more and more to find stable footing in a system built against them. We need a leader in Washington who will cut through the partisan gridlock and deliver solutions to enhance the quality of life for all Iowans.
**I will be a Senator for all of Iowa because there’s more that unites us than divides us.**
So, thank you for your support. Together, we’re building the movement needed to send real leadership to Washington and represent Iowans in the US Senate.
V/r, Mike

After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, Admiral Mike Franken is home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa. **[Chip in to his campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xnpPS9ElAtCH4oZLR7595Zq09gnDzcRbJCOrFmiHYHnjGjYwCRkuOYwc9_Q4VB2Q6AvsNuxolqV3Vjj1s-sjoEqe5WmfBgh4ZTquIyA6Oahf-C6YsJ7b6uS8K88GQods_VBa0CHz9yXQl4v705_ScDEhgVaRwNw_lkaHlrAnkyTqwpHGqjmEStfxBE_hbbLHP4FHAxw6-LVmKQ_2Av43yupo-AtjvP-6A9i5pcHpoU-Ey2wE-W-7HtwiqYlxycdqDoZ-Ov6Jzz6fxVRhXmIdJo8KwsT5j8PgAluI6_mszdSNCHkVV_UBlnT8QzrWIQUiN_0gou67t1njOKhjNdMdrm/3gb/D_eUxB2lSwuvXM1_a00HWw/h2/BC79VDPlvUINGIW8EiElUZ3L9_skOXFtwt9jpjslDcw)**

clean_body: I will be a Senator for all of Iowa, the rural and urban parts and small towns because there’s more that unites us than divides us. | | | | It’s been just a week since we launched our campaign for Senate. Since launching, two things stand out to me: 1. The groundswell of support from fellow Iowans has been terrific and deeply appreciated. Thank you. You are the reason why I am running, friends. 2. Our country and our state are facing some of the biggest challenges of my lifetime. Our current Senators representing Iowa are too busy with partisan bickering to deliver for the people of the Hawkeye state. I was born and raised in rural Sioux County as the youngest of 9. My dad, “Big Joe,” came back from WWII wounded and his ship sunk. He showed me the value of hard work when he built his machine shop from his own hands in Lebanon. We would spend hours together working on farm equipment and trucks. There were very few pieces of John Deere farm equipment that we didn’t work on. Their products are exceptional because of the superlative workers who make them, many of whom I consider dear friends. Where my dad’s tireless work ethic made ample opportunity for me and my siblings, it’s harder now than ever before. Over the weekend, I visited John Deere workers with Local UAW 450 in Ankeny demanding fair wages and benefits for their work to listen to their concerns and support their fight. Hardworking families are struggling more and more to find stable footing in a system built against them. We need a leader in Washington who will cut through the partisan gridlock and deliver solutions to enhance the quality of life for all Iowans. I will be a Senator for all of Iowa because there’s more that unites us than divides us. So, thank you for your support. Together, we’re building the movement needed to send real leadership to Washington and represent Iowans in the US Senate. V/r, Mike After over 36 years serving in the United States Navy, Admiral Mike Franken is home to unseat Chuck Grassley and become the next Senator from Iowa. | | PAID FOR BY MICHAEL FRANKEN FOR IOWA, INC. Franken for Iowa PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 VICE ADMIRAL FRANKEN (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. | | | **Democratic Senator Joe Manchin is opposing President Biden's $3.5 trillion reconciliation package, which would be a game changer for working families and the fight against climate change.** Joe Manchin claims that some of these crucial policies don’t require immediate attention. But he’s wrong -- this package will help undo the damage of Trump’s presidency and move our country a huge step forward. [**Add your name to call on Joe Manchin to support Biden's reconciliation package >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e8b6f4d-f903-4775-9481-75c70bfd3ae2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) With a 50-50 split in the Senate, we need EVERY Democrat on board to pass the full reconciliation package, or President Biden’s agenda will fail. Help us keep up the pressure so we can convince Joe Manchin to do the right thing. **[Sign your name to tell Joe Manchin he has an obligation to the American people to support Biden's reconciliation package>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T310592a6-8c1a-4ece-b1e6-958d974f8a5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Your 2021 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7hr4mejubd23h9iam9aoded81fl65urusvj4mgg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj5c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onlmjinctthe8om2o32mmoj8cb66srb3cb1c9jbaoji65hm1o3gecqr2pr6cdg6eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d3665obbd9nmaqmcd30m9h3csh5u)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z13cj5h9qo1oj4m7muvodg6bog06fn36b2eohc48_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj5c1h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkhk642k6c47ijoqm71052osudlck2cv6t93eqjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj5c1h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj190cqhhi5tdkpg5qai51h1d3m06knruoou6228_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj5c1h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0ha9ffccjgkis577qmn01nochs24k5d5dru8s38_rp22sh2s8i66pj1cthmeoj5c1h2bs)**

body:
The Manchester mayoral race is close, and we need your support to take back the Queen City
Derek,
We need your support to take back the Mayor's office in the Queen City!
The race for mayor of Manchester is extremely close, and every little bit helps put Republican candidate Victoria Sullivan over the top.
We're heading into the final crucial step of the election - [your donation of $10, $25, or even $100 will help us secure a victory for our united Republican team.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-republican-state-committee-manchester-victory-fund%2Fdonate-today/1/0100017c9eed1ac4-68f95384-5c14-444a-be69-38d40777178f-000000/e9ZDLbme5v-AVkK6r_X1Ypx2RII=240)

_Congratulations, you 're one of them!_

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That's why we're asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi's socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

Friend,

Democrats recently released their maps, and no surprise Governor J.B. Pritzker once again lied to the people of Illinois.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=39ae985c640e4407a84ba8e4d01754a9&_e=Ewa2H6Pgpd0FG52xlAQhiKiBDuTakhkrcOwgp0o_ybfIQQed5Jjz77hI1GWfKgBpa9_a9aGre96A_QuwOIKwe7hDCnGmtiB8t5yBzIGqstao5sTVCdQrPmW6TVId7sxu8agWqAWmNhy0lN58JEX1dVVh7Sky3w02zkg283ZUpE6tDObYo7ja8D85XSpQZA5RkDrezM5wAhInwWl4ZzNAfSrTGXKEVwv1aRjyuRvbR_AJbESlfcO8NZQSyml_XzrmbowmxRnQuaFHwQoNfnliLPdTElT-Fr0IqpsrC5y5qijotr8yM1fED0o8ELEVhoU4t9rwV4dWo-3pDJQ8GZiWv1HyV1eUzgZ3qxhBwMh1iHO3AUSs0siLYCkyTi2ixVlfPtjL2IdU5zZpodso1HVGLW8kyu8WW1C1CVIbxY9Xpf7w7eO3ImgyWFXpCKV2biJj34GFx-9hn42peS55LfUITxREPXb1EZpKaCTAZv53Ve8Sw9KYXMXlD21t_vU-gFQ7)

When will we say ‘enough is enough’?

The answer is...
**TODAY!**

**Derek, faculty across all University of Pittsburgh campuses officially voted to form a union yesterday.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37760987/312478559/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_211020UN_N_CD_4_NG_N_P1&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmEyNzNjMC1mODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqzyHLyt9_5-ok-p5Oi3_twGhnK72k1NOBcZw3vWmXY=) This is the biggest union victory in the country this year, and it happened right here in western Pennsylvania. I was on the faculty organizing committee for this effort, and I'm so proud to see our work pay off — this is the culmination of years of organizing by so many, including the United Steelworkers.

This is a reminder that when we fight for our principles and build coalitions around our common values, we can make real changes that improve people's lives. We've sent a powerful message that after years of attacks from corporate interests, labor is done playing defense.

I will continue to fight for good-paying _union_ jobs on the campaign trail, and I'll be a strong ally to labor and workers in Congress. When unions are strong, our economy is strong, and working families have a real shot at the economic security that every American deserves.

In solidarity,

Chris | | | **Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy.** ****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37760988/312478560/1796049497?refcode=EM_C_211020UN_N_CD_4_NG_N_BioBox&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmEyNzNjMC1mODMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YqzyHLyt9_5-ok-p5Oi3_twGhnK72k1NOBcZw3vWmXY=)****

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: In-N-Out Is Shut Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Tide is Turning](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopx3DiQH7IIEml_fLXuQ5FQswUXsQCQnjVdJ5mxNmIQdw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_20&n=1) Yesterday, In-N-Out was shut down by San Francisco. Here’s the company’s response: _“We refuse to become the vaccination police for any government. We fiercely disagree with any government dictate that forces a private company to discriminate against customers who choose to patronize their business.”_ My [tweet](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharMXtudRaN2Wf2Q8kX8eVN96uhUlM4tcnVoUfqz_CLQ5iA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_20&n=2) about In-N-Out's stand has been seen and shared by more people than anything I've ever posted. Freedom Fries has a new meaning. This comes a day after parents, students, and teachers made their voices heard in statewide protests against Newsom’s new mandate. Thousands turned out for one of the biggest rallies ever at the Capitol. Seeing this citizen pushback, not a single other state has followed Newsom and imposed a student mandate. Our Governor has embarrassed himself again, and momentum is growing for a return to sanity. It can’t come soon enough. In the name of "safety," a school district in Davis just announced students would have to eat lunch outside in the rain. A school in Sonoma is making kids “chew with their masks on.” Cruelty to children has been normalized. Thank you to everyone who is fighting back for our kids, for our freedoms, for our future. It’s making all the difference. [Help me fight the insanity](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_20&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzChhjjbBxpJXS4029nIA6Mo1azRKY8GpQa_vU_x7miww&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_20&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_20&n=5)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_20&n=6).

| | Derek, I have to be blunt. **_[The very last filing deadline of this campaign is tomorrow night, and I’m really worried about our fundraising goal of hitting 300,000 contributions by then. Will you rush a donation right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761343/312480355/-2023814932?refcode=20211020.7_TM_10FI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTdhMGE3Ny1mOTMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-pB1O3Kd_vna_KmHnK8Vc2tcoEoLVVZ1bKep2Fc_urQ=)_**

Last week, we saw — as plain as day — what Donald Trump’s six-time endorsement of Glenn Youngkin really means.

At his disgusting anti-democratic rally last week, Trump promised that Youngkin would “do all the things we want a governor to do.”

And we saw Trump’s rally attendees pledge their allegiance to a flag that was used at the deadly riot on January 6.

We can’t let a guy like Glenn Youngkin embolden extremists in Virginia, Derek. Our democracy is counting on us to win.

And right now, winning isn’t a lock. In fact, a new poll from a top-rated _FiveThirtyEight_ pollster shows Youngkin beating me by a single point.

We still have time to turn this around, but I’m going to need your support to do it.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp11pho8vbogni4cflq55e3fmo7nbm31dcc6s8j0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp3fdlje5pj4c74e9rreptgsor73d1j6hgjedj76uqrbdr6ehq62d5ke5qe4t1gsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imhj32sllm1jreoj664ob4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c5jmeo30s9hm49fg)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zaq06de0ceaqilr4iruo94sk2f104sklo4bofbm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72cdh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvqaesledl1uu0rqht39nu6qi222jnfgs628n1s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72cdh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ze865bk5alhnm05oeov9d7bphl69e9gsokgftma8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72cdh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6554a39np8f1b10d5n0gtkvdiatlh37o2a0lgfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72cdh2bs)**

If your wallet has been feeling extra light lately, you can thank Joe Biden. If your wallet has been feeling extra light lately, you can thank Joe Biden. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=712cee3e5fe14471a34028d843a77eb0&_e=zujc12JbRBiJ8Sb5OtmxyqvKqgoONtrwe_1RieYIEc82BNlGQ_wm192FSjDfd2Nz5ySNfuWfBFCiKfgDbHDunfQYsJMJFuqg_BGOaN1QiD92yQIwCHwOw_feYNPRsgm_joANkhPVgWGmuXJiLAWpTTYYKfj2KYOW7hkQPahPXUEPMVmKj3kIKsNxQ2nHPHdpljSTUeKoo-dpPHLZgpMPjySgsbnJ_xNJvG18hgL5jv9d-ZSmQJtM_D23EYN8LU20MckpiRxEuICklzYxE9hhQUWw2HIGkpmPoM1W__u0XfS-LAoJB-EsQHw-MLUJKx4nB85BUHnx9S6TLEg36ghqwq0M29nB1lNNoTVV_eZeUpblP3ZpPxGP_s5ScmhBM35iqj46sHCFWlAJL7uaoSlrdvWMl2I6UT0l21UHM3gUAEyD2bNN5pKwBgk_K-r0IF5GoFadvgfNmromSizhlYZ24w%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Say hello to **INFLATION.**

If your wallet has been feeling extra light lately, you can thank Joe Biden. Because all he and his Democrat friends want to do is tax and spend. _They have no idea what it costs to live in America under their atrocious policies._

They’ve left us with gas prices reaching the highest level since October 2014 and a long list of other things costing more like:
* Houses
* Rent
* Food
* Electricity
* Furniture
* New Cars
* TVs
* Restaurant Meals

Biden is trying to sell a ‘Build back better’ plan but all his plan is doing for Americans is wrecking our economy, creating government dependence, and driving up already record-high inflation. **_It’s time to put an end to bidenflation._**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=712cee3e5fe14471a34028d843a77eb0&_e=zujc12JbRBiJ8Sb5OtmxyqvKqgoONtrwe_1RieYIEc82BNlGQ_wm192FSjDfd2Nz5ySNfuWfBFCiKfgDbHDunfQYsJMJFuqg_BGOaN1QiD92yQIwCHwOw_feYNPRsgm_joANkhPVgWGmuXJiLAWpTTYYKfj2KYOW7hkQPahPXUEPMVmKj3kIKsNxQ2nHPHdpljSTUeKoo-dpPHLZgpMPjySgsbnJ_xNJvG18hgL5jv9d-ZSmQJtM_D23EYN8LU20utuwg1Zdi2X9UubdfkSZ7YTUv2LbDoMX4_pNxpMvdEb4Wddz_fdOLsA7nAHGsFE4L8hRTll6tiANz_eTTdT_VtZ-gD_ko--fkIDlg2Yj2vUZKK3SOyDLfAru8elyzIvNVHbABw_6PbX-e2Yv8OiY0irR-I7KOJEjhB17beo5NgocpKNF4kgSA5xQ-zeKFkywrDhCnTmnkBmGONocKvkH5w%3D%3D)
The only way we are going to get America back on track is by stopping Biden and taking back the House Majority in 2022. **_The road back to the majority starts here in Florida’s 9th district - where we can flip a Democrat seat Republican and get our majority back._**

[**Will you please chip in $100, $50, or even $5 right now to help me pull off a win for Republicans in 2022?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=712cee3e5fe14471a34028d843a77eb0&_e=zujc12JbRBiJ8Sb5OtmxyqvKqgoONtrwe_1RieYIEc82BNlGQ_wm192FSjDfd2Nz5ySNfuWfBFCiKfgDbHDunfQYsJMJFuqg_BGOaN1QiD92yQIwCHwOw_feYNPRsgm_joANkhPVgWGmuXJiLAWpTTYYKfj2KYOW7hkQPahPXUEPMVmKj3kIKsNxQ2nHPHdpljSTUeKoo-dpPHLZgpMPjySgsbnJ_xNJvG18hgL5jv9d-ZSmQJtM_D23EYN8LU20uBLnEUIwUdvQYZL3eUz77PATJuuqjcunbRbR-m5VSt6et3wC5eQU8p8TuuTt4zU6f53RBBGDJhsnfzai0Un4NViEpXA9k3MKhMVcdlvOUW9WafHfN6R7nBCWBs20Rg43xpVoxjfAabir7igNz1fWfrdsXcp8wNsxxdcAZRRGLdiM1rgC_MmxijymXQMpTuXIci_1Kd7jcsgnIbJhkXnaJg%3D%3D)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zafmril4r6dde3ai3s4efa25np3769ffs81vvji0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72clh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zojnttiakfaa52q6kirl139cmhinkg2gfa9bh7tg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72clh2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcrdl39n2net6nehkhjhf8lhlulmv7t8mrl8d80_rp22sh2s8i66pj1ctjm0o72clh2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z0a6t1ih1eh8log76uakbc6s2902btkkdlq97a60).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z147ng0p6hl7b1jh5u1oq3269hcuuo3qqqqsmg8o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6c5jmeo30s9im49fg)

---
Peter,

**[13 DAYS UNTIL THE BIGGEST GOVERNOR ELECTION IN VIRGINIA'S MODERN HISTORY.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58576219:6IKQDi2Nt:m:1:3253819041:CC18D3690A5E40C681DC332331769BE9:r)**

In 13 days, we find out if our great Commonwealth will continue down a dark path towards government overregulation, if our school curriculum will be controlled by liberal special interests, and if our great Commonwealth will be governed by a businessman like Glenn or a lying career politician like Terry.

In 13 days, so much is at stake -- it is hard for us to even put into words.

_**If you 've never been political before, THIS is the time to care about politics. This is the time to call your friends and get your friends to care about politics.**_

Because in 13 days, our freedoms as Virginians are more in jeopardy than ever before.

Terrible Terry isn't just a nickname -- **it 's a reality.** His failure to lead will hold us back the next four years.

**[This is why we are unlocking 5X MATCHING FOR 13 DAYS:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58576219:6IKQDi2Nt:m:1:3253819041:CC18D3690A5E40C681DC332331769BE9:r)**

**[This is a time for choosing: Virginians must make a critical choice for the future of our Commonwealth and for America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58576219:6IKQDi2Nt:m:1:3253819041:CC18D3690A5E40C681DC332331769BE9:r)**

Team Youngkin

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: defend the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
This issue is personal for me as it is for so many Americans.

| The Trump Presidency is over, but Postmaster General Louis DeJoy is still in charge of our Postal Service, and he continues to push policies to undermine the institution. On October 1st, the USPS began to slow its delivery times. This is outrageous.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761602/312481615/-506134376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8Tzaiweu1dGCS2HCOHui435oWJjvs0VncGfvsNHtW0=&emci=d0d62cea-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3647fdf1-fc31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14239920)
**The solution is clear: the USPS Board of Governors must fire Louis DeJoy. **[_**If you agree, sign our petition today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761603/312481616/-506134376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8Tzaiweu1dGCS2HCOHui435oWJjvs0VncGfvsNHtW0=&emci=d0d62cea-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3647fdf1-fc31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14239920)
| [DEJOY MUST GO ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761604/312481617/-506134376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8Tzaiweu1dGCS2HCOHui435oWJjvs0VncGfvsNHtW0=&emci=d0d62cea-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3647fdf1-fc31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14239920)
---
This issue is personal for me as it is for so many Americans — my aunt and uncle are long-time postal employees who continued to work through the pandemic. As the largest civilian employer of veterans, a primary engine of small businesses, the trusted go-between for seniors receiving prescriptions, and so much more we need to do everything we can to ensure it can continue to deliver cost-effective services for Americans.

In Congress, I am working to hold DeJoy accountable and stop efforts to privatize the USPS. Now, the Board of Governors needs to do its job and replace DeJoy with someone who understands the value of the USPS and wants to protect it, not dismantle it. [_**If you agree, add your name to our petition today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761605/312481618/-506134376?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8Tzaiweu1dGCS2HCOHui435oWJjvs0VncGfvsNHtW0=&emci=d0d62cea-b631-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3647fdf1-fc31-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=14239920)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: breaking news about the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Sen. Grassley is responsible for Texas' extreme abortion ban going into effect in the first place...
| | |
---
Peter – this is big: **The Biden administration just officially asked the Supreme Court to block Texas' abortion ban, and the Court's decision could come within days.**
I'm hoping and praying that the Court makes the right decision here. But you know as well as I do the reality of how this conservative majority – which my opponent Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) was instrumental in cementing – might rule. As we've seen with how things have played out in Texas, we cannot rely on the courts to protect our right to choose.
We need to guarantee every American's reproductive rights in a way that isn't dependent on the whims of controversially appointed justices – and the only way to do that is through codifying Roe v. Wade into law. Sen. Grassley supports the exact opposite and has spent his whole career undermining reproductive freedoms. **[(I'm more resolved than ever to defeat Sen. Grassley, and you can pitch in a donation here to help me win.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761612/312481653/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RjWynRxIQ1oRxCPT38hr-4d7GKtfPddJxkqh3WQV60=)**
To be clear, Sen. Grassley is responsible for Texas' extreme abortion ban going into effect in the first place. As then-chair of the Judiciary Committee, Sen. Grassley blocked consideration of President Obama's Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, and then rammed through two of Donald Trump's nominees, who in turn allowed Texas' law to go into effect. **When Americans – the vast majority of whom support Roe v. Wade – look at the Supreme Court and see a far-right conservative majority that doesn't reflect them and our country today, they have Sen. Grassley to blame.**
This is why it's so important that we protect our Senate majority – and elect pro-choice women to the Senate who will fight for our right to choose. I can promise you I am ready for those fights, because I've taken them on before in the Iowa House and in Congress.******I know what those tough fights look like and I will always – _always_ – stand by my values.**
So ahead of the Supreme Court's imminent decision, I'm asking you to make a donation to my campaign to defeat Sen. Grassley, elect a pro-choice woman to the Senate and bring real leadership to Iowa – leadership that will always fight for our right to choose. **[Please, can you donate $5 to my campaign so that we can flip Iowa blue, expand our Senate majority and codify Roe v. Wade for future generations? Every dollar gets us one step closer to defeating Sen. Grassley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761613/312481654/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RjWynRxIQ1oRxCPT38hr-4d7GKtfPddJxkqh3WQV60=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37761614/312481655/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk339-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzQ3ZmRmMS1mYzMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RjWynRxIQ1oRxCPT38hr-4d7GKtfPddJxkqh3WQV60=)
---
I know that these are difficult times for so many of us. So I sincerely thank you for all that you do and for standing with me in this fight.

– Abby

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: I'm Taking Georgia Back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
Call on Governor Kemp to Take Action & Join Vernon Jones
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Vernon Jones for Georgia \- October 20th, 2021 -
---
|
---
Take Action
The Georgia Constitution allows for governors to add subjects to special sessions before the session begins. Join me in demanding that Governor Kemp amend his agenda for the special session on Nov. 3 and add these four items.

* Independent forensic audit of all 159 counties
* ban by law, CRT from K-12 schools
* make Georgia Constitutional Carry State
* replace the Dominion voting machines in order to restore public trust in voting
* ban vaccine mandates by any entity

[Sign the Online Petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Ntj5zAPBLq-Ifrqm7L9Y6rnm5qR2JJ0GaesUVbqPqrTdhv5dG1LFJEYOzqa1wYNMO3Tko7ugHrB2HV_P8ZPggRVuylO5-JfhHTI64meJJDkP8Xz-J4GUgdOYkkCUvHpdLQ7tzE6BSO1GiU9cqkVVlnJIT2hg4jhppf7ZWnh2DZZH00nYqPZ74NrnJReGJV0ZTyRg-sKJ4blBm_ndOJNJEWJ9i8BUOtr86FkwF8AsmuU3_JLtXTSxO4zLrrTEfLHK&c=BEFDdnlRcnK117v4fKKFUtb2zq3WHXAWUkkCpkdAIOZKjDUWvWgjKA==&ch=-z29Tfhilu5tAwenOyenSZSjlohFahkKZcbcEjepLP6bz1AA7rSqDA==)
---
Volunteer Opportunities
The Vernon Jones for Governor campaign is putting together county leadership teams and is recruiting volunteers to join the movement. If you would like to be part of your county's leadership team or are interested in volunteering, please email teamjones@jonesforgeorgia.com or call 404-459-4556.
---
News
Union, Barrow Counties both passed a resolution for an audit at their GOP meetings.

---
| |
---|---
|
This past week I visited Jasper, Pike, Towns, Barrow, Murray & Whitfield Counties. Thank you to all who came out, I could not be happier meeting so many wonderful Patriots! This week I'll be stopping by Mitchell County. Next week I'll be in Putnam County.

When I become governor, I will be a governor for all. Traveling around Georgia allows me to meet many people and see many places that establishment politicians would never go to. That is one of the biggest differences between me and the elites. I'll fight harder, work longer for you, and put you first because I know you.

We're in this together. Your support means so much to me. Let's Take Georgia Back!
| |
---|---
|

To my fellow Georgians,

I could not be more proud of the grassroots support I have gotten from all around the great state of Georgia. YOU are what makes this campaign special. The establishment is afraid of us because they know no matter how much money they spend and how many lies they tell, the power is in the hands of the people.

I look forward to meeting more of you as we continue this fight for freedom.

I want you to join me in this fight. Let's Take Georgia Back.

Your friend,

Vernon Jones
Candidate for Governor
| |
---|---
|

Next Stops:

Saturday 10/23 5:15PM: 2nd District GOP - South Georgia Republican Rally & Low Country Boil (197 GA Hwy 262 N Pelham, GA 31779)

Monday 10/25 7:00PM: Putnam County GOP Meeting (1081 Greensboro Rd, Eatonton, GA 32024)

Tuesday 11/9 6:30PM: Habersham County (217 Scoggins Dr, Demorest, GA 30535)

So many of our politicians these days are bankrolled by the wealthy, large corporations, and special interest groups.

This system allows corporate interests to have a disproportionate role in shaping our government’s policies. _**And many of these corporate interests are diametrically opposed to working class needs.**_

That’s why my campaign is doing things differently. In fact, we always have. From the start, this campaign was built by grassroots activists and everyday Americans who stepped up in small but important ways to fund this campaign.

_**And because this campaign is funded by you, I’ve been able to represent you authentically.**_ Together, we’ve fought for LGBTQ+ rights, stood up to MAGA extremism, championed veterans’ well-being, fought against Asian hate, and so much more.

To this day, my campaign -- this progressive movement -- has been built by small-dollar donors like you, Peter -- not corporate interests and billionaires.

**And I wouldn’t have it any other way. Because we’ve proven that $1 can change the world for the better.**

[**That’s why I’m calling on each and every one of you to chip in just $1 to my campaign to keep building on our successes, fight back against hateful extremism, and build a better nation that works for all Americans. Can I count on you to chip in just $1 right now? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37762812/312483970/232128462?amount=1&amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=MTFC_20211020_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTYxM2IwZS1mZjMxLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFGwdooLowqtYju-ADqcEu3DhvOMK5zeDRJF3VskdH4=)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: HUMILIATING defeat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **WASHINGTON POST: "Democrats are running out of time"**
I'm speechless.

**FIRST:** I watched Republicans spread dangerous lies to discredit Democrats' election victory.

**THEN:** I watched them launch over 400 voter suppression bills nationwide to keep Democrats from ever winning again.

**NOW:** Reports indicate our Democrats could be locked out of the Majority for a DECADE if we don't act quickly.
| [I don't say this lightly: Republicans are INCHES from sweeping back into power and DESTROYING our Democratic House Majority. Not on my watch.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_)
---

**[I’m calling for a flood of grassroots support like I’ve never seen before -- 1,000 gifts before midnight -- to close our budget gap and rip Republicans’ plans of regaining power to shreds. I’m asking for your help and your $3 to hand House Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can you step up to defend our House Democrats before midnight? It would mean everything to me. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

I need you to make a pivotal choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Republicans pass voter suppression bills nationwide, DESCEND on our Majority, and take back power for a DECADE.

\-- Or we can RISE UP, send a STUNNING response, and show Republicans they will NEVER take the House from us.

**[I can’t tell you how much your $3 to defend our House Majority would mean in this moment. Will you stand with me? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/gpgkTREdWDM~)**
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
| [**Chip in $1 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---
| [**Chip in $35 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $50 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/2WXVQr-)
---
| [**Chip in $100 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Chip in $250 immediately >> **](https://links.e.dccc.)
---
| [**Or chip in another amount >> **](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)
---

Thank you,

Nancy

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45810562&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjE2MzI5MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45810562&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMjE2MzI5MAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: ENEMY OF THE PEOPLE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
The press is intentionally lying |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9262fc46c2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Have you ever wondered why good leaders like President Trump and Governor DeSantis all hate the media so much?

Mostly, it's because the media lies. President Trump was right; they truly are the "enemy of the people"!

[_That's why real America First leaders like me have to ask for your help- we can't depend on free media. We have to pay to get the truth out!_](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a18a4afa8f&e=afa21b7626)

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6124fb26e3&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto- a Dem media darling!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2bc7610765&e=afa21b7626)
---
| It used to be that guys like Brian Williams and Dan Rather hid their bias. Now the media is coming on out and celebrating it!

_Reporters from several outlets supported calls to end "both-siderism" in media with even harsher treatment of Republicans after another columnist decried covering Democrats too critically.

Los Angeles Times columnist Jackie Calmes published an opinion piece titled "Why journalists are failing the public with ‘both-siderism’ in political coverage." Calmes, a New York Times reporter before joining the Los Angeles Times, called out "journalistic pressure" to produce seemingly balanced stories that prevents journalists from reporting what she referred to as "the new truth."

She targeted journalists who "focus critically on President Biden and Democrats" as opposed to "Republicans’ obstructions."

Calmes repeatedly criticized Republicans, warning that "democracy is literally at stake" surrounding the GOP’s recent election laws.

"This is a Republican Party that is not serious about governing or addressing the nation's actual problems, as opposed to faux ones like critical race theory," Calmes wrote._

_So, let me get this straight.... idiots like this actually think that, with total Democrat control over the Federal government, the disaster in Afghanistan, runaway inflation, open border humanitarian crisis, empty shelves, and COVID out of control... that it's the REPUBLICANS that need accountability???_

**These people are crazy, high on crack. Biden is a disaster, and they want to coddle him. **

This is why the media has next to no trust from the American people. They are living in an alternate universe. They are not truth-tellers; they are leftist activists.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8d2a012dc9&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _The media is totally out of control. The only way to treat them is with utter contempt- to deny them funding and deny them interviews._

They wouldn't know the truth if it hit them over the head.

[I will go around them to get out the truth about our country.](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b98abe3def&e=afa21b7626) And here's the truth:

-My district is a tossup, trending red.
-I won more votes than any Republican Congressional candidate ever had here.
-Trump really won the 2020 election.
-Biden is destroying the country.
-[I will get this truth out to the voters, with YOUR help!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=985609fa92&e=afa21b7626)

_I will stand up for America against Biden and his media apologists. We can save this country together!_

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and put a check on Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=996f22b279&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=04db3e8886&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=350259aef2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a516331463&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3bae037adf&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Calmes repeatedly criticized Republicans, warning that "democracy is literally at stake" surrounding the GOP’s recent election laws. "This is a Republican Party that is not serious about governing or addressing the nation's actual problems, as opposed to faux ones like critical race theory," Calmes wrote. So, let me get this straight.... idiots like this actually think that, with total Democrat control over the Federal government, the disaster in Afghanistan, runaway inflation, open border humanitarian crisis, empty shelves, and COVID out of control... that it's the REPUBLICANS that need accountability??? These people are crazy, high on crack. Biden is a disaster, and they want to coddle him. This is why the media has next to no trust from the American people. They are living in an alternate universe. They are not truth-tellers; they are leftist activists. | | The media is totally out of control. The only way to treat them is with utter contempt- to deny them funding and deny them interviews. They wouldn't know the truth if it hit them over the head. And here's the truth: -My district is a tossup, trending red. -I won more votes than any Republican Congressional candidate ever had here. -Trump really won the 2020 election. -Biden is destroying the country. - I will stand up for America against Biden and his media apologists. We can save this country together! Help me bring America First policies to Congress! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. | | PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved. We need 28 more responses from 18326, but we haven't heard from you yet: DO YOU APPROVE OF PRESIDENT BIDEN? | | | | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. // RESPONSE PENDING FROM dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, President Biden has been in office for less than a year, but he's already taken huge strides to clean up Donald Trump's mess and get our country back on track. Just since January, he has: Passed a $1.9 TRILLION pandemic relief package – sending direct checks to struggling families, cutting child poverty in half and massively speeding up vaccine distribution. Rejoined the Paris climate accords, helping the United States be part of the solution to the climate crisis. Introduced a massive infrastructure plan to create millions of good-paying jobs across the country and improve everything from roads to rural broadband access. It's clear that President Biden is doing exactly what he promised – and that the GOP can't stand it. Biden may have the support of 90% of Democrats, but Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are doing everything they can to BLOCK Biden's agenda and stonewall our progress! To fight back with our full grassroots strength, we need to know where voters in 18326 stand – NOW. But our poll is closing at 11:59 p.m. tonight and your response is missing!
