name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Healthcare Policy, Dr. Ryan Cole, and Idahoans Facing Unemployment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
At a time when most businesses are scrambling to find more employees, others are discriminating against and even terminating qualified employees... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-10-20-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e7c30354ec&e=823fa8e224)
---
| |
## Dr. Ryan Cole
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| Throughout this year, we have witnessed establishment forces target Dr. Ryan Cole, who has appeared at several of our events. Dr. Cole offers a fresh and independent perspective on individual health and the role proactive choices make in allowing our immune systems to fight off viruses and other illnesses. The Idaho Medical Association filed a complaint with the Idaho Board of Medicine claiming that Dr. Cole is causing harm — not by his actions, but by saying things the establishment doesn't want you to hear. The growing scourge of censorship that we have witnessed from the government and big tech is also present in medicine, and it is working overtime to silence medical professionals who refuse to parrot the establishment's talking points. I encourage you to speak up on Dr. Cole's behalf by contacting the Idaho Medical Association and the Idaho Board of Medicine. Send them a message of support for Dr. Cole and call on them to put an end to this politically motivated witch-hunt. Idaho Medical Association
Phone: (208) 344-7888
Email: [mail@idmed.org](mailto:mail@idmed.org) Idaho Board of Medicine
Phone: (208) 327-7000
Email: [info@bom.idaho.gov](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=88c064e1d7&e=823fa8e224)
---
|
---
|
## Idahoans Facing Unemployment
---
| At a time when most businesses are scrambling to find more employees, others are discriminating against and even terminating qualified employees for their personal medical decisions. Wilson Boots, one of my friends and constituents, recently [had his religious exemption denied and was fired from Washington State University](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3067c67537&e=823fa8e224) because he made the personal health choice not to receive a covid vaccine. Washington State University was in the news recently for firing football coach Nick Rolovich over his decision not to get the vaccine. Rolovich has said [he will file a lawsuit](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ca91e4675a&e=823fa8e224) over the university's "discriminatory and vindictive" behavior. Another of my constituents, whose helicopter company works with the federal government to fight fires, recently received notice that he will be required to agree to a host of new "COVID-19 safety protocols" and release the government from "any and all liability" in order to maintain his contract with the federal government. There are many other such stories across the state and nation as well. Idaho should be leading the way in fighting against these mandates that grossly violate the liberty, self-ownership, and bodily autonomy of the individual. No one should ever be forced or coerced into receiving a vaccine, and I will continue to call on legislative leadership to reconvene the legislature and take up legislation to protect Idahoans from these intrusive and tyrannical mandates.
---
|
---
|
## Healthcare Policy and Solutions
---
| Like most of our country, Idaho is suffering a healthcare crisis. There is a shortage of providers (which has been exacerbated by vaccine mandates), rapidly rising costs, and mounting political pressures to stifle effective treatments in order to push the establishment's preferred procedure. While there is no single solution to these challenges, there are a number of different options we could pursue in order to improve our situation. From expanding on existing ideas like Direct Primary Care to implementing revolutionary concepts like independent hospitals operating outside of the federal controls tied to Medicare and Medicaid, there are ways for the market to help alleviate these problems. I am working with stakeholders and leaders in our state to pursue these and other solutions as we work to fight back against the unconstitutional mandates of the Biden administration and the cronyistic collusion that has become so pervasive in our state. Idahoans deserve a healthcare system that prioritizes their needs, decisions, and beliefs above the preferences and wishes of special interests. This means providing treatments that have been shown to work and not berating or deprioritizing those who choose not to participate in experimental and unproven medical procedures. These changes won't happen overnight, but I am confident that Idaho can overcome our healthcare challenges without surrendering our personal autonomy or state sovereignty. I will continue to work for you and to oppose vaccine mandates in all cases. Such medical decisions are personal and they should be freely made, NEVER based on force or coercion.
---
|
---
|
## Upcoming Events
---
| This Saturday, Dr. Duke Pesta will be at the Idaho Liberty Summit in Challis, Idaho, to give a presentation on "Pursuing the Love of Learning". I will be speaking as well along with several other conservative candidates. The event will take place at Living Waters Ranch from 10:00 am - 4:00 pm. Please contact Darr Moon at [darr@custertel.net](mailto:darr@custertel.net) for more information. On Sunday, Dr. Pesta will be speaking in Idaho Falls at The Paramount Theatre (285 Niagara St) from 11:00 am - 12:30 pm. I will be present at that event as well. There is no charge for the event but donations are accepted. If you have questions, please contact Darr Moon at [darr@custertel.net](mailto:darr@custertel.net).
---
|
---
|
## Choose Life
---
| One of the issues I care about most is protecting the sanctity of life. I believe life begins at conception and that all individuals, including the unborn, have unalienable rights. I have a 100% pro-life voting record, and as a legislator, I worked to implement a "Women's Informed Consent" law, which provides women considering abortions with valuable information and resources. I also sponsored and enacted a bill that provides a woman an opportunity to view an ultrasound image of her unborn child. Did you know that in 2020, the Idaho Legislature approved a "Choose Life" license plate? If you would like to get one (and help support Choose Life Idaho, Inc.), just ask at your local DMV or apply online at [itd.idaho.gov/itddmv](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=1a123711df&e=823fa8e224).
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Stop The Mandates!
---
| As I said earlier, Idaho should be leading the way in fighting against these mandates that grossly violate the liberty, self-ownership, and bodily autonomy of the individual. I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to **_Make Idaho Free Again!_** We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. Will you help stop the mandates that are infringing on our rights and liberties?
---
| [Stop The Mandates!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e9e17de26d&e=823fa8e224 "Stop The Mandates!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=3db4468e80&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=85f29acf59&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5433b1c48d&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8869c56fc3&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=df4f50fc6b&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| Sincerely,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=5e883784b4&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=fe155a5e8e&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e6043bc2b7&e=823fa8e224)
---
| [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c3ddf77f1d&e=823fa8e224)

Peter,
The mainstream media continues to provide cover for Joe Biden's inept presidency. This time, they have come up with an excuse for Joe Biden’s economic crisis. They are telling Americans to “lower your expectations” over short-staffed businesses and supply chain issues.

The Biden administration has the gall to say that the American people are the problem, and the mainstream media is propagating this poor excuse. _**American middle class families are the victims of Biden's disastrous policies, and what the mainstream media is doing is nothing more than victim shaming.**_

body:
Democratic rule is Destroying my state of New York. Don’t let AOC’s socialism destroy our great nation.
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7542ee4003db486587289cf42f5cb7d5&_e=z9hI1otXKwhs0WpmLgc-oItTRf8NVcTvJZaEwYScwGDqM35NekxOfhFQSW1PLQczOmz6B6tV6Lb0oXKAb1m7Dqea6HPbru7vql8OcyqTVtegykrse3BUPt8CwiZXoDrTkvX2GmkTmpxUjfxUK3MowScT11X9OJRCt3QDZSNL5yPNLOnVf7WkBsxgen9raKMBVB4ppiqBNyeuKNIh7TP6qnajIRGavhzljrUDLNZnAcgmFzgXQ0FMPE-vgQqgOV5RweRUusRq4Pi3l_8d7I2_bvLCiK-L-GLByUOaWFflXzo9hHMBOwdZC40s9vber4wdo5G5pSNG69uTOYXe8rtgTwyXQN-76EzeveSjEfRO4pSgssJZCP57Weh6QFY0YSdIaDbaAxGsfRhQKbJuAG4YpkvwtmQsK98MQMG0Es8qCgybU-t1jjpeh3iA51blcIDbiIUZbprTM4Tw6inuAPyrYw%3D%3D)

| Peter,

I need you to know something: _**America is worth fighting for.**_

[** FIGHT FOR AMERICA >>> JOIN MY TEAM **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7542ee4003db486587289cf42f5cb7d5&_e=z9hI1otXKwhs0WpmLgc-oItTRf8NVcTvJZaEwYScwGDqM35NekxOfhFQSW1PLQczOmz6B6tV6Lb0oXKAb1m7Dqea6HPbru7vql8OcyqTVtegykrse3BUPt8CwiZXoDrTkvX2GmkTmpxUjfxUK3MowScT11X9OJRCt3QDZSNL5yPNLOnVf7WkBsxgen9raKMBVB4ppiqBNyeuKNIh7TP6qnajIRGavhzljrUDLNZnAcgmFzgXQ0FMPE-vgQqgOV5RvDfrF_YvP_ApsDEc2j5KBDe0rMzY0N1crcHkCgnRDttgwO49ZuUraSz21KvKkb5rxda-jQsiK8Qt9kxmwDCqy1mulP_I5lJymxoc5nJmzmgM--vasUZ9POV2P_rpgAqW4PEmjFpry4jmYR-qHZXiBBGPd-ZRaFDvvAAFdGnnJQ5P3DQJBUAEgsdnOU6chdSIlNxjd6y7AuHrGvOcR5IekQ%3D%3D)
If you look outside or read the news, you might think that hope to save our country from progressive socialists like AOC or Bernie Sanders is fleeting, but it’s not.

The common-sense movement to restore constitutional and fair rule to our country is just starting, _**and we need you in it Peter.**_

If we don’t win, then it’s two more years of Pelosi-led chaos that we cannot afford. _**Help the GOP by pitching in to show these limousine liberals we’re not afraid of them or their money.**_

**We need to fight not just for ourselves, but for our children and our future.**

I’m talking about fighting for the future of our communities, the well-being of our neighbors, and stopping the America we know from being burned into an image that only AOC and Bernie Sanders want.

[** FIGHT FOR AMERICA >>> JOIN MY TEAM **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7542ee4003db486587289cf42f5cb7d5&_e=z9hI1otXKwhs0WpmLgc-oItTRf8NVcTvJZaEwYScwGDqM35NekxOfhFQSW1PLQczOmz6B6tV6Lb0oXKAb1m7Dqea6HPbru7vql8OcyqTVtegykrse3BUPt8CwiZXoDrTkvX2GmkTmpxUjfxUK3MowScT11X9OJRCt3QDZSNL5yPNLOnVf7WkBsxgen9raKMBVB4ppiqBNyeuKNIh7TP6qnajIRGavhzljrUDLNZnAcgmFzgXQ0FMPE-vgQqgOV5RdT8YGXXP907PlPdAFJ9__dR1dr7UKIjASsmcBKZT3KrJUux5btR7kTxHIJasQ3zSrjZMmf_epHV2GxD6xLYhnvL2MJzmIeSrftwDCB6YtlvATc9b5ZYin6OuAWXpUu5_eEwi-6HT0ZEERvt1JNCdNRbOeGolf1hM8V5dc_JpuHS4v2gBCkGpRAa9p-DTpZhgeAxjD3wBxSPrsz0v-e1zkA%3D%3D)
We must fight for the small business owners and farmers that are praying for help, for the workers who are struggling to make ends meet, and for those who are being censored and pushed to the side. **This is a fight for a better tomorrow that we are not ashamed of.**

**We cannot allow socialists like AOC and Bernie Sanders to take that future away.**

I need your help Peter. **Help me win a seat that the liberals bought in 2020, and help Republicans take back the house in 2022.**

[** FIGHT FOR AMERICA >>> JOIN MY TEAM **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=7542ee4003db486587289cf42f5cb7d5&_e=z9hI1otXKwhs0WpmLgc-oItTRf8NVcTvJZaEwYScwGDqM35NekxOfhFQSW1PLQczOmz6B6tV6Lb0oXKAb1m7Dqea6HPbru7vql8OcyqTVtegykrse3BUPt8CwiZXoDrTkvX2GmkTmpxUjfxUK3MowScT11X9OJRCt3QDZSNL5yPNLOnVf7WkBsxgen9raKMBVB4ppiqBNyeuKNIh7TP6qnajIRGavhzljrUDLNZnAcgmFzgXQ0FMPE-vgQqgOV5R9HctUkU1pKTmL2yPvnvJYZ02P-Zmuj3iVlzxOkBcHNg3h2EOl6Xx4t_ZnUlKwQSWw4Vi2oXwBO9jzK_MKc70RRVvVcDrNyKrRWmxyAsq8HzzodPKFG3crQ4XX5QvCFSM9Qq5YwUgMCHqoX45VW3txB8T2_T4fYdv5oJQ-Hbtnj9EvHQ078kdCyfHqAZDbGYz5FLOnCQhFBfK9s-yDVhTsw%3D%3D)
Thank you and God bless,

**Marc Molinaro**

name: John Fetterman
subject: no bullsh*t
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211020-3094-header&t=1&akid=3094%2E434096%2EcZ5kml)
Peter,
Just moments ago, the Freedom to Vote Act — a piece of vital + urgent legislation to save our democracy — failed in the Senate because of a GOP filibuster.
I will offer you no bullsh*t about why this happened today:
Some Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema are refusing to vote to end the filibuster — instead choosing to blow up President Biden's bold agenda for working families across our Commonwealth.
**Look, Peter: Democrats should vote like Democrats, otherwise we'll be voting under the terms + conditions that Republicans set for us.**
**And if you trust me with your vote to fill this seat in 2022, you will *never* have to wonder whether I will vote alongside fellow Dems, or let you down in the big moments.** But it means I need your support more than ever if we're going to win this race.
[**_Will you rush a donation of any amount you can to our campaign today? It'd mean the world to me + to our campaign team who are hard at work building the grassroots organizing power we'll need to flip this seat and defend our razor-thin Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33404?refcode=em20211020-3094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3094%2E434096%2EcZ5kml)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33404?refcode=em20211020-3094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3094%2E434096%2EcZ5kml)**
Right now, Democrats have the Oval Office, we have the House, and we have the Senate.
So it's deeply frustrating to me (and I'm sure to you too, Peter) that we keep stalling on delivering key priorities to the working people who got us here.
**That's not the kind of leadership I'm about.** I would gladly trade my career to cast that crucial 51st vote to transform our country with bold, common-sense legislation just like today's Freedom to Vote Act.
In fact, it would be my honor.
[**_If you're with me in this fight, I'm coming to you today to respectfully ask: Will you kick in your first $5 right now to our campaign? Me, Gisele, and our entire campaign team here at HQ would be so grateful._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/33404?refcode=em20211020-3094&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3094%2E434096%2EcZ5kml)
Thank you for fighting alongside me,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211020-3094-footer&t=23&refcode2=3094_434096_cZ5kml&akid=3094%2E434096%2EcZ5kml)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

Look, Peter: Democrats should vote like Democrats, otherwise we'll be voting under the terms + conditions that Republicans set for us. And if you trust me with your vote to fill this seat in 2022, you will never have to wonder whether I will vote alongside fellow Dems, or let you down in the big moments. But it means I need your support more than ever if we're going to win this race. Right now, Democrats have the Oval Office, we have the House, and we have the Senate. So it's deeply frustrating to me (and I'm sure to you too, Peter) that we keep stalling on delivering key priorities to the working people who got us here. That's not the kind of leadership I'm about. I would gladly trade my career to cast that crucial 51st vote to transform our country with bold, common-sense legislation just like today's Freedom to Vote Act. In fact, it would be my honor. Thank you for fighting alongside me, John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: Statement on redistricting and 2022
body:
Two years ago this week we launched our campaign for the Texas House. I could have never imagined the amount of support we’d receive from family, | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/redistricting-2022-10-20-2021?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=101757a20e&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Hi team,

Two years ago this week we launched our campaign for the Texas House. I could have never imagined the amount of support we’d receive from family, friends, colleagues, and people I’ve never even met. We put together an incredible team of hardworking young people that showed up every day to do whatever was necessary to ensure Texas stayed a bastion of freedom and prosperity.

While we came up just shy of winning, we launched our 2022 campaign this summer knowing we’d have the momentum, support, and the political climate to get us across the finish line. Now that the redistricting process is complete, we know that unfortunately we’re not going to get that opportunity - we’ve been drawn out of HD-113.

My team and I are incredibly disappointed we won’t have an opportunity for a rematch, but we know this won’t be the end of our fight. So we’ll wait. And we’ll watch. And when the time is right — we'll be back. Texas is too important.

Texas Forever,
Will Douglas

P.S. - please stay in touch, my personal email is [WillDouglas@outlook.com](mailto:WillDouglas@outlook.com?subject=2022). Thank you!
---

We just had a meeting with our finance team, and it's clear: if we have more donors from your area give $5 or $10 right now, Our campaign is off to a terrific start - raising $3.75 million in only five short weeks. They really should tell that to the hard-working American families who are faced with choosing what to leave off their next grocery list, Fellow Conservative. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=da0810c0d0e842b7a9a97053ee9ccd4b&_e=64jwy9F3Lu1HKc6yr2LY52Kb-TqZ96n4cqg8e7l1zzeDlarRziSjzfkmVZtShEg77czqncTpXVVKNFH-ewQ2ThGZuUW3jJkaXbDAPofHjmL_qVWjB01cJdUAnbfrUmbMdIiaBkgaX1NezTNpI6Gkg7Ss4iCt784WJKUlDJn2BTRdIKf3zJW9GcXSo4WUmkrcx7daX6jLALC-sgo1UE0nx3y0SWkhQEuNl-exWYq7BebBf2dVuQT-Lfpb_RgoLXmb7MCk2tno8yi6aZ84UmWkWc9z4sleZwndWtM8XYUaTKt89H2-t0WNO1EHr1cS99D75KgR9IpWkkvAYDvBSOnNFffrQT6tjqdbouO8Da71Cky0np4CW2yKepjXEE-lQTjU)

---
Fellow Conservative -

The Biden Administration thinks the soaring prices Americans pay - the result of massive Democrat spending-and-debt driven inflation - are a _high-class problem._

They _really should_ tell that to the hard-working American families who are faced with choosing what to leave off their next grocery list, Fellow Conservative.

In fact, prices are up across the board due to the Biden Democrats’ inflationary spending - making it hard for millions of Americans who work for a living, fill their own tanks, and have bills to pay on top of all their taxes. Just look at the numbers, Fellow Conservative.

_**Gas prices are up 42%. Used cars are up 19%. Bacon is up 19%, beef is up 18% and pork and eggs are both up 13%.**_

I understand that when budgeting, every dollar counts. [**Which is why I need you to chip a dollar to defeat the Democrats - so that we can lower inflation and get America back on track.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=da0810c0d0e842b7a9a97053ee9ccd4b&_e=64jwy9F3Lu1HKc6yr2LY52Kb-TqZ96n4cqg8e7l1zzeDlarRziSjzfkmVZtShEg77czqncTpXVVKNFH-ewQ2ThGZuUW3jJkaXbDAPofHjmL_qVWjB01cJdUAnbfrUmbMdIiaBkgaX1NezTNpI6Gkg7Ss4iCt784WJKUlDJn2BTQpg6itto1GqlmjxWJP2rDs2OsBBW2rlye5ismfdqXkfi5nSdpcl8eKOl5U-mPLsgjZUw1LqyxVffZrVhBJVrLukvYmYr3s76J1ioS9pbBxraSdWTok-X2vdnqHCcJGWyyCwvbfS7QVVyQEt6CXMIJlolwTOvmZ3lFIdwhNTdgLhkOhNjuZeMHpcdGZjyzhOWmxAkLBmOsi_YsFOzmMiciR)

Fellow Conservative, the Biden-Pelosi Democrats and their elitist bureaucrats are not just driving American down the path of spending, debt, inflation and worse - they’re completely out of touch with the lives and best interests of working, taxpaying Americans and their families.

It’s time to draw the line. We’ve got to defeat Speaker Pelosi’s leftist, out-of-touch Democrats – right here in North Carolina - and across the country in the 2022 Midterm Elections, _and bring their disastrous, out-of-touch agenda to an end._

[**I’m counting on you and your contribution of $1 or more**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=da0810c0d0e842b7a9a97053ee9ccd4b&_e=64jwy9F3Lu1HKc6yr2LY52Kb-TqZ96n4cqg8e7l1zzeDlarRziSjzfkmVZtShEg77czqncTpXVVKNFH-ewQ2ThGZuUW3jJkaXbDAPofHjmL_qVWjB01cJdUAnbfrUmbMdIiaBkgaX1NezTNpI6Gkg7Ss4iCt784WJKUlDJn2BTS9_QRggO-Q8BuyyWfc1sjk14kUF3nGMASZr_IK5xsIXFlUuepuUFA52CJeaL0nbXVXBi0Czz9tBh7jQabXuysITXK5waCcqpJxIKWf-B0D-dhbt8ojlDgXfxsRAYDkyYRdkijw5251KpPAPGdPcJF07WqEQckixFZgkm24VG7WGJFSAvwOmSZkzobEVNkxX__IxyJ-LgAzTOXDbALb_Zcd) _to help me emerge victorious in this pivotal campaign and return to Capitol Hill as part of a new GOP House majority._

Greg Murphy, MD

It’s time to draw the line. We’ve got to defeat Speaker Pelosi’s leftist, out-of-touch Democrats – right here in North Carolina - and across the country in the 2022 Midterm Elections, and bring their disastrous, out-of-touch agenda to an end. to help me emerge victorious in this pivotal campaign and return to Capitol Hill as part of a new GOP House majority. For America, Greg Murphy, MD | | Paid for by friends to elect Dr. Greg Murphy to Congress Murphy for Congress P.O. | Dear Friends, I am honored and excited to see how support for #TeamBecky continues to expand. We now have **over 1,000 individual contributions** , and in our latest filing quarter, **nearly 90% of our donations came from inside Utah. **

Momentum continued this week when Sharlee Mullins Glenn, speaking on behalf of herself, published an [op-ed in the Salt Lake Tribune](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=ef5cf28b96&e=10c1db3257). She writes, “If, like me, you are a moderate who believes that a moderate senator with a proven track record as a unifier would best represent the people, interests, and values of Utah...then **I invite you to join me in supporting Becky Edwards.”**
---
| [Donate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=40dc478a60&e=10c1db3257 "Donate")
---
| She continued, encouraging, “Pull out your wallet and donate to her campaign. It’s not enough just to declare support for a candidate on social media or stick a sign in your lawn (though those things are important too!). We must be willing to put our money where our mouth is. That is how we claim our power as citizens in this government of, by, and for the people.” Mike Lee has said he’s planning to spend $20 million on this race just to maintain the status quo. He knows he’s vulnerable. **We are prepared to rise to the challenge**. Our fundraising goal this quarter is our biggest yet, and we need your help to spread our message and unseat Mike Lee. [Will you join Sharlee and hundreds of other Utahns who are supporting better representation in the U.S. Senate and donate $50, $100, $150 or whatever you can afford today?](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=2e44448efa&e=10c1db3257)[ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=c828628263&e=10c1db3257) Utah needs your voice, and I need your support.

subject: I agree: Audit Pima County NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Trump is right |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1e2683d1bf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity Conservative leading the charge in Arizona. And today I’m writing you with an important update.
President Trump just released a statement about the terrible fraud in Pima County!

**This is what he said...**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7761f6d080&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ce6bd129ea&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f026f1d41f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **The findings that President Trump mentions in this statement are the very findings I was talking about at his Des Moines, Iowa rally!**

One of the key statistics that the President Trump brings up is that he was winning in the middle of the night in Pima up until the truckloads of mail-in votes started showing up.

_And the mail-in votes caused a REVERSAL in the trend proportional exactly to how many mail-in votes that there were. And this only happened in the middle of the night while most everyone was sleeping._

**But it gets worse than that. If we peel back the data, what we see is something that is mathematically IMPOSSIBLE!**
* **The first is that in Pima County, the total number of mail in ballots that were returned was over 100% of what was sent out.**
* **The second is that there were multiple other precincts that had return rates in the high 90’s, when the average was in the 70’s nationwide. Statistical outliers like these are just as much an indicator of fraud as having more ballots returned than sent out to begin with!**

Additionally, the President cites evidence from the Maricopa Audit which I helped lead which absolutely proves that the election should be decertified:
* 6,545 ballots with no envelopes
* 2,580 bad signatures
* 1,919 mail-in ballots without signatures.

**_This is more than the margin of Biden’s so-called “victory!”_**

This is why we need to do two things:

_The first is to Audit Pima County. There is clear evidence of fraud and we cannot let the thieving Democrats get away with this._

_The second is to decertify Arizona’s election and recall the electors. There is sufficient evidence to do so._
[_Will you help me push for the Pima Audit and decertification of Arizona with a donation today?_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=43163474f3&e=44b8c466b0)
**Make no mistake, there has been substantial progress that has been made in Arizona while I have been leading the Election Integrity movement!**
* **We have demonstrated and proved that there has been substantial election fraud in Maricopa County**
* **We have found statistically accurate results that show that President Trump actually won the election.**
* **Attorney General Mark Brnovich has just recently began to investigate the Maricopa Case, in particular those who fraudulently deleted election files.**
* **We have now gathered tens of thousands of signatures to Audit Pima County**
* **I am meeting with Election Integrity Patriots and Experts from around the country to help them push for audits in their state.**
* **I have worked with third party firms to develop currency-level authentication processes with ballots – a technological innovation that simply has not been seen and we can apply to our elections here in America!**

[_This is a tremendous amount of progress, and none of it happens without your continued support!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=42eed6e70f&e=44b8c466b0)

_I have accomplished every single one of these things with your help. And now I am pushing to Audit Pima and Decertify Arizona. [Will you help me take the next step for America with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4ac7e19e9e&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=73706c3fee&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=185495d48f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0e5e7ba7bc&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

---

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=1915dc3dc6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=1915dc3dc6).

body:
My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_t=_cQwXkW445_SDmqU4BaqpkyVt06_kh5b2yskPJIA6GxgqUtqXiVejFX8aQva5UURJaSH_2OZVgd_vbCpBUQqvxgzeQB4A5dMKyBJDiMudt9m_rXE4WU6Y1F9xa-Mdc9_vx9PlMeKYwdEO-zYCzerN85_0F9MWu1ZmsuejER-fnk%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKnKZEQ8-5Jmu-3wXNXZxoMYLW7zI4tmimJigH3OU00pTCBmsLDwZooMtZalUyC-c16MBLGhdS1Fseb1s0GAhzfh9VZfYQYu_pw-tzgTPZlzpZ4RC8Xxm5MvdN3An-uxgBVkctjpKMdyVrMrP3pGT2LxH24VQ1jbB59a_qQx9XdO4-4cl0OUx0X3iq5kQED0akQ8ohPNHwoSVR9pOIeuQBAQ%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKhgam3xu9sc8bVNLLNfvgAMFJUW63tjxNgbfvqPrKcYhBQHUrBcmfOik6Cg4OhmKRfWlA7wJS5B_ZKRXCtJCDjhWe9w15AhA-b0NPsKlQxMZctaNPLggdskE9LzjZc3eMlxZI2v2cBFL3C2waSGX2RaD8Fl7ln16p9aX0gxdAo4Rw9ViWDXrTwSIhaIpcLKp83AyPs3tG46OJJO31_lUF0Q%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKqkUtMnWGyFdS-H0lkeJ6pgh-8f2tj8D7ZO6w9pbWgM4FGpIZgmkx3tNJ_4DEsNZMyGnVczX9DyFcNMKs9SQ4DdMX9To6MzsNSHGX6sbd3u1gSePef-JfEyiUZoeDuqFb0TtIOKJKQtjX8aDp8G5wiflmk-t6k8q3X6vDxRZpA6ErC_BIpjLgJnUzjzmBxmhq8KOeelI2mtZnHmLm2fQVeg%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKvM6hr-cegWzCMEZqE49sfnMl9XuGYzIW6MZkTJc3choSYFFAKVB9PmA2vzIMXtOlOqkyR0fu_ZQlnsnr01OtSZbuEMLll64zSrlLHtyPNrs0-4LDxB1XD-xdEtH52Can6xjkca3mO5kdptV68WSoH0Wp8XXYUhpgOR9b7RVnd-HbF4VB70rxtolILoJdhbBoi1ywfFmKnWtTSpAQZNKQm4%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKqwUrJXPtZLOoSLgMYm8r2DkGjCl1uRRcqzCPCrYc_Pw9yiHysoczYn-Qb4FR-UWon2RXNwSzD6FhQ-Ax-BMdfIjNnObB6wotaJYCDajcWC8jX-iaTLIr143xnMhMOMTLSZncydyKHxS3FBnA3StAEEgeBGOZYZDRuZpDrqAqSFVNVH42OD9vhf_AUNGMQ-7M5CeIOF60H-A2cxYkAViavs%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKkSIvGBpr5mK-I0S8wytToUiTVws2hMXI3F2zkxApjmk13FjNtnT3Qxk4nsgApJe4Gx6rWubS9ANYDbJf_5lyJsZVwym8ZOk3t9Mu4sUkaY8iiLg8X1h9t41OiwBrsmNpABD9MDwuBotpWPyZ02wmw72L2xu9Xce9sQqMp-co2qAhZFXA-JrgsxMZW2tt--xgM0e1LdjfiZkw3-AzhjBJKU%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts.

If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, **[would you please consider a contribution to my campaign for Congress today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKi-dYPTeSmgAVizqsKIrdn1RNYNaPNBeNavUXeQjQz7WvVM7KrZm63vreKAg1YKcIT3fBI1xMA4y21kbI2s7nacW0uLSDMyN8aeXJPufYAVt9GBhEAZZbrLWMZ9gKA8kVhDqK3hC92ZHrhjkY7febjXal-UFs6pvAsUupuW0xG5M9wVmHnFp8ZRsugGbEYbYDW1V9w4lDRY45lloxKIqmVM%3D)** I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress.

[** Send a 1st Generation American to Congress >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKicXdRieY_uM571qHtepMzTbHCctWD1tDPvXCjL9h4yTyj4J2sf2F2ZFwRnlXtFj1XL7AgfCkTw6be3vY5v6sCPVhHJ0T8uWwY-v0Ap4p8-LuJzQ1ApixEDADKSwBSbGl_GWDQv3in0-5hWTOUR9nlYPXFbgMaNS_PTCHn2pL1cbPQ9JmGWAck_UC405PsgK25qGIYyRnqwkfXvVccm1Rwo%3D)
Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKmZoua7efemiyIXXLj5sbvqZcF5Rzf1T9UZf7xLGC7Id6Yc8JQPMIQGqIDWVACNSFXZQwbmRGJkuScZ8HiZQHg_hxGWVpfdjIutjzblpJgyCLbiLJCmIYMve0e3od1e5C9m5U98kkqQqs65txYi6pTdyPy_79dKnbbB0eLG5mRfukn2uvy9ufS8JNyqjkqphQiFzwuTwN-tExnz3EvsI9zY%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5cbad30df8064e0790c2a486638f7c89&_e=9gukDAYVYyLgpaeNZDcqeFdV7cwAR2urng4H00I4vyry3YfiOR2YKbrXl9XPSPQz-oj3ZJKDNGpbAS_GXLBYNKOfHBu_lp5aScTuV-wBBPwsy-ybo0n7R6yU7ISM20AQ27Z-UfdreZd8qAhR_VXwR1POHucZB8b7g2I8L3hbcQkjU8yPs-aLTSmSciLRp8EqlQ5f_-mtj9CTGuPbmwrQa5BiiqV5K4VKMK2c6HE420o6xEJtzb3n-YIZk0kF6LBjBBQhdglsHz40CPvnuLjuKizesDrNRRzK80q4i_AnlIa8-684FbzP4osDNCWy_iGjvo3A3lK-zyaRCeXwEaCeyDbwxcCl0hcxxT0sn7vjk-w9aYcLSYLDFSi1rkx5tH7bhvXxklf8CQmCt_hsAODNp27oqTqBWn_40uEPHGMwdhU-halnun0EUCW-933vx4vKlLZgm4QWiKnOqVgWPASlsY-T3Y530ZVyjicNVsvZyTA%3D)

clean_body: My parents came to the U.S. homeless to give me the American Dream. Now, I'm running for Congress to keep the American Dream, which saved our lives, a | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans. I’m speaking with authority on the matter: I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today. I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but what is worth having in life that is easy? I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. Yet today, many Americans would rather depend on government handouts. If you’ve found this email inspiring on any level, I don’t believe in handouts of any kind, but I won’t be able to do anything about the ones that exist – or stop new entitlements – without first making my way to Congress. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. For Country, Rod Dorilas | ABOUT ROD** Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. | | Derek, Donald Trump is dangerous for our country.

When hundreds of white nationalists and neo-Nazis descended on Charlottesville in 2017, I went to work to defend our Commonwealth.

And what did Donald Trump do? He said there were “very fine people on both sides.”

Derek, I said this in 2017, and I’ll say this again: **white supremacy is not welcome in Virginia. Not now, and _not ever._**

But if we elect Glenn Youngkin this November, we know he’ll follow in Donald Trump’s footsteps just like he’s done throughout his campaign. Trumpism is on the march and electing Youngkin would be a giant win for Donald Trump.

[**_I’m humbly asking for your support today. Will you make a contribution to my campaign right now to help me defend Virginia?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37763754/312506232/1097049879?refcode=20211020.8_TM_10FJ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTkxNzUzOC0wYTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NOVSuvJzqEug1eh4gZEVTFf93tA-y2l8ynALAQ4UNbE=)

Being governor of the Commonwealth means being a leader. It means standing up for what’s right — like I did with Donald Trump in Charlottesville.

It means appealing to the best of Virginians — not exploiting our differences and stoking division.

At a rally last week, Trump said he could count on Youngkin to “do all the things we want a governor to do.”

I don’t know about you, Derek, but I think Virginians want a governor who is willing to stand up for what’s right, make tough decisions that benefit all Virginians, and vigorously defend our progress.

[**_We can’t count on Glenn Youngkin to be the leader we need, Derek. I’m asking for your support today because from day one of this campaign, I have been committed to working for Virginians — not Donald Trump. name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: Biden's running out of time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Biden can't show up empty-handed.
| [](http://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3937?t=3&akid=12888%2E53494%2EBUtXSt) Friend, The clock is ticking. We have fewer than 11 days, give or take a few hours. That's when President Biden will land in Glasgow for the COP26 climate talks. And when President Biden faces world leaders there, they won't ask him whether he built roads and bridges with Republican votes. Instead, they're going to ask him whether he met his climate commitments. This is the president's chance to restore America's credibility as a global climate leader—but only if he can put his money where his mouth is and pass the Build Back Better Act, with bold climate investments, now. [**_We just launched a new campaign alongside Climate Power and the Sunrise Movement urging Congress and President Biden to pass the bold climate-focused Build Back Better Act before COP26. Visit our new campaign website to contact your member of Congress today._**](http://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3937?t=4&akid=12888%2E53494%2EBUtXSt) | [URGE CONGRESS](http://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3937?t=5&akid=12888%2E53494%2EBUtXSt)
---
Congress has fewer than 11 days to pass the reconciliation package—or risk sending President Biden to ask the rest of the world to take essential climate action without the credibility of having done so ourselves. Our new countdown campaign urges everyone to send a message to their senators and representatives right now, urging our leaders to do everything in their power to make sure President Biden doesn't show up to COP26 empty-handed. [**_Visit our new campaign website to urge Congress to contact your representatives to take action today._**](http://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3937?t=6&akid=12888%2E53494%2EBUtXSt)
Onward,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Executive Director, Evergreen Action

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Republicans just abused the filibuster AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1218%2E3611125%2EV5HrIX ][IMG]

Folks, I'm pissed off and you should be too.

Senate Republicans just abused the filibuster to block voting rights
AGAIN. Because they know that when everyone votes, they lose elections.

I’m proud to support the Freedom to Vote Act. But with a 50-50 tie in the
Senate, Mitch McConnell and his cronies can get away with killing bills
before they even make it to the floor for a debate.

Ohio is our best chance to flip a seat blue and expand our Senate
majority. But McConnell and the GOP won’t go down without a fight.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5447?t=1007&akid=1218%2E3611125%2EV5HrIX ]It’s about time we actually get things done in the Senate. Can I count
on you to chip in to help me flip this Senate seat blue and stop McConnell
from retaking the Senate majority?

What do you have planned for this Saturday, Peter? Activities with the family? Maybe getting ready for Halloween or watching a football game? Attending a political or community event?

Did you know that Saturday, in the southern Mexican city of Tapachula near its border with Guatemala, as many as 95,000 or more Central Americans and Haitians are going to begin the “Mother of all Caravans” - Caravana Madre - to make the trek north to our border and illegally enter our country?

That’s nearly another hundred thousand unvetted, untested, unvaccinated invaders who disregard our laws, our sovereignty, and our rights to invade our land and take advantage of our people for their own selfish interests - and the Biden Democrats’ plans to allow them all to stay.

Peter, this isn’t the story of Ellis Island. This isn’t the story of legal immigrants who wait their turn and abide by our laws to seek citizenship in the land of the free. These aren’t grateful and respectful newcomers who honor our traditions and customs and seek to assimilate as Americans.

No. They are the latest wave of potentially millions of illegal immigrants, who want what we have - are coming to take it - and the globalist open borders Leftists are the reason it’s allowed to continue.

So while you are watching the big game Saturday, think of that full stadium - 100,000 people - and then remember that that many invaders are now on the way, and there’s no stopping the next caravan or the next, as long as the Biden Democrats are in power.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Rahm Emmanuel is unfit to serve
body:
#
Peter,
Seven years ago, 17-year-old Laquan McDonald was fatally shot by Chicago police officers. As mayor of Chicago, Rahm Emanuel tried to cover up his wrongful death, delaying justice and stopping Laquan’s family from getting closure and healing.
_Today, on the anniversary of Laquan’s murder, Rahm Emanuel is sitting before the Senate Foreign Relations committee for nomination as Biden’s nominee for ambassador to Japan._
[**In 2014, Kina fought against Rahm’s corrupt cover-up, and in 2021, she is fighting against his appointment to serve in the Biden Administration. If you’re with us in this work, will you split an $3 contribution to her campaign and Justice Democrats?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78903?refcode=em20211020-20111&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78903?refcode=em20211020-20111&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB)**
**Illinois’ 7th is a congressional district plagued by inequality.** It’s home to giant tech companies, big real estate developments, and a wealthy financial district championed by Rahm Emmanuel. But travel just a couple miles away, and the community struggles with unemployment, unsafe infrastructure, and unequal public schools — and life expectancy drops by 30 years.
Past experiences and actions matter. Which is why Rahm Emanuel is unequivocally unfit to serve as ambassador to Japan — period. And why we need the people’s voice in government.
Kina’s experiences as an organizer and activist, on the front lines of the protests against Rahm Emanuel, tackling inequity, and fighting for justice and accountability make her the best candidate in the IL-07 primary. But in order to beat the corrupt political system that protected Rahm Emanuel, and has maintained the status quo, she needs our help. [**Will you split a contribution between Kina Collins and Justice Democrats? Your support will help us build the campaign needed to get Kina elected.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78903?refcode=em20211020-20111&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/78903?refcode=em20211020-20111&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=24&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=25&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211020-20111-footer&t=26&refcode2=20111_1203867_PXYtlB&akid=20111%2E1203867%2EPXYtlB)**

clean_body: Democrats monitoring your bank account | Fellow Conservative, this is alarming... Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats wanted to monitor your BANK ACCOUNT and have a record of every transaction you make over $600. This is an infringement on our rights. Until Republicans take back the House, we’re going to keep finding ourselves beholden to folks like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and my opponent, who only care about securing their socialist wishlist. Experts say the Left’s plan to allow the Internal Revenue Service to gather information on U.S. bank accounts would disproportionately impact small businesses and the very individuals the administration claims they are trying to protect. This is just another attempt by the Democrats to monitor and control YOUR life, Fellow Conservative. Earlier today, Democrats altered their proposal after serious backlash against the measure - now, proposing the IRS track bank account transactions of $10,000. They only changed their minds because of pressure from furious Americans. This is proof that Democrats will use their power to push alarming, RADICAL policies unless we stand up and fight against them. Which is why I need your immediate help, Fellow Conservative. Fighting for you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. body:
Should President Biden resign? Please Let me and my team know as soon as you possibly can. I’m afraid that once again, we’re witnessing a Democrat adm

---

Fellow Conservative,

While not a lot surprises me in politics these days, recent events are shocking. The ineptitude with which President Biden orchestrated the withdrawal has been a catastrophic failure of leadership.

I have never been one to mince words – I didn’t support Joe Biden in the 2020 election, but I never rooted for him to fail.

Ten months into his presidency, Joe Biden has failed the American public on a number of fronts – whether it be his handling of the COVID-19 pandemic, his failure to secure the southern border, or sending the nation into an inflation crisis. All of these failures are bad. However, leaving billions of dollars’ worth of military firepower, aircraft, munitions and AMERICANS behind enemy lines is not only a failure of leadership – **it’s weakened America on the world stage**.

**[Right now, I want to know what you think: should President Biden resign? Please Let me and my team know as soon as you possibly can](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e1fb55c01ff4f1c8b85293bca1f8484&_e=K-DrOXo2yvffM0GfbnVz7lWed69Pof2pspFt-NDoJ5hTH_EOY-_fAkD_o7dbe-gefUDXf-TRWjRYeC05ah3gzbPPenmftjp5KsOT0sacoytD-I4kSUtN2BeNHiL9tK4yEFKoBKQC8KUY5djrQRhjQB1YbbbS_qM0niklJYusaTv7DuvBkECIw4zeyucXNCRNlolDYOL2fRIwwBnNSaRH1jSkDYnTCZuxEdraCLtXnUa1y1LpCuN8CTc6AqQDsOf_iZwWdiREK2zJlrP_paB5B95jjbq9NPu3bTcRw96WVVAJdUy52fQrDy4232dxz9HO8q0A40vviax1GtX9ENS4HJypweP22f891CA07fTUUjrPryvqo6VjXNo5SBB7LPBPPgg1dnqhrO4e8YR9_GyDxRSa02DU2JYaWrDcnXpTbB5KMRkWphjD2uzlL5oPbixc7LUzy5uuNDEwqFho_pg2FTKlcfCekd5RF6XKj1jW5lqgnNXzEckSTe01rkLxCIbm)**.

|
**POLL: SHOULD BIDEN RESIGN?**

On a scale of [1-5], how important do you think it is that Biden resign from office?

I’m afraid that once again, we’re witnessing a Democrat adm | Fellow Conservative, While not a lot surprises me in politics these days, recent events are shocking. The ineptitude with which President Biden orchestrated the withdrawal has been a catastrophic failure of leadership. I have never been one to mince words – I didn’t support Joe Biden in the 2020 election, but I never rooted for him to fail. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Filibustered (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
No matter how many times the Senate considers voting rights proposals, the outcome will NOT change until we do something about it.
#
Peter, Republicans in the Senate just filibustered urgently needed legislation to protect the right to vote. Again.
No matter how many times the Senate considers voting rights proposals, the outcome will NOT change until we do something about it. **Republicans are leading the charge on voter suppression, so why would they suddenly join us to protect voting rights?**
Let’s be very clear: it’s the filibuster or our democracy. We must respond by getting rid of the filibuster to take power away from Mitch McConnell, protect voting rights, and preserve our democracy.
[**Peter, are you with me? Join me in this fight to end the Jim Crow filibuster by chipping in an urgent donation of $10 or more right now. Voting rights and our democracy are on the line.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211020?refcode=em20211020-736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=736_420207_v3MCbq&akid=736%2E420207%2Ev3MCbq)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211020?refcode=em20211020-736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=736_420207_v3MCbq&akid=736%2E420207%2Ev3MCbq)**
Republicans will always prioritize voter suppression and protecting people like Trump who fuel attacks on our democracy. And with the filibuster in place, our Democratic majority that voters delivered us won’t be able to pass the critical reforms needed at this moment — like getting big money out of politics, LGBTQIA+ protections, gun violence prevention measures, climate justice, reproductive rights, and more.
**Peter, we must nix the filibuster and deliver for the people.**
[**If we don’t, our democracy will only face greater threats, and Republicans will get away with their obstruction. We can’t let them. Chip in $3 right now to help fuel my fight to end the filibuster and deliver for the people. It’s time.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211020?refcode=em20211020-736&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=736_420207_v3MCbq&akid=736%2E420207%2Ev3MCbq)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211020-736-footer&t=22&refcode2=736_420207_v3MCbq&akid=736%2E420207%2Ev3MCbq)**

That was all before Donald Trump threw his “complete and total endorsement” behind my extremist opponent — one of his top allies who pushed voter fraud conspiracy theories to overturn the results of Nevada's election.**

Even worse, more than $2 million has already been spent on attack ads to defeat me — and the recent downgrade for my odds of winning prove that the GOP’s tactics could be working. **Derek, the Republican Senate campaign arm just raised a staggering $28 million.**

name: Team Mace
subject: Dems are running on borrowed time ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Federal Agencies Unveil Plans to Combat “Anti-Voter Burdens” Faced by People of Color
body:
In response to President Joe Biden’s governmentwide directive to eliminate “anti-voter burdens” and “significant obstacles” that prevent people of color from voting, more than a dozen federal agencies have announced unprecedented initiatives that could conveniently result in more votes for Democrats.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | October 20, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56922&L=26080&F=H&)
---
In response to President Joe Biden’s governmentwide directive to eliminate “anti-voter burdens” and “significant obstacles” that prevent people of color from voting, more than a dozen federal agencies have announced unprecedented initiatives that could conveniently result in more votes for Democrats. The agencies concocted their unconventional voter outreach plan after Biden issued an Executive Order on Promoting Access to Voting in early March. It directs the federal government to leverage its vast resources to increase access to voter registration services and information about voting. Under the mandate all agencies must submit a strategic plan outlining ways to promote voter registration and participation to White House Domestic Policy Advisor Susan Rice, who served as National Security Advisor and U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations under Barack Obama.

[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56922&L=26080&F=H&)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: My message to you before Terry's final filing deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37763982/312511588/-2023814932?refcode=20211020.9_SA_10FK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWViYjVmZS0xYTMyLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UaB-mbxtN2cU_TH0LOg3YaIwBzBzl_bqgLeVGokMrWQ=)

| | Derek,

Virginia’s gubernatorial race is critical to the future of the Commonwealth and the future of the country. With the election just one month away, we must all do our part to help my friend Terry win.

We see it across the country: Governors can stop attacks on our most fundamental rights as Americans. But right-wing governors take their states backward. name: Ms. Earletta Hearn
subject: Shh...it’s a surprise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter. If we
haven’t met before, my name is Ms. Earletta Hearn — I’m Charles’ mother. 👋

I’m writing to you about a birthday surprise we’re putting together for
Charles today. 🎉

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11700?refcode=em20211020-1081&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG ][IMG]

We’re racing to raise $37,000 for Charles’ 37th birthday and show him our
support in this fight to replace Rand Paul. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11700?refcode=em20211020-1081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG ]I know how much your help
means to him as we build this movement together: Will you chip in $3.70 or
anything you can before midnight tonight?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11700?refcode=em20211020-1081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG ]Contribute $3.70

Allow me to brag a little about Charles for a moment,
Peter.

I know in my heart that if we want a fighter in the Senate, someone who
will look out for families like yours and mine, there’s no one better than
Charles.

Life wasn’t always easy for us in the West End of Louisville. We sometimes
had to stretch every penny to make ends meet. And when my son Charles was
growing up, there were even times when I would skip meals so he could eat.
At one point, we didn’t have a place to live because our house burned
down.

Suffering was no stranger in the West End. All around us, we saw families
struggling to put food on the table, mamas grieving the deaths of their
children lost to gun violence, and folks losing hope in the American
Dream. No one should have to live that kind of struggle. Those days were
hard, and I don’t wish them on anyone. But I know for a fact those
experiences never left Charles — they’re what drive him every single day.

So when Charles announced that he was running to fight for all of us, I
knew how personal this fight would be for him. I’ve watched him spend his
entire life fighting for a brighter future for our family, and for all of
our families across Kentucky. I know he’ll do the same in the U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11700?refcode=em20211020-1081&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG ]If you’re ready to support Charles as he takes on Rand Paul, will you
make a donation to his campaign to show your support? We’re really hoping
to share good news with Charles later that we raised $37,000 for his
birthday today!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11700?refcode=em20211020-1081&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG ][IMG]

Let’s do this,

Ms. Hearn

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211020-1081-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1081_346206_foMneG&akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1081%2E346206%2EfoMneG

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
